name: Tim Sheehy, Navy SEAL
subject: One minute bio
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
I’ve been emailing you for two months now, but I realized, you may not really know who I am. So, take a minute, literally, to get to know me a bit better. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=a2b4b27fef764240896e871bbd0ee1db&_t=jx9S4ag4BACjejGow1bNPB0aAnP5DHKbQ9ekO5CNnZZQrVk2iKQqKIzT6GkdVAfOt-NR7RmJK4vaFDkKfvj6zkCpJW5Zlaaxy8nJW66rz2U%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=a2b4b27fef764240896e871bbd0ee1db&_t=jx9S4ag4BACjejGow1bNPB0aAnP5DHKbQ9ekO5CNnZZQrVk2iKQqKIzT6GkdVAfOt-NR7RmJK4vaFDkKfvj6zkCpJW5Zlaaxy8nJW66rz2U%3D)

Peter,

It’s Montana U.S. Senate candidate Tim Sheehy.

I’m a former Navy SEAL and small business owner, not a politician, and _**I’m learning that in politics, things tend to happen all at once or not at all**_.

Coming off a busy summer, things have quieted down a bit for us here in Montana. I wanted to take a minute to reintroduce myself to you. **[I’m linking a 65-second video to the image below that I’m hoping you’ll watch today.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a2b4b27fef764240896e871bbd0ee1db&_e=5K-Ys-gJBKJBsj_3aBklk-Dv4rmBX9Ni5M3Cgd-t0UEsi346mCKv0R3UAEFpenbXnt7WUs-lwE4kIev_R8srxmkeZmp0TYMVo2WsXc5Dw8CN9-VUGFPfispLTnG4UepzJpb-pOEZu15OL16QpKLyEYZbsNEo3XVkoDN5o646gM6lbcFfo1yZ5un78Jy1Gne4u5ah3TnMDO-bDm3OP4QmbKlE6Gn2jm9YTkFe943hyQXFQOMG2g0pyJcP4akn72FV2rYeKyCIEpEXO_62K-abqlwaf14vy5E4d-KdnLzAhoHeHFb_nMnDLXQH4PpNZbIxS7AAl_E1znZyvqxooxUzG-rL2fvaKFc8gV7dV4XF6g6wlNfpws3cALSayHELVtt6AJE-EU1iNI8ewEMDL7nBhTxao2zkk-MLQrM2Px4ffQM%3D)**

If you are wondering who I am, why I’m running for the U.S. Senate, or if investing in me is worth your time, this short bio video should not only provide answers to some lingering questions you may have about me, **but you’ll get to hear straight from the source why I think I’m the best candidate to flip this Democrat-held Senate seat, Republican**.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a2b4b27fef764240896e871bbd0ee1db&_e=5K-Ys-gJBKJBsj_3aBklk-Dv4rmBX9Ni5M3Cgd-t0UEsi346mCKv0R3UAEFpenbXnt7WUs-lwE4kIev_R8srxmkeZmp0TYMVo2WsXc5Dw8CN9-VUGFPfispLTnG4UepzJpb-pOEZu15OL16QpKLyEYZbsNEo3XVkoDN5o646gM6lbcFfo1yZ5un78Jy1Gne4u5ah3TnMDO-bDm3OP4QmbKlE6Gn2jm9YTkFe943hyQXFQOMG2g0pyJcP4akn72FVwSRGzaU_KvJXHMFv29KVI3Q7XzHz4xALqgoclxe_RIpAgr-0oBDtzjhAMggQfobOvWZ_votn4XaOmBEsN9Pm8yVN3g_3-Syas-IrKDNgC4OlCIoYDQH7fYOVp9CporrQukC6LCD7ucm1fDDf8RYjYXxAEJ8w6ZiiJ_BPf2zlRi8%3D)

[**MEET ME ->
**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a2b4b27fef764240896e871bbd0ee1db&_e=5K-Ys-gJBKJBsj_3aBklk-Dv4rmBX9Ni5M3Cgd-t0UEsi346mCKv0R3UAEFpenbXnt7WUs-lwE4kIev_R8srxmkeZmp0TYMVo2WsXc5Dw8CN9-VUGFPfispLTnG4UepzJpb-pOEZu15OL16QpKLyEYZbsNEo3XVkoDN5o646gM6lbcFfo1yZ5un78Jy1Gne4u5ah3TnMDO-bDm3OP4QmbKlE6Gn2jm9YTkFe943hyQXFQOMG2g0pyJcP4akn72FVN8RVm5F2hCZT7o3zBKN0V1AGcK_7rlJgzkVHAUPT95IvdXXEuKH3-5BqKIUOdH6sY0r4LcNFUO79SSjnnJoMPGqvotQGIJTGjo3XEtNT6Ch29h09rIyBUMluRpM1lrkOL7MBbTNzGKlYx-Ln7mFTLqzj7KMu1dgYtfQr6nM3dNM%3D)

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican for U.S. Senate

[**SEND IN THE SEAL
CHIP IN TODAY **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a2b4b27fef764240896e871bbd0ee1db&_e=5K-Ys-gJBKJBsj_3aBklk-Dv4rmBX9Ni5M3Cgd-t0UEsi346mCKv0R3UAEFpenbXnt7WUs-lwE4kIev_R8srxmkeZmp0TYMVo2WsXc5Dw8CN9-VUGFPfispLTnG4UepzJpb-pOEZu15OL16QpKLyEYZbsNEo3XVkoDN5o646gM6lbcFfo1yZ5un78Jy1Gne4u5ah3TnMDO-bDm3OP4QmbKlE6Gn2jm9YTkFe943hyQXFQOMG2g0pyJcP4akn72FV-Px03_nd8LfRvFt6jM-bE8IcRKrCJaoXZNPUTum33OnqFm1s3CMs_IohpKGssyOfJL_Wv3gi5Dz0D42V7asfkDeN0PSMZ_TFfMvtn8hcB9y_VSxXoJVCBc-oRK8ynmOC8tEXjgGyQllkzyw1pFFeMZSSUOXS0IQ4Habvmq6QgDE%3D)

|
* * *

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

[ ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a2b4b27fef764240896e871bbd0ee1db&_e=5K-Ys-gJBKJBsj_3aBklk-Dv4rmBX9Ni5M3Cgd-t0UEsi346mCKv0R3UAEFpenbXnt7WUs-lwE4kIev_R8srxmkeZmp0TYMVo2WsXc5Dw8CN9-VUGFPfispLTnG4UepzJpb-pOEZu15OL16QpKLyEYZbsNEo3XVkoDN5o646gM6lbcFfo1yZ5un78Jy1Gne4u5ah3TnMDO-bDm3OP4QmbKlE6Gn2jm9YTkFe943hyQXFQOMG2g0pyJcP4akn72FVuq0bBVj8nMMbVTwVWDX3sTFxNPkGVOIdDObvG0jxT_Vreky90Y1rxRvjBxBaQ9OXs9if1smfdcIgUHx4bDDDmfmIjyR2Qa2tltPNHXkVS8IFKcXfQ5CaD7K1gND-9pRsMQ_Te-g5FqqdH70QnN0DDL4C7zgtcXzI22CP2FLczG4%3D)

subject: re: Trump's arrest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Thank DA Fani Willis for saving our democracy!
| **Listen, DA Fani Willis is a national HERO — thanks to her hard work, Trump SURRENDERED at Fulton County Jail following his indictment!

[**We’re thrilled Trump is finally being brought to justice for his crimes, so we’re sending DA Willis a HUGE thank you letter. You’ve been personally selected as one of 200 Democrats: Sign our letter now! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52880?t=6&akid=10481%2E878179%2EByUmP5) | [SIGNATURE SPOT EXPIRES AT MIDNIGHT: Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52880?t=7&akid=10481%2E878179%2EByUmP5)
---
TO: Fulton County District Attorney Fani Willis
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: THANK YOU! **Dear DA Fani Willis,

_THANK YOU for defending our democracy from Donald Trump!_**

Trump and his MAGA cronies thought they could get away with their plot to overturn President Biden’s 2020 victory. _Now, they’re completely humiliated!_

Trump’s racist attacks to take you down are absolutely despicable — so I hope you know there are millions of us across the nation who stand with you.

**We need more brave Democrats like you in office who will lock up MAGA traitors like Donald Trump and his minions!!**

[**So today, I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to thank you and to keep electing Democratic heroes who will save our democracy from GOP extremism! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52880?t=8&akid=10481%2E878179%2EByUmP5) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52880?t=9&akid=10481%2E878179%2EByUmP5)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=10481%2E878179%2EByUmP5). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=10481%2E878179%2EByUmP5).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=10481%2E878179%2EByUmP5) to request fewer emails. body:
Will we see President Trump return to the GOP primary debate stage later this month? | After the first GOP Primary Debate, we were impressed with the quality of the Republican candidates. However, there was a notable absence. President Trump was dealing with the rampant Democratic witch hunt, but we are still hopeful for a return to the debate stage. **_What about you, Fellow American?_**

**_Would you like to see President Trump take the debate stage at the next GOP Primary Debate?_**

subject: It's a sad state of affairs in Texas
disclaimer_text: paid for by Jaworski for Texas
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaworskifortexas/elpasowithbetoandjoe-13865261?e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | [ ](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=303bcf1c62&e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | ,

I have said regularly and often that we need a new Attorney General, and the Senate’s acquittal of Ken Paxton is a defeat for the hard working Texans who expect their Attorney General to work for them, and not abuse the public’s trust.

It was clear to me before when I ran for office that Paxton was unfit to serve, and his acquittal is another missed opportunity to restore the rule of law in Texas.

I am deeply upset by the message this acquittal sends, especially to young Texans. Facts and conscience don’t matter. Power and money are all you need to “do the right thing.”

Texans should be outraged by the Senate’s verdict and I predict there will be consequences at the ballot box.

[](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=fc5ded700f&e=5d8d80652b)
_[Read the full article on The Daily Beast.](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=69048238d8&e=5d8d80652b)_ Onward!
####

Joe Jaworski

clean_body: | | | | | | | , I have said regularly and often that we need a new Attorney General, and the Senate’s acquittal of Ken Paxton is a defeat for the hard working Texans who expect their Attorney General to work for them, and not abuse the public’s trust. It was clear to me before when I ran for office that Paxton was unfit to serve, and his acquittal is another missed opportunity to restore the rule of law in Texas. I am deeply upset by the message this acquittal sends, especially to young Texans. Facts and conscience don’t matter. Power and money are all you need to “do the right thing.” Texans should be outraged by the Senate’s verdict and I predict there will be consequences at the ballot box. Onward! Joe Jaworski | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | mailto:info@jaworskifortexas.com | | Pol adv. paid for by Jaworski for Texas Our mailing address is: Jaworski for Texas 2228 Mechanic St Ste 307 Galveston, TX 77550-1881 Want to change how you receive these emails? |

Peter,

As the Sheriff in Pinal county, I found the best way to understand the needs of my community is to be actively involved and interacting with the people I serve.

While I am well-known in my home of Pinal County, **Arizona's significant size, encompassing over 113,000 square miles and a population of more than 7.2 million people,** requires a concerted effort to connect with potential voters.

With such a vast territory and nearly 4.9 million potential voters, it's clear that **I have a substantial task ahead of me** , but the people of Arizona deserve the opportunity to understand exactly who they are sending to represent them in Washington.

**Arizona Deserves Better**
1. Our border is still out of control and needs to be secured

2. Families are suffering from inflation, significantly impacting the cost of living

3. Our elected officials need to be held accountable for policies good and bad

However, connecting with these potential voters, as I have found, doesn't come cheap**;** and given that I drive a Ford F-350, my campaign is spending a lot of money on gas. It's absolutely worth the incurred expense, **with that said, each time I fill up it costs my campaign more than $120!**

Given that I go through a tank of gas a day, **driving around the state contacting voters costs more than $3,700 per month.** **

The average cost for a regular gallon of gas still costs $4.25, ranking Arizona in the 10 most expensive State averages. This is unacceptable and Arizona deserves better!**

I never assume anyone’s ability to make a financial contribution, but if you are able to contribute, even a modest amount, it would be immensely appreciated. **[For instance, a donation as small as $4.25, just about the average cost of a gallon of gas in Arizona, would make a difference.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=bb1c4fee0acd480c92e755357b08005a&_e=uZKjmFBBnp6Afr2gVGxYOLlk8fyGSusYzhaVN2diM1MdcthBAFJh7lbjx-wjfLRvUARjMK1hXBH8Q7J5zbiLQCkLkkz-GVMxLpMk1ZHoEdnmNEGDw6XxvKjVMxetqtvQLzRdC5W-rTy_HWzPlHaK7ZaR6NWde9L0y5aj8WmOO53EqxubwjK8eY_m3Y9Njj2QXQhCtgyrlz-wWHHN366etqq0HEsQ3GCrVn99KYD1HDivBoqs-7bk1ky8dClesnWnn81g__vURh54D_GzWZef3Zn_R_uk8Y-H4DQISlxHU9ZGXTkQYo_91tgx5Dz4qI_OJ2WDH33MlzHDdph7OnuQ3bxGgZYkXbRkrIxYQe34epZolZaMUtHXIDNncIdD_0Y7n3UCiC5RxchDasSKo7oaIw%3D%3D)**

Any contribution you're able to make would be of great assistance.

[**BUY US A GALLON OF GAS

clean_body: I never assume anyone’s ability to make a financial contribution, but if you are able to contribute, even a modest amount, it would be immensely appreciated. | | Peter, As the Sheriff in Pinal county, I found the best way to understand the needs of my community is to be actively involved and interacting with the people I serve. While I am well-known in my home of Pinal County, Arizona's significant size, encompassing over 113,000 square miles and a population of more than 7.2 million people, requires a concerted effort to connect with potential voters. With such a vast territory and nearly 4.9 million potential voters, it's clear that I have a substantial task ahead of me , but the people of Arizona deserve the opportunity to understand exactly who they are sending to represent them in Washington. Arizona Deserves Better 1. Our border is still out of control and needs to be secured 2. Families are suffering from inflation, significantly impacting the cost of living 3. Our elected officials need to be held accountable for policies good and bad However, connecting with these potential voters, as I have found, doesn't come cheap; and given that I drive a Ford F-350, my campaign is spending a lot of money on gas. It's absolutely worth the incurred expense, with that said, each time I fill up it costs my campaign more than $120! Given that I go through a tank of gas a day, driving around the state contacting voters costs more than $3,700 per month. The average cost for a regular gallon of gas still costs $4.25, ranking Arizona in the 10 most expensive State averages. This is unacceptable and Arizona deserves better! I never assume anyone’s ability to make a financial contribution, but if you are able to contribute, even a modest amount, it would be immensely appreciated. Alternatively, a contribution of would buy me two gallons, and a gift of would cover the expenses of a full tank Any contribution you're able to make would be of great assistance. Your support in helping us expand our outreach and to connect with voters would be invaluable. Together, we can make a positive impact and strengthen our campaign. Thank you for your consideration, Sheriff Mark Lamb Republican for U.S. Senate Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media Meet Sheriff Lamb: | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM. Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. | [](http://mgmail.americanpatriotdaily.com/c/eJx00DmWpioYANDVaMjhYyYweFV1ah-KAygIP-C4-ne6885vdMdOjVqCaqcOhGaaA1BobWcYp9woyjiZGFczm8dhEr0wQg-zwaJ1HcGEYg0SgHEiESCtFf8GLdmX1vxLfzcM92HKzvR76mt2sY698w8yMbS-s7Wmhv7XkN-G_Nbcmw39S_8x9PeuvqE_yq4fcRX7hM2GD2NPii6Y6_Q11us0UwEs-oLHpAgO1_VJAq5b8hB4XWC9rbmXQwIYcpea3-3eyutjfNQ6zDovy0HIu7hj2sVoNEwU5qe_ipb9QLHnY31t2eM27JjfF01vlCZDoZNLpRBuQWabBm7XlOrh862IoMSykFd_1YMO7pm00JHC2BAxOdvQn-0Nai91FSmHVQ72lWU9z_0pH0mHfrFt6ASRIKWWbe7GdDnvXRGyYXgJvfN_N2t3owK0YIyA6oTOSE0s6Nz18yHI7kmBRGrMgaNZspEiWA_6fwAAAP__cSmnLg "Headline") Fellow Citizen: The Squad is coming after your guns. In fact, they want to add a 1000% tax on your AR-15 and other semi-auto rifles, and so-called “large-capacity magazines.” **That’s not a misprint. You would be charged a $5,000 tax to buy a $500 AR-15!** They're hoping to price middle-class Americans like you out of owning the same weapons that their own private security personnel use. **Isn't that typical of the Left?** **[If you refuse to allow the Squad to infringe upon our 2nd Amendment Rights, then chip in $25, $50, or $100 today and tell them that “Shall NOT be infringed” means what it says.](http://mgmail.americanpatriotdaily.com/c/eJx00DuSpioYANDVaEgJHwoEBre7q_eBoAKCgvDjY_W3ZvLJT3T0yLVgmLfziAdBRY8x4NaMvYYepNK6FwNW89wDAcrFAhwUnSlv7Ug6Ap3ADGPaE4YwEoL331gw-iVE_yW-G9rJMJ9WyT3KctqjaGn9g9QRWj-aUmID_zXktyG_5ZRqQ__Sfwz83sU38MONS8OVzRM2ExKlTzxsUFf15ShXVfO73EEscuuC29U5y7Xio3ekbPxQNHpeSE2T40I5V_XnXHc-vzoP7zS9UURbFxAmB-gIpJS53YS89HN5RvwaPuWNB13vxKcMCUIYeNruVAJsPOTkejjDeyhjV1FqqPLGennCs8-zWaayqmuqeno_vparIcNsTQM_2xv4nosb4hkcm8zLsqt1f3JiMMnVtGEcCMOMCdaeo46X9d7mgTW0W4O0_u9mGW-UMeSuQxhERPUAdWRUd_EkgsweOWaI6zP0aGFUA8LuA_8HAAD__68Gqsk "If you refuse to allow the Squad to infringe upon our 2nd Amendment Rights, then chip in $25, $50, or $100 today and tell them that “Shall NOT be infringed” means what it says.")** When I see Squad members like Rashida Tlaib sponsoring bills to levy a 1000% tax on our guns, I refuse to stay silent! [](http://mgmail.americanpatriotdaily.com/c/eJx00D2SpigAANDTaEjxjwQG293V90ARAQUR-FQ8_dZMPvmLnh4HLQUa-mVEXFLJECKot6NRFHOEiYRCUIUploobBgeDFdEasd6NGGICJRIIUYYFQEDKgX0jKeiXlOxLfncUqrBkN6uYVM3uqFq5vYH5CP0-2lpTR_7r8G-Hf2tW8wb-pf8Y8vvUvSM_g_Unv4ttYbPhpLSlw4X5vvZ61PuaF9t4siLRNy0vj3CPDpG57VOLovH1eMQ1xMGcJoezkcNjBf3BL43rVCt223MT6yBKymd8rdO8TnPZFjdPxb2PFQYvJhmzEId4q3yijWv9KRkSWrTK7GU5Lo_X7Hkw8betlX3SFZl5149I-VM0p0vb_dZhvjjbkZ_tDUMs1fOUgxeTfUXx1xVbOQWZ1Gr7MHIskBBS9HnU6Xb77goXHYVrUG7_u1nHBxRECoQAEZnAdZD5KOCKsp0Y2JgGJMCgc2DACKoJQP5D_g8AAP__oS6okg "Headline")**That tax is designed to punish you for simply exercising your Constitutional right!** No American should have to take out a loan just to pay an exorbitant tax to legally own a firearm and protect themself. No one would say it’s okay to make you pay for the right to go to church or speak your mind. So why is it okay to tax your 2A rights? **Our Constitutional rights are for all of us! And I refuse to let the Squad tax our 2A rights out of reach!** **[Help me stop these leftists from trampling on our 2A Rights. Donate TODAY!](http://mgmail.americanpatriotdaily.com/c/eJx00DGWpCoUANDVaMjhAfokMPjdfXofCFqAgiioRa3-n5l88htdMw5GIgztPEIvhewAOLR2FAqMYEIw3s10AiYMzAwozFoOyDVv3cgo41QCAoiOIQEi5dB9g0TxJWX3Jb8bQVWYT6dVTKqcbi9Gua0SvYd2G20pqeH_Ney3Yb_lVHol_9J_DP99l63hP4P1R_9kW8NqwyFETbsL-rm3spfn1gs_TMlviCF_1tpLuUhq4-58ONglw-T95tFM78SrVScekS6Mvj-xyCk-LtNPFMXds0qz1pPsH9PNqduGC19L9ujXWRbPZLziunWKD3Q5VnFXDX4t4pzQUgyvuCqY6qL6Z0KhtNDLZcp2PTTEpGtlISdsWD872_Cf9ROGmIvv0xk8TvaD2d93rPlAPqmXbcPYMwREie05mvS4bXO5x0bQV1Bu-7tZxjfJwDOlBLhM5N653jO5o6wHIzamAZAM5gwdWVAYTsBf_P8AAAD___Cap5U "Help me stop these leftists from trampling on our 2A Rights. Donate TODAY!")** The men and women who have died fighting for our country DID NOT make the ultimate sacrifice so that the radical left could fundamentally transform America into an unrecognizable nation governed by tyrannical socialists. **They want us to be like Brazil, who just limited law-abiding citizens to only owning 50 bullets... and that is assuming they’re even allowed to buy a gun in the first place after jumping through red tape and proving a “need” to own one.** Our Constitution clearly requires politicians to seek the consent of the governed, and when it comes to the Second Amendment, we are not consenting to anything other than stopping the radical leftists who want to trample all over it. **[Stand with me and protect our freedoms from the radical left before it’s too late!](http://mgmail.americanpatriotdaily.com/c/eJx00DmWpioUAODVaMjxMgg3MHhVdWofCCogOMHvtPp3uvPOv-iznbIoQdVDBy1yFAAMatdZI_iIaLViWlGNpkelB9Fw1aqesqH2HW0oaxAkABdUEiCISnwDSv6FKL7wu-KNTsPhjV42XQ6_Fqt9fIhZUx07V8pWsf8q-lvR33JoM5N_6T-G_d4lVuxHubC3V3ZPml3aOX-21SdznbGs5TrNuMj1hrkv4TwThXKlp3k8nficw75YlnR-eLqtt3E1Fty53W3fGOehF7qPtKeCBXZGquk-ve_-3hNu4kKjTFKX5sW0OenJW2_1FE1oXl6uEdgwlNLGRKeIHuIVRn2r4_r4QQY3L65f-ce_gifD2BL8KCvaDt5V7Gd-k1pyCe12pCB798ocznN58i5ZrydXp66lEqREWR-d3S4fo8-trHgzJe3j383S3SQDy01DgOFGzpWZNZNzwWenxC2bAkmUPZIgo-SWEQgf9n8AAAD__8OQqJo "Stand with me and protect our freedoms from the radical left before it’s too late!")** God Bless America,

name: Bob Carlstrom
subject: Secure the vote
body:
Friend, are you concerned your vote might not count in this coming presidential election?

| |
---
| | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c23789%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CAfYgfrU0PINUJrPb1j%2bmw&sysid=1)
---
Friend, are you concerned your vote might not count in this coming presidential election? I know I am. In the past two elections we’ve seen rampant voter fraud cancel out the votes of conservatives across the country. We must stop the cheating. And we must do it soon. Friend, that’s why Election Integrity is AMAC Action’s #1 priority ahead of the 2024 presidential election. **[Will you help us?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c23780%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7H1LoBusLaYOLgOAj95Mcw&sysid=1)** Because it’s about time conservatives had a fair chance at beating the Obama-Biden regime once and for all. That’s why you and I need to stand up and act now if we want to restore and protect the integrity of our elections. I’m talking common sense voting reforms. **_NO mass, unverified voting from home ..._**** _ _** **_No remote drop boxes ...._** **_No vote harvesting ..._** **_No manipulation of the vulnerable elderly voters in nursing homes ...._** **_NO extended registration deadlines ..._**** _ _** **_And NO counting late ballots AFTER the polls have closed. _****_ _** **[If you stand with me, I need you to make a special contribution of $24 to secure our elections immediately.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c23781%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FjMDkiwVRIrc3qiPUj9bEA&sysid=1) ** Friend, my name is Bob Carlstrom - President of AMAC Action. You may have heard of AMAC Action before - we’re the #1 most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative seniors like you. If you’ve ever heard of AMAC Action, you may know that unlike the left-leaning AARP, we’ve been fighting AGAINST “Obamacare”, AGAINST “Medicare for All,” and AGAINST all of these radical schemes to “transform” America. That’s why we have 33 chapters and 328 delegates fighting to preserve and protect our Constitution and our traditional values and heritage. AMAC Action and its volunteer advocates pound on the doors of every member of the U.S. House of Representatives and the U.S. Senate to fight for you. Friend, I’m reaching out to you today because we only have one year to make sure our elections are secure for the 2024 presidential election. As you know, the 2024 presidential election is shaping up to be one of the most important elections of our lifetime. If we don’t secure our elections now, we might have to suffer through a fourth term of Obama-Biden that could be even worse than the first three. That’s why AMAC Action needs your help. The only way we can help ensure that our country’s future elections are free, fair, and honest is with the help of generous, patriotic Americans like you. **[That’s why today, I’m asking you to make a contribution of $24 or more to AMAC Action.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c23782%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DI2zxjqx6xtr%2bum3U8X%2bDg&sysid=1) ** **_We the People_** , should decide the **outcomes** of our elections - NOT the “Fake News” media; **_We the People_** , should decide the **rules** of our elections - NOT the Democrats who love to change the rules to suit their needs; **_We the People_** , govern ourselves and won’t surrender our freedom to 3rd-world style Socialist banana-republic tyranny. And if** _We the People, you and I, friend,_** don’t step up right now - our children and grandchildren simply won’t get to experience the same country you and I grew up in. **[Please, make your best possible contribution to AMAC Action today to defend the integrity of our elections.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c23783%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Evyn0Sf8dXWY%2bxWLF43sgA&sysid=1) ** Thank you in advance for your generous support.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
Bob Carlstrom, President AMAC Action
---
[**DONATE**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c23784%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=axrbJEjUDoylyLLmDklGww&sysid=1)
---
| | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c23789%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CAfYgfrU0PINUJrPb1j%2bmw&sysid=1)
---
**Support AMAC Action**
---
AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values.
---
[**Support AMAC Action**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c23795%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=a8r9tYCmDub%2brvipL1oxKg&sysid=1)

body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=0499da65db2911d523c4847307eb8d05aa9e73f7dd1ab532de9868652c5d0474d21d81c67457bb6f7d9d2b0c41874ae90282b8c0dbd4b844a8b0d2991b4ebf39 Peter, There are only TWO DAYS left to enter the RNC’s contest for your chance to win: https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=0499da65db2911d523c4847307eb8d05aa9e73f7dd1ab532de9868652c5d0474d21d81c67457bb6f7d9d2b0c41874ae90282b8c0dbd4b844a8b0d2991b4ebf39 (2) free tickets to Nikki’s SECOND Presidential Debate in California, airfare for two, and hotel accommodations. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=0499da65db2911d523c4847307eb8d05aa9e73f7dd1ab532de9868652c5d0474d21d81c67457bb6f7d9d2b0c41874ae90282b8c0dbd4b844a8b0d2991b4ebf39 CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT AND BE ENTERED Don’t miss this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to witness Nikki in action on the debate stage! https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=0499da65db2911d523c4847307eb8d05aa9e73f7dd1ab532de9868652c5d0474d21d81c67457bb6f7d9d2b0c41874ae90282b8c0dbd4b844a8b0d2991b4ebf39 Just chip in a donation of $1 or more and you’ll be entered for a chance to win! But all entries must be submitted before midnight Tuesday night! https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=0499da65db2911d523c4847307eb8d05aa9e73f7dd1ab532de9868652c5d0474d21d81c67457bb6f7d9d2b0c41874ae90282b8c0dbd4b844a8b0d2991b4ebf39 CHIP IN $1 OR MORE TODAY Nikki Haley is beyond ready to take the stage again and share her vision for America’s future. We’re hoping you’ll step up today to support Nikki ahead of the big night AND maybe even win a chance to witness it in person. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=0499da65db2911d523c4847307eb8d05aa9e73f7dd1ab532de9868652c5d0474d21d81c67457bb6f7d9d2b0c41874ae90282b8c0dbd4b844a8b0d2991b4ebf39 Contribute whatever you can before the contest ends in just TWO days! Thank you again for supporting Nikki Haley and her fight to save America! Team Haley https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=8090bcbfa66ed217567732cd137f2d18516e3582caf075e1fed1a3645ad240ee4a3b383e01a2611a5b0bd4b6725bd94953bb0fc1e42471c083addfda7476da18 https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=8090bcbfa66ed217567732cd137f2d18516e3582caf075e1fed1a3645ad240ee4a3b383e01a2611a5b0bd4b6725bd94953bb0fc1e42471c083addfda7476da18 GET YOUR SHIRT https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=8090bcbfa66ed2178e14a4d0eb81d475b044221e71538403cf28eb873179bc8c4afeba7b8170eb7accb330c7246fe4c62985274bf8b77265e6fb6523624468f2 https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=8090bcbfa66ed2178e14a4d0eb81d475b044221e71538403cf28eb873179bc8c4afeba7b8170eb7accb330c7246fe4c62985274bf8b77265e6fb6523624468f2 VOLUNTEER More About Nikki Haley https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=8090bcbfa66ed2172ece3fae48df6797453613877a929b639d0670a23c305eff29c735523ca1a74ee4cfa087cc3ea7b61bb45c386d6396baeaea6f9d26b40c3c My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States. I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago – an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something – that we do love this country. I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A. I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I’m running for President because we have a country to save! I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor” because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. And I’ll do it as your next President. As President, I’ll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington’s spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America’s future. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=8090bcbfa66ed2172ece3fae48df6797453613877a929b639d0670a23c305eff29c735523ca1a74ee4cfa087cc3ea7b61bb45c386d6396baeaea6f9d26b40c3c Will you join me today and help me save our country? https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=8090bcbfa66ed2172ece3fae48df6797453613877a929b639d0670a23c305eff29c735523ca1a74ee4cfa087cc3ea7b61bb45c386d6396baeaea6f9d26b40c3c DONATE NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, CONTRIBUTION, OR TEXT MESSAGE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN. name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: What do all these signs and symbols mean for you?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjYwLThkZWNkZWMxZjJhNDRiMTU5ZDg3OTcyNGFkYjQzMTY0IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS5wdHYub3JnL2ZpbmFsLWNvbnF1ZXN0LWdlbmVyb3VzLWdpZnQta2l0LTE_c291cmNlX2NvZGU9V0VCJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249ZmluYWxfY29ucXVlc3QmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfRkFMUjQyOTE4In0/nnNxD7xNTeYYRM-0347_Bw)
---
Hello Friend,Do you ever despair that Jesus will never return?_When we all get to Heaven, what a day of rejoicing that will be!__When we all see Jesus, we'll sing and shout the victory!_ The words of this old hymn say it perfectly ... Christ's return is going to be glorious!**But between now and then, how should we live**? What does God's Word say about end times? As the world grows increasingly sinful ... **what should our response be?**
---
| | When I have those kinds of questions, I turn to the book of Revelation, which I've found helps provide answers and strength in these dark days.And today, I'm pleased to offer you my verse-by-verse study of the book of Revelation entitled _Final Conquest._ Final Conquest is my first commentary on the book of Revelation. It's all about the return of Jesus Christ, the most hope-filled event in human history.This book will help you face the future with confidence! God doesn't want you to live in fear. Final Conquest will unpack God's plan as never before - you'll be encouraged!
---
| [](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjYwLThkZWNkZWMxZjJhNDRiMTU5ZDg3OTcyNGFkYjQzMTY0IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS5wdHYub3JnL2ZpbmFsLWNvbnF1ZXN0LWdlbmVyb3VzLWdpZnQta2l0LTE_c291cmNlX2NvZGU9V0VCJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249ZmluYWxfY29ucXVlc3QmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfRkFMUjQyOTE4In0/WMb2Fx3Q2fspAuoLrABt5w)
---
| | With your generous donation to _Pathway to Victory_ \-- to help keep our ministry strong, for you and your family, and for listeners and viewers across the country--I will send you a copy of _Final Conquest_ for free!You can make your most generous donation here: **[https://secure.ptv.org/final-conquest-generous-gift-kit-1](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjYwLThkZWNkZWMxZjJhNDRiMTU5ZDg3OTcyNGFkYjQzMTY0IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS5wdHYub3JnL2ZpbmFsLWNvbnF1ZXN0LWdlbmVyb3VzLWdpZnQta2l0LTE_c291cmNlX2NvZGU9V0VCJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249ZmluYWxfY29ucXVlc3QmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfRkFMUjQyOTE4In0/kmWWNAEscCyTyHNV9ky4ig)** One day soon the darkness will pass...and our long-awaited King of kings and Lord of lords will return and make His final conquest.Until that moment, we are focusing our hope on Christ and working together to proclaim the gospel and expand His coming kingdom. Dr. Robert JeffressSenior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas

name: Trump News HQ
subject: the enemy within
body:
I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them.

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjp1bp07riik8soii643b9v9sme5gd65d7svcqdo_rp22sh2s8i66p71cjgm2o76cdh2bs)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztu9sk5g6oifjrr3af4i66aqbguauim76dp2n6n8_rp22sh2s8i66p71cjgm2o76cdh2bs)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpq351k87rt2g26a1kl2atfe8adhkf9tb2b450eo_rp22sh2s8i66p71cjgm2o76cdh2bs)**

---

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing up shop
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
So, I’m going to be blunt with you, Friend.

| |
---
| | | I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.
**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**
But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.
**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv1d3cov1720voa4hkra4mcb6ul55egn2dhkndbg_rp22sh2s8i66p71cjgm2o71cdh2bs)
---

So, I'm going to be blunt with you, Friend. **[If you chip in just $5 right now,](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8m6m6ah26747u71qbithk46jh0q6ee77d48kbmg_rp22sh2s8i66p71cjgm2o71cdh2bs "If you chip in just $5 right now,")** I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden's plan to destroy our nation.

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?

---
| | [DONATE TODAY](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd3n7aavsem0bhqtrne61du5bm0f3uv29daq6e4o_rp22sh2s8i66p71cjgm2o71cdh2bs)
---

You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

---
| | [DONATE TODAY](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1th8ifbtkvnnsl1au4ecfpcbvhmen5bao5hif30_rp22sh2s8i66p71cjgm2o71cdh2bs)
---
| |
* * *
Ryan Zinke is a fifth generation Montanan who has dedicated his life to serving our great nation. Ryan is a decorated U.S. Navy SEAL officer who retired after 23 years of military service. name: American Action News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2di9cdbtmou7g0q7fshdomp1srhbamdajfns4l0_rp22sh2s8i66p71cjgm1ob2c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars."
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8djpmqtdhrn85ebsodsqb6oakuuoogfu072o36g_rp22sh2s8i66p71cjgm1ob2c3h2bs) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjkmkb7bd29k896gdag5qs3h3jnvdtor982kqtn0_rp22sh2s8i66p71cjgm1ob2c3h2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.
**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**

body:

**The Truth About
The Coming Crisis** This might be your only warning... According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite the severity of the situation, the mainstream media has chosen to remain silent. And our own government has ignored the dire warnings of industry experts. Experts like a fourth-generation American farmer who warns of the impending crisis: **"Food shortages are coming."** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Well, no need to worry anymore... When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing up shop
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
So, I’m going to be blunt with you, Friend.

| |
---
| | | I’m at my wits’ end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don’t do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.
**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump’s Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I’m also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**
But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.
**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL’s that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I’m one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can’t beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c677815%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XKrdPDXo9gE4I%2bwqsV92Gg&sysid=1)
---

So, I’m going to be blunt with you, Friend. **[If you chip in just $5 right now,](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c677816%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FLPljvC%2fmkK1FQpksv8ISA&sysid=1 "If you chip in just $5 right now,")** I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden’s plan to destroy our nation.

I’m humbly asking you, as a warrior who’s fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?

---
| | [DONATE TODAY](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c677817%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=syE0k2KFcfnwiXcQFhjpfw&sysid=1)
---

You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

---
| | [DONATE TODAY](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c677817%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=syE0k2KFcfnwiXcQFhjpfw&sysid=1)
---
| |
* * *
Ryan Zinke is a fifth generation Montanan who has dedicated his life to serving our great nation. Ryan is a decorated U.S. Navy SEAL officer who retired after 23 years of military service. After the military, Ryan served two terms as a State Senator, was twice elected as Montana’s Congressman, and served two years as U.S. Secretary of the Interior under President Trump. Now after a couple quiet years spent with his family, he is serving again in Congress to help save America from threats we face both foreign and domestic.

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: How do you uphold your religious liberty in today's climate?
body:
I'm reaching out today about an important issue that's close to my heart

|
---
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpat13t72hgq22efhb2dtva7q5profsfd7ji56dg_rp22sh2s8i66p71cjim0oj4chh2bs)
---
| Dear Fellow Patriot,

I hope this message finds you well. I'm reaching out today about an important issue that's close to my heart and, I believe, relevant to all of us.

In the current climate, our religious liberty, a foundational tenet of our nation, faces an increasing number of challenges. These are especially concerning for those of us who hold to biblical and faith-based values. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk7bh0dmcqhed16d9iedafcqdhov46f4sd4tcss0_rp22sh2s8i66p71cjim0oj4chh2bs)
With societal shifts and new legal precedents, including the recently passed Respect for Marriage Act, the ability to practice and express our faith openly may face unprecedented threats.

These changes may allow the federal government to exert pressure on schools, businesses, and organizations that adhere to their religious beliefs. I fear this might lead to intensified legal persecution against those wishing to live according to their faith.

As engaged citizens, it's crucial we understand this situation and its potential impact on our religious freedom.

Please take a moment to share your insights by completing this 2-minute survey: [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdos2u4d7562kiuq8r4b6jva1t3qm4b2a3ld32jo_rp22sh2s8i66p71cjim0oj4chh2bs)

Your contribution will guide our efforts to alert fellow Americans of the threats to our religious liberty and defend our First Amendment rights.

Let's uphold the integrity of our Constitution and protect the pillars that make our nation great: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Thank you for your attention to this matter.

Yours sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c23703%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DBQjgklu8Bb3Qo%2ffvLe5Lw&sysid=1)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c23703%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DBQjgklu8Bb3Qo%2ffvLe5Lw&sysid=1)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing up shop
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
So, I’m going to be blunt with you, Friend.

| |
---
| | | I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.
**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**
But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.
**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfh58a62sbueiqjee1hsbudp1kv4euflavgueoag_rp22sh2s8i66p71cjimco74cth2bs)
---

So, I'm going to be blunt with you, Friend. **[If you chip in just $5 right now,](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4ur60e8itqh65d8huca7eqaqkhqc5rl1nk5knmg_rp22sh2s8i66p71cjimco74cth2bs "If you chip in just $5 right now,")** I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden's plan to destroy our nation.

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?

---
| | [DONATE TODAY](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5kghepefgutv0pdt3ojqcec9e779p7avm811bn0_rp22sh2s8i66p71cjimco74cth2bs)
---

You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

---

* * *
Ryan Zinke is a fifth generation Montanan who has dedicated his life to serving our great nation. Ryan is a decorated U.S. Navy SEAL officer who retired after 23 years of military service. After the military, Ryan served two terms as a State Senator, was twice elected as Montana's Congressman, and served two years as U.S. Secretary of the Interior under President Trump. Now after a couple quiet years spent with his family, he is serving again in Congress to help save America from threats we face both foreign and domestic.

name: 4Patriots
subject: Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning...

**The Truth About
The Coming Crisis** This might be your only warning... According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite the severity of the situation, the mainstream media has chosen to remain silent. And our own government has ignored the dire warnings of industry experts. Experts like a fourth-generation American farmer who warns of the impending crisis: **"Food shortages are coming."** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Well, no need to worry anymore... When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of best-selling survival food kits.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c677827%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=f5Li6obZsdCSnhyVJxbtxA&sysid=1) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. Stock up now on these survival food kits while you can.
---

American Update

name: Shift WA
subject: Top News: Homelessness in Lacey vs. Olympia
body:
Lacey City Councilmember Lenny Greenstein joined us for this week's Newsmaker Interview. Greenstein discussed the different approaches to homelessness between the neighboring cities of Olympia and Lacey. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62256291:W_0BNRDNw:m:1:2610672541:DA2134AEF6E11C93C093153A1C18B1BF:r "Shift Washington")
---
| The team here at Shift WA has been working to shift the political debate in Washington state since 2013. We've spent the last decade providing people like you with the facts and perspectives needed to hopefully make a difference in your community. So, as always, we will help keep you-up-to-date with an item or two of interest from your own backyard. Read on...** ****This week 's Newsmaker Interview...**This week, Jason Rantz, a KTTH radio host and national FOX News contributor, discussed his upcoming book, "What's Killing America, Inside the Radical Left's Tragic Destruction of our Cities," set to release on September 26th. Rantz delved into the failures of liberal policies, emphasizing the impact on Seattle and other American cities in terms of crime, homelessness, drug addiction, and taxes under one-party liberal control. He offered insights into the content of his book and his goals in writing it, addressing the activities of the Radical Left and suggesting ways for moderates and conservatives to counter these policies. Rantz also highlighted his perspective on media double standards, criticism of certain liberal arguments, and his stance on specific policies such as "housing first" and Universal Basic Income, while hinting at the possibility of future books. [**Read more.**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62256292:W_0BNRDNw:m:1:2610672541:DA2134AEF6E11C93C093153A1C18B1BF:r)** ****A survey worth participating in ...**We here at Shift WA value input from our members in shaping our coverage and discussions of Washington State politics. So, we are seeking suggestions from our readers for upcoming Newsmaker Interviews! A weekly feature on our website, our Newsmaker Interviews provide unique insights into state politics. Please take a moment to let us know who you would most like to see interviewed. **_[Take the survey](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62256293:W_0BNRDNw:m:1:2610672541:DA2134AEF6E11C93C093153A1C18B1BF:r)_.** **This week 's top story...**The Democrats overseeing Washington state's public school system may have underestimated the lasting impact of prolonged school closures during the Covid-19 pandemic. Nearly half of the families in Washington who adopted homeschooling during the pandemic have continued with it, indicating a significant shift from the public school system. The data reveals a substantial increase in registered homeschoolers in the state, peaking during the pandemic, and the accompanying article discusses the financial implications for local schools due to this 40% surge in homeschooled children over four years. [**Read this story and more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62256294:W_0BNRDNw:m:1:2610672541:DA2134AEF6E11C93C093153A1C18B1BF:r)**.** **In case you missed it ...**Camas City Councilmember Leslie Marshall Lewallen joined us for our previous week's Newsmaker Interview. A conservative GOP candidate in Washington's 3rd Congressional District, Lewallen aims to regain the longtime Republican-held seat after progressive Marie Gluesenkamp Perez's victory in 2022. Other Republican contenders in the race include Leslie French and Joe Kent, who previously lost and made unsupported claims of election fraud. In her recent interview, Lewallen discussed her reasons for running in 2024, her campaign's top issues, the need to replace Rep. Gluesenkamp Perez, and the significance of receiving an endorsement from 2022 Republican U.S. Senate candidate Tiffany Smiley. [**Read more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62256295:W_0BNRDNw:m:1:2610672541:DA2134AEF6E11C93C093153A1C18B1BF:r)**.** **This week 's bit of inspiration...**For many families, school is back in session and that means fall is rolling in. Take a moment to enjoy former U.S. Congressman Rod Chandler's beautiful photograph of the Pacific Northwest in fall colors. | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62256296:W_0BNRDNw:m:1:2610672541:DA2134AEF6E11C93C093153A1C18B1BF:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14294613&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/oW_0BNRDNw).
---

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing up shop
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
So, I'm going to be blunt with you, Friend.

| |
---
| | | I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.
**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**
But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.
**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: Joy Behar and her co-hosts on The View are at it again | | Fellow American, Joy Behar is at it again. She was on The View calling young Republicans, "dumb" and "liars." Joy Behar embodies the modern left's playbook: talk a big game, name-call, and then cower from actual debate. I'm sure it'll be pretty easy to take on a "dumb" guy. Fellow American, | I truly believe we will win this race based actually debating the issues. We need meaningful discussion instead of 10 second sound bites. That's why I've taken on Don Lemon, CNN, MSNBC, and the mainstream media. I know we can debate the issues and WIN. We're running a different type of campaign. We aren't bowing down to the donor class in Washington or the Establishment. I have invested my family's own money into this race. I am not going to mega donors, asking for 5 or 10 million dollars to fund our ground game. I am relying on you. I need your help to take on the mainstream media and radical Left. Thanks for standing with me, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. name: 4Patriots
subject: Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning...

**The Truth About
The Coming Crisis** This might be your only warning... According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite the severity of the situation, the mainstream media has chosen to remain silent. And our own government has ignored the dire warnings of industry experts. Experts like a fourth-generation American farmer who warns of the impending crisis: **"Food shortages are coming."** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Well, no need to worry anymore... When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of best-selling survival food kits.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0958b6c2e20540699f5cd0f7c782d04b&_e=HpCTM1kXNTDBhaUVhi5ffZVabXtrsJJs7s3AjB8zx4F_q07H43Bq6ShaB1HG-bAM6teffbNqK0mM8RdBjtowqb1V40kGtnSH1wBgoyJVPGHsopCuWIgDlF-w_L4vrvmpy5Mpc_hdPFRqTxIRNDDGUQ6mofC-xh_BEGqMlg-W1R562RFnnhwRfQ73_w0N_rVgbdmmY6D0nvGQGn8b3R9_E3y6H6kkeOsAsjdVu0V4FJZTlJw3uw07-A1iRt3h6SofMvQ6XBfkwHApygRN-xk8mS1-zpEZESKhTBdOFAykmlI%3D) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. Stock up now on these survival food kits while you can.

name: David Horowitz
subject: Barack Obama’s revolution
body:
I don't say this to shock or scare you - I say it because it's true.

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don't say this to shock or scare you - I say it because it's true. _What we see today didn 't happen overnight. It's the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **... and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I'd know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ - radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my "comrades" made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan - then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I've dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn't tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That's why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** - and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I'm asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I'll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a3f5d2f27cfa4f258cea483dbb88e3e3&_e=kTpWtOy9lobOfcEjoSL3rU3HcAPXOywZ7DmJYco54hV54pwVjqVDt_99rf-HArMoFqhYtjQHvfpVR4WechqDBJNz9Vyijgj0rEgQ6Vupkt2nua-V6fJQ2V9wcE59IaQPFwlQLYgn5Rt8Y4CAVyV7IIkyIATXSG0RXMzyYZikO1QCzwjTkKVGjp8MiFR3AfJZrn-5j-gE0W48G9i2q6RG9VKaKB0FAmV3YnBnQcwNrIR0qzC4Rpp3Xp2RvQP52YsLFzh6WBmwNNNIVJ9mUL-K-z_7LnEQ-UfbOOzRxN2TrPa2GwRvs1mPKys5EjiDnehrdsr-VShllPmxdyhU00jQI0VYOKmvGAZ6KCS5VLUHtXTWVhIa2bfefiDFhdevRxm3e9lswl7haIuly9QzPdC_7A%3D%3D)** When you think of "the enemy within" you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn't be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we've seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making - but most of the American people have no clue what we're up against. **That 's why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state - and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as "white supremacists" and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... "A Great Book" - Dinesh D'Souza "_The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life." - Mark Levin "David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation." Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within -- and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We've reached the point in our history that will decide our future - and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That's why I'll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left's evil agenda to every American patriot.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a3f5d2f27cfa4f258cea483dbb88e3e3&_e=kTpWtOy9lobOfcEjoSL3rU3HcAPXOywZ7DmJYco54hV54pwVjqVDt_99rf-HArMoFqhYtjQHvfpVR4WechqDBJNz9Vyijgj0rEgQ6Vupkt2nua-V6fJQ2V9wcE59IaQPFwlQLYgn5Rt8Y4CAVyV7IIkyIATXSG0RXMzyYZikO1QCzwjTkKVGjp8MiFR3AfJZrn-5j-gE0W48G9i2q6RG9VKaKB0FAmV3YnBnQcwNrIR0qzC4Rpp3Xp2RvQP52YsL1gKmREa2PE8LX1QpqeJ4xR3M4NVssOaeOyz3UHwDE7nF54wd5TqAGyKUifDz3KHHtKLTC0-D4VFBAU9GQgmaNaDU18TkTddTTRH3wAPJP5Jm_rIEdkEOtkiOjY8Y13ZhecBB7JtvzuPG6CE_ANfVdQ%3D%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don't simply disagree with us about how to make our country better - they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama's own words "radically transform" America. **And they don 't care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it's up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I'll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a3f5d2f27cfa4f258cea483dbb88e3e3&_e=kTpWtOy9lobOfcEjoSL3rU3HcAPXOywZ7DmJYco54hV54pwVjqVDt_99rf-HArMoFqhYtjQHvfpVR4WechqDBJNz9Vyijgj0rEgQ6Vupkt2nua-V6fJQ2V9wcE59IaQPFwlQLYgn5Rt8Y4CAVyV7IIkyIATXSG0RXMzyYZikO1QCzwjTkKVGjp8MiFR3AfJZrn-5j-gE0W48G9i2q6RG9VKaKB0FAmV3YnBnQcwNrIR0qzC4Rpp3Xp2RvQP52YsLC4REW5naLCgfGfXy8z3CZ5o8wh6PU00-cFhoV5JLJTjqYFk_nFFIgG1IUHExetc8oswQP3s-sPFNH8YSsxcWX56sF4ahjovMz-dc6nNEE_PoX5xNZpgHTtHO1dmFvQmWOBCwLIQo9D4R2HzDG3gFkg%3D%3D)**

name: Full Mag News
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2fc03ba2242d4a3a97352f4491e4c559&_e=xCUGPMgy74egyi_U1oCZnviChYaULnCKMS2_4eAqsnnUskhOzqagw3L-ug68yt13hHb0Xr-RiqaBTTu3h_k1ESLYyAnELma-KsN1t7EPcschm8FjOPdPGa9JOpvJuUyY3ZxWcYaB9ghqkxw9NoTfBZsgHxo8kWrfmilfvuWF-rZAExbBaPHKY-0w1x-OEe1J_xczoRTflN1MTXPZJrqXKvaaony3D3qeAivg8rX7AP8FJkXvFXHtitO6jCEtXb3kQOi6kqVU213Kurftq75JcDJCleiq5wgNVeujHmVsz3QvHmwjVEU9CQVql_PbrJh8zI16iyREPAje0xRypIF0avosXp-17SRmjBuvL0xV-5cAFv2ZAXVs-dK-dg9CYgSH4IrIlSyDjShnpbvMHXUU529D7xBMKYdY2D98A6JwtZY%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars."
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2fc03ba2242d4a3a97352f4491e4c559&_e=xCUGPMgy74egyi_U1oCZnviChYaULnCKMS2_4eAqsnnUskhOzqagw3L-ug68yt13hHb0Xr-RiqaBTTu3h_k1ESLYyAnELma-KsN1t7EPcschm8FjOPdPGa9JOpvJuUyY3ZxWcYaB9ghqkxw9NoTfBZsgHxo8kWrfmilfvuWF-rZAExbBaPHKY-0w1x-OEe1J_xczoRTflN1MTXPZJrqXKvaaony3D3qeAivg8rX7AP8FJkXvFXHtitO6jCEtXb3kQOi6kqVU213Kurftq75JcJhzTG1KT012WvX5-RKbLlaGckWsoRj4g_6XXy-rvhFFwF1ZboiDoNMaCvZCMCFjntzZXYmklhWsYPTUQnht89GJ4FLOMCs1OXOuRnQ-jsznsrBbgQkNYJbsjYJseqBV1uI46M7DpzXNkQU3ve6BFSw%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2fc03ba2242d4a3a97352f4491e4c559&_e=xCUGPMgy74egyi_U1oCZnviChYaULnCKMS2_4eAqsnnUskhOzqagw3L-ug68yt13hHb0Xr-RiqaBTTu3h_k1ESLYyAnELma-KsN1t7EPcschm8FjOPdPGa9JOpvJuUyY3ZxWcYaB9ghqkxw9NoTfBZsgHxo8kWrfmilfvuWF-rZAExbBaPHKY-0w1x-OEe1J_xczoRTflN1MTXPZJrqXKvaaony3D3qeAivg8rX7AP8FJkXvFXHtitO6jCEtXb3kQOi6kqVU213Kurftq75JcFTthToo15uZCd2K02Z8G7SXU5SlduDCHwtMQqfn2u8uTF1A8k00M0VoS12vFH-XWRRf41oEQu9iqHN6lM7bhUjTK9lAMXPs6uRZkOIhdvG0UWwxy1llu9uJxYJ1sRmtuUAv-IcRbr2Hj0eV6D2WOZU%3D)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
