Thank you, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Approve permanent protection for designated sea turtle habitat
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1990774?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Tell NOAA to approve the Chumash Heritage National Marine Sanctuary and permanently protect 5,600 square miles of California’s coastal waters! Sign the petition now >> ** Off California’s central coast, cool waters from the north meet warm southern currents and create a nutrient-rich zone, fueling a diverse marine ecosystem. Here, you might see **Southern Sea otters** floating on their bellies, **sea turtles** lugging themselves across the sand, or **snowy egrets** soaring overhead. These waters and coastline hold significant cultural and spiritual importance to the Indigenous Chumash people – **but oil and gas drilling in these waters could DESTROY this beautiful ecosystem. [Please, Friend, tell the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration to approve the proposed marine sanctuary and STOP oil and gas development from destroying this special ecosystem!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1990775?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** ***Your Signature is Missing, Friend*** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1990776?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Chumash Heritage is the first ever Tribal nominated marine sanctuary. If approved, **it would protect now-submerged ancient villages and traditional ceremonial sites**. It would also set a precedent for ocean conservation – opening the door for more perspectives from Indigenous communities with generations of knowledge.
The Chumash people have been leading this fight from the very beginning. Some Chumash elders have been fighting their _**entire lives**_ to protect this special place. Now we’re on the verge of making it happen -- but **we need your help to close the deal!** [**Amplify Tribal voices and send your message to NOAA: protect our oceans, special places, and wildlife from oil drilling!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1990777?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1990776?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Marcie Keever
Oceans and vessels program director,
Friends of the Earth Action**
|

name: Shawn Harris via Blue Amp Action
subject: Let’s unseat Marjorie Taylor Greene
body:
I need your help
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T33a4426c-c944-448c-8365-a4b26f0eddfb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter – My name is Shawn Harris. I am a recently-retired United States Army Brigadier General, a grandfather, and a proud son of Georgia – I am a Democrat running for Congress to unseat Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene. My opponent is likely the reason you’ve heard of our campaign, but I want to take an opportunity to introduce myself and explain why I am looking to take her on. I was born and raised on my family’s farm in Blakely, Georgia. When I was a child, my father was killed by a drunk driver, leaving my family in grief and threatening our livelihood. In the wake of our tragedy, the community came together to harvest our crops and lift my family up with love, faith, and support. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T52340432-eb49-4258-85fa-602ce2cc33cb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I learned a lot from that experience, lessons that stick with me today – the power of a connected community, the importance of dedicated service, and the significance of giving a hand to those in need. Not only did we successfully harvest that year’s crop, but with the support of friends, family, and strangers, we planted seeds of future prosperity and recovery. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T613343cd-af5e-4575-871e-20d89af0f7fd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I carried these foundational values with me into my career serving the United States in uniform over the last 40 years. Now that I’ve retired from the armed services, I am faced with a choice: do I enjoy my retirement or continue my service to my country in another way, with a run for Congress? I cannot sit by while Congresswoman Greene continues to betray Georgia values and embarrass our country at home and abroad. It is my patriotic duty to continue serving my country, to challenge Ms. Greene to answer for her divisiveness, and to restore dignity to northern Georgia. [There are too many reasons to count why northern Georgia needs a change, but I hope in this message I gave you at least one to support me. If you’re on board, will you make a donation right now to help us launch our campaign?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T37480902-0b86-4b90-aa03-60f6261aaef9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tee34bde0-b80c-4948-ae53-71fdb2d3bf1f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| We will be in touch more as we get our campaign up and running. But please know you are central to our success. The only way we win this race is by working together in the same way the community did after the death of my father, by building a campaign of humility, dignity, and respect from the grassroots. Thank you for being on our team. Let’s get to work, [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdd98edc8-4877-41ac-88e1-01c2c80818a1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Shawn Harris
Candidate – Georgia 14
United States House of Representatives
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taf0105e5-7865-4a4d-ab62-a458b92b0807/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/yyz_em_90do_harris230917-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=1475ce91-ce31-42a8-a0d5-6d678636179c&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=1475ce91-ce31-42a8-a0d5-6d678636179c&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: 4Patriots
subject: Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning...

**The Truth About
The Coming Crisis** This might be your only warning... According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite the severity of the situation, the mainstream media has chosen to remain silent. And our own government has ignored the dire warnings of industry experts. Experts like a fourth-generation American farmer who warns of the impending crisis: **"Food shortages are coming."** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Well, no need to worry anymore... When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of best-selling survival food kits.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=88d649d374684904958674b95bc4476a&_e=I7JjaLuECHHFp0d4BmAanDFbdTJa57NJNsTGH8UsJl61k2AFH-81e3nH9Wrf8p1Kw76vXJLCgdoY0Fy7h8kCkoDFHzPXVMkNXtyX0Me4aMcKPXRBwNMxpqBu0430CoBCb1vUEMg--ukOYhwzkqx5Sdku3QXkFhn3ql9ZenVA8-LbqFXtyfPB00YvFRtB1jJxJmbTML51_KyOUfIubX8qT-rKI72y_BxN8k5cRy6xTdnAKcXWgRS5P2ZNOvC_xXigONmE8HJRvtTxzVprTaI0YLTdTm9vAIylOXEASWuQgX0%3D) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. Stock up now on these survival food kits while you can.

name: Angela Ferrell-Zabala, Everytown for Gun Safety
subject: Send your message: Tell ATF to close these dangerous gun sale loopholes
body:
Gun sellers have exploited these loopholes for decades. We need ATF to close them. | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTDECWgxy79ZJRdvCCil7G2trbD8AC6oEwe0Iddnw2f1eji771XXPR63iY09RCXCiRzQ1CursZdWcQMp9e9KtmXW8YsHTx8NGRb96oC4m-gwVeBvG_fq-71G7merzYnQf0b6HbYyjXlS9D9rOiwySz6QB8aoO4eaW3ioY7GDOFpFzdbKGEsYkngMd2Dnf8x7lGwxWT1dYuK6-xloSZEC4We1_GCOK4aZGfWI0DhNI1zC52zXfuYzudB3BG3-sRR3byLfM0u6_Ma2nAfuTbjNnz2tSYmGdHmG4QZZqRlOKqoV73w6Egyfm0bO2NK-ObdidK7Yn4BRMvgw23XkdFYYPToJlohKj3NlPFice8q1IAS_h_hHNA0ghuB2TS6VhXD2OvFNuCQgLVYVv9a-Vvsyt3bI/3zo/pz9-jrc2Q3ezrIVjgZ-1tw/h0/Lf7jYuAngWf7hC7DraUICNRGEocEPPIXbIm_bg0klrA)

**Friend** ,**I**** have some urgent and exciting news: **The Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives (ATF) is following through on President Biden's commitment to move us closer to background checks on all gun sales. In a newly proposed regulation, ATF is setting a clear and common-sense standard for when gun sellers must become licensed dealers and run background checks. It’s the next step in building on the life-saving Bipartisan Safer Communities Act we passed last summer. **But for ATF to finish the job on this life-saving action, it needs to know the public supports closing these dangerous loopholes—and we only have a short time to make our voices heard and make sure the gun industry doesn’t drown us out.** [**Submit your comment today in just two clicks: Tell ATF to close these dangerous loopholes. Gun sales online and at gun shows must have background checks!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTDECWgxy79ZJRdvCCil7G2trbD8AC6oEwe0Iddnw2f1eji771XXPR63iY09RCXCiRzQ1CursZdWcQMp9e9KtmXUEByXkoNJByauX4Z7PMbVAi89WmyNRbCZtGiY_aPtiminBh_F8S8FpJgC8EZIbC2B03hIc8pwRK19jwnR1RJjw0FOJ5-NJ370yNdycg-n9t8Qlm5Vpn1fscj9b1ilH9i68ct-p6lmA-gQnu-ipTC3yfa2bEH_OFnrj8Qbnuwg4oitzk-MEKD1dnd4Xlrc5HdOWs3rEMQ6ULMKIzyRMx62HI6C2ya2W9sw630UiZceDiOc7NKIF4Q0FsdE7sOJglyZBlqOla9ESGN-AZlxul8SgrnT9hHr_PU7CQ85Z9sg5c_gwFYP9mE2stIP4z3D3gCg/3zo/pz9-jrc2Q3ezrIVjgZ-1tw/h1/_Z90NmqbXlEo8JuOgYqrmU-CJKkXibLeDEkU4rqKSm0)
---
[ SUBMIT MY COMMENT ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTDECWgxy79ZJRdvCCil7G2trbD8AC6oEwe0Iddnw2f1eji771XXPR63iY09RCXCiRzQ1CursZdWcQMp9e9KtmXV411oAJqw18hTBM4UpvrDQl6zUMhzblEaD_UVzReudwTr0lI0Wa8hWvMV2y-qM_xdgPAfcKauN_i_ZRhHfEhGIMnp_ntMNwa7nsSjUCVFkUrYpszfPvrFXSBWSToYY-zsDZMeF-usTECFh_bVR9btXZj5uMAoFc_-AsGBaWyKLS4WF-mx-hl48X84YZ42F5n_RaPw38K41U98tsmIVH9jX50UBrTFhhdpISpxCQOwcj2AmfnvQnN6_l2Jbuo0ZGCEaDiTCHEqqhUgz8rOPtOqWTvWZDjxYcbIzuuL3NYCBMfou6yn2sJ2T82iIOI4_yLA/3zo/pz9-jrc2Q3ezrIVjgZ-1tw/h2/y2-l47Ewr7cLVfRW7fvq_4PhVr9Y_2tIlU2QW63Myb4)
---
For decades, gun sellers have exploited loopholes in federal law that let them sell guns online and at gun shows without conducting background checks. It’s a recipe for disaster that worsens our country’s gun violence crisis. This proposed regulation goes directly to these loopholes that the American people have been trying to close for years. It expands background checks to guns offered for sale online or at gun shows, keeps weapons out of the hands of dangerous people, and ultimately saves lives. ATF’s proposed regulation makes it clear: If you’re offering guns for sale online or at a gun show, then you’re presumed to be trying to make a profit. You need to get a license to do business and run background checks on your customers. We need this kind of life-saving action to stop firearms from ending up in the hands of people who can’t pass a background check. And once again, we’re seeing how the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act is having a lasting impact. Because everyday Americans spoke up and made their voices heard, Congress passed that historic gun safety law last year, giving the Biden-Harris Administration and ATF the tools to help close these deadly loopholes. Thanks to people like you, this regulation is a possibility. **We can’t let the gun lobby take this away from us—so let’s make sure it happens.**[**Submit your comment today telling ATF that you support closing these online and gun show loopholes.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTDECWgxy79ZJRdvCCil7G2trbD8AC6oEwe0Iddnw2f1eji771XXPR63iY09RCXCiRzQ1CursZdWcQMp9e9KtmXVhlMWOMoD6Zc02YophlcJND4_rs3zcJXkCvrv0SYZsSckixTS1oStoftJzREVGqFTOmgPt8yQNNwQGfkbfoPZrlpRWkNw3eWwmhKdlXh_69JlCx5nWiHvAlCBS3l3q6Aasw6fDFkps2e4UBFW3qXZRMIp-S6mjhmQ2EljQlWsP99kl8KXjj1mM_5FOIFvqewWWGCn-EpWR3A5Lrn_iexU7HHk05xWiIbULsEzMHN_5-ouo9sML6W9qv_UmepKw3Q6O9OWoaNkTUIDvkjJ2Th6mexHhzJnQJqiZLZTVJVXLQ_XNpm-AKWwd2zOAWk4tGW8/3zo/pz9-jrc2Q3ezrIVjgZ-1tw/h3/4fX4iJlWjFwLMifhBKSm3qpSaeoDI3ZNj7jKR30b4fo) Thank you for being a part of this movement. Angela Ferrell-Zabala She/Her/Hers Everytown Support Fund

clean_body: Democrats hold their breath every time Kamala Harris sits for an interview. | | | Democrats hold their breath every time Kamala Harris sits for an interview. Party leaders never know what Harris is going to say in an unscripted situation. And now Kamala Harris’s big mouth got her in deep trouble after this humiliating prediction. body:
| | | Peter, It’s been two days since we missed our mid-month deadline, and even with our plea to help us make up for lost time, we’re still not where we need to be.

This is the LAST month of the quarter, and when we put up our numbers at the end of this month, we have to show up strong.

Democrats are chomping at the bit to take Missouri, and we can’t show _any_ signs of weakness - _especially when it comes to our fundraising numbers._

Missouri is anyone’s game right now, Peter.

I have Democrat opponents coming at me from every side with one goal: to hold onto and expand their radical Senate majority.

America can’t afford to lose this seat. The road to the majority runs right through us, and that means we can’t lose track of our progress.

clean_body: | | | Peter, It’s been two days since we missed our mid-month deadline, and even with our plea to help us make up for lost time, we’re still not where we need to be. This is the LAST month of the quarter, and when we put up our numbers at the end of this month, we have to show up strong. Democrats are chomping at the bit to take Missouri, and we can’t show any signs of weakness - especially when it comes to our fundraising numbers. Missouri is anyone’s game right now, Peter. I have Democrat opponents coming at me from every side with one goal: to hold onto and expand their radical Senate majority. America can’t afford to lose this seat. The road to the majority runs right through us, and that means we can’t lose track of our progress. Thank you, Team Hawley | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

Now, I would love for you to be by my side for my next debate too. "The RNC wants to give you and a guest the chance to attend my second debate that’s just two weeks away!" | | | Would you like to enter for a chance to win two free tickets to my next debate? Here's how it works: "Chip in any amount here and you’ll be entered into the RNC’s debate contest for a chance to win \(2\ free tickets to the second presidential debate, airfare for two, and hotel accommodations. ") | | I am beyond excited to take the stage for the SECOND presidential debate. It's going to be another opportunity to share my vision with Americans across the country, which is why I hope you'll get to join me there! "Will you chip in any amount here and be entered for a chance to win the RNC’s debate contest? " Thanks for your continued support. I hope to see you there! My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Bryce Reeves
subject: Some good news and an Early Voting event 🇺🇸
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS OF BRYCE REEVES
body:
Peter I wanted to take a moment to reach out to say hello, to share some good news with you, and to invite you to an event I'm planning on attending. I wanted to see if you remember SB528, a tax cut worth hundreds of millions for our veter
| | |
---
| | [](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fbrycereeves.com/1/0100018aa33c2bd2-9f80c33f-2a3c-4ad5-96a8-8fbe61e7b68c-000000/G9uQlnqatMF5riekJCGisxoginE=339)
---
| Peter I wanted to take a moment to reach out to say hello, to share some good news with you, and to invite you to an event I'm planning on attending. I wanted to see if you remember [SB528](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flis.virginia.gov%2Fcgi-bin%2Flegp604.exe%3Fses=222%26typ=bil%26val=sb528/1/0100018aa33c2bd2-9f80c33f-2a3c-4ad5-96a8-8fbe61e7b68c-000000/IUUoMnQxZTLmWNfF0JJye1FjIfw=339), a tax cut worth hundreds of millions for our veterans that I worked to pass in 2022. This year, during the 2023 session, I carried a bill to expand this tax cut by removing the 55-year-old age cap associated with it. Unfortunately, the bill was killed during the legislative session. Recently, the General Assembly met to finish budget negotiations. I was able to work with budget conferees to ensure that the age limit was still removed, nearly doubling the fiscal impact of the tax cut on Virginians' wallets! This is something I have been working towards for a number of years, and am happy to say that all military retirees, regardless of their age, are now eligible for this huge tax cut. Now, on to the event. As I'm sure you are aware, Virginia's early voting period begins this coming Friday, September 22nd. As someone who has been pushing Governor Youngkin's Secure the Vote program as our path to securing a majority in the State Senate and holding the House of Delegates, I want to make sure that everybody is aware of this event. A local Republican women's club has put together an early voting-eve party to help generate excitement and push Republicans to the polls! I'll be there with a number of other candidates from Schoolboard to Congress, like Delegate Michael Webert, Cameron Hamilton, Regan Washer, and more! I hope you're able to join me for a night of fellowship and conservative conversation. If you have a candidate you are supporting this election cycle, please wear their campaign gear as they will have the opportunity to win $500 to support their campaign! The details are as follows:Thursday, September 21, 2023Death Ridge Brewery5pm-8pm5393 Higher Ground TrailJeffersonton, VA 22724
---
| | |
---
| As always, thank you for your support and your enthusiasm when it comes to our Commonwealth's legislature! It's going to take every single Republican voter showing up to the polls to ensure a Red Wave this November; we need all hands on deck. God bless, and I hope to see you this coming Thursday! Yours in service,
---
| | |
---
| Bryce E. ReevesSenator17th Senatorial District of VA
---
| |
---

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Constitution Day & National Voter Registration Day
body:
| | |
---
We recognize two pivotal dates that hold significant importance for both you and our esteemed nation. We invite you to continue reading to explore avenues through which you can actively engage in commemorating these national days.
---
---
| | Today is the 236th anniversary of the signing of our Constitution! September 17th is designated as Constitution Day every year, by law. I encourage you to take advantage of the day and use it to talk about the Constitution this week with your children, friends, teachers, coworkers, neighbors, etc. The National Constitution Center has some [**ideas and resources**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2NTIzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/6vUfcDC_0yTuYhEKECKYBw) to help you celebrate Constitution Day. You can also read about the [**history**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2NTIzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/u_5MUKoK-vv_DDjX5HmVBw) of Constitution Day, and visit [**ConstitutionDay.com,**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) a website dedicated solely to celebrating the day and the Constitution. And yes, it is always worthwhile celebrating our Constitution and teaching others about it, no matter how much the left tries to destroy it. Don’t give up on the Constitution!
---
---
There is also another day coming up this week that I want to bring to your attention – [**National Voter Registration Day**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-gHZWPA) – on Tuesday, September 19th. This marks the beginning of the mass voter registration that will take place before the 2024 election. **_What better way to honor our Constitution than register more voters who will vote for candidates who will protect our Constitution?!_** While National Voter Registration Day has only been observed since 2012, and is run by what seems to be a left-wing nonprofit group, the left has traditionally led in these kinds of efforts. If we hope to save America, conservatives need to take advantage of and use election infrastructure the left built for their organizations, get involved, and to register lots of voters too. Simply go to the [**website**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) and look around at the ideas and resources they provide. There are communication resources, training resources, and more. Remember to look up voter registration guidelines and laws for your state before you begin; voter registration is typically supposed to be nonpartisan, which actually makes it easier to do. As for the question of where you should register voters, our local leaders offered the following suggestions (remember if it is a private business to get permission/authorization first).
* Gun shows and gun stores
* Conservative churches
* Christian high schools and universities
* Rallies (comment from local leader Emery, “Lot of people are attending or trying to attend now because they are fed up. Register them.”)
* Large grocery stores and hardware stores
* Malls
* Public government meetings, such as city council meetings and school board meetings (local leader Brice says, “Anything school related,” since they are going after our kids and parents are outraged – let’s make sure they’re registered)
* Door-to-door in your neighborhood
* Gas stations
* County/state fairs and similar events
* Rodeos
* Country music concerts
* Veterans’ events, museums/memorials, and clubs/organizations
* Places near military bases – diners, grocery stores, etc.
* Homeschool events – you can also reach out to homeschool co-ops in your area
* Local conservative scouting troops like American Heritage Girls and Trail Life
* Local small businesses owned by likeminded patriots

Can you think of other places?? Email us back at [support@teapartypatriots.org](mailto:support@teapartypatriots.org "support@teapartypatriots.org") and let us know if you have other suggestions and let’s get more patriotic Americans registered to vote! In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin
---

subject: Republicans threaten to fire election officials while Democrats protest for commonsense gun safety laws … and everything else you need to know in the states.
body:
Welcome to the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter, September 17th, 2023 | | |
---
| | | [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0qGpwpXgoJxt9wxxr6-3NGZy8uzjP7lQns4eM7mQr18nbBTscuYL22isIY29FSQLcV6mr91eEUVyemsu9wrmEdJ3RiZrFUtRExJnxpDQb-ezPimo1vNWPvLZ1VV6xPUFWMGsOfkZ8ivkzEN_LA_vGJUlqcqbfBevbCvh3IOiQMJjH6FxB9oRv_39z2iRGj8wJf6VuAxF5B--Nh3ISxK7u4CLU4nN2iSY75vF5Yg-EqHZkN6MwBquG7EyOBPmf681FciFO_S_L_NOeZ3w6Ze7Xs7rOZqmF93LFjeTrFjLdyItiyk0y9nCJXHPxphj2ZuLeaqJfCY7LfJPJO0On0z7FrudVuVM9bmCHJVF8QRep0nBvxUyfRdlbV7Gul6wh81LIRX4e1h3eHGhLVCY6h--X56kNJJ1_j_64pvmi6icBzQrEBhNjuJPRATz10AOj9eVK77sRPIZqaOBCY-IQ4MnOzHXqaHx-Jx62OS5MiojSd93NQfccwxI4h7Ylq6CwWoUqhIKiOORHjz783jH2Sr0OXcIIva3HgJhq2z5bhVILRgp-nj8Dy5zhAP-HdZLEQC84Egvm-HqE17yRCdsh2i9Nrg/3zo/xDPd1JqYTyWJwLdoYOO6hg/h0/CuLs6EhOgibcjjutMHVX3DTaQJBleaXnzWh3dD-YEAQ)

1️⃣ **_North Carolina:_ Students and community members were kicked out of the NC legislature for protesting the lack of gun control **
In North Carolina, just weeks after a deadly school shooting on UNC’s campus, UNC students and community members gathered at the state capitol to protest legislation to loosen the little gun laws that still exist in the state. [**Protesters were removed from the legislature in the latest attempt to silence community calls for action →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/eR1oNBZ1lqoGbKL8pO4doDucylgfKJYgtIj1pGvBLA87oBhrpr8siJEluFDFz6ZOH_5GPC6-c5LvKWZ1dULdBMSbCruTFj6dXdEoiy-XGp_79Gg-nk-hF294UunUWyWB_t8djmSkCji1Pzk-TviHQUcrYlTnT_39BLuAciBzRhEI_JHxxREGNZiv291GBUO0KFFhy_jKwc4VWRXEJuzSYid-gUuSA7jq-y05cer_IGo7guatEjEJQ2a4Vs_fHb1Wu3I8uA5Y_ZNSKbtKsTK548evLrWrf12wznxlqxS5N9QD3EPl_PJn1oMq6BI7cMjX3B0kjt3PiGsfW2orkvP5XeihPkNIgqNBoUVthZWngExHnbPLXDd_JwL0akcY3sxIQNxCIeJR0xZp6jbZtkw0EwAr8vei4gb9NWtcRnXabKEHCF01EAz-0KBVgyAjuwzupTk09w2qJzzV2MsRMfgAtz8JJWPZ4FljkyECAgDI-vLQAzVVSxIVSTYjUvazkgHbG5b_H3jywOq_PsBSYuleWv-G2Srs49v_6ju-6kSCXYY98vN2AJPkAxd-uW8ZyHMhwqpk-JNcGH-6z1p4TERUmf_PDehazYYEjRQnVKoSKYL6cmJqPc9susUbnxrlqUrAWHAvcMGHO13ZloNQd2_NgB_tjxT6_zTnYc0ZmGiKSqA/3zo/xDPd1JqYTyWJwLdoYOO6hg/h1/vVjXccAxduKPSXyT5fN-Kd8gQwxyP3vRAA975sBYyuk)
2️⃣ **_Virginia:_ Governor Youngkin calls his state a “test case” for a Republican takeover**
In Virginia, Governor Glenn Youngkin outlined a Republican-led plan to maintain and expand Republican control nationwide – [**he believes it all starts with VA’s elections this November →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/c511-KAjM3jU_4OIFtitbTe7NadSU4hNcXu6yTKA1DfOf8gylm6OB20TGaHtY3Ndx7nomY4GXAWgSCP6eUh1LioaAxGVvj3SX0sqw1OP9JN1kT5Tl9HrY2-ReZrIENWT0thGbZT7n-JpcmeLHZd6sVNrLLtUhwBoFgTkmLWttTPi4xZjcrTOwJlaAB0XZ2KHEQM7SQ2whqZuOBUqUJNH3SciWzkMNbgBqtlmChw07mCDbdKdhm5TwrmUyi-mK6WnSBNB5XizOqUFXaVIwcky2yhXG0ICY-O0BTJ7SjOUNsdnJssm-5Nwi05X1kp4z_y9IpRnPIyn2xBvCEZ8SBfv3Q6ZnfihNUmOxkTvY-vd3MIIzpg1qGlQ6GLqqrmbdWkMs3z5UfaaSNRDEGNmczyBgHzNAhyIJ5X2gXIOWCNGmh9fSe88VoaSRpl_oO7tlr7bx8opH1N9DLC2CzzJ3cI1bI8MPmqVTKmGl0nCpNtK1wGrgjfP-gqUME6IgtJGofDxHRWlVO7YtFwDoQZIbj8xRJvNGqKBhXcadw4HyrZ0xJ3zjKGMwL2zSdRjeZo33pj_TLzwC9qda_1NJWi9lp7-jM5sqCGRpDa7o5jyLCOMpQPbBBcvyEJRyYDFu9O0G6-VT3gaXcawwtrgoezMi_yqcb3_RsG79MeT0WFzh6jgvjr_thF1N3yDvIhnsOoxcqLz9qmCScJzko0C9fYTvD1BFQ/3zo/xDPd1JqYTyWJwLdoYOO6hg/h2/RB3WLZHz-mz0_mCgUlY9RA_JoqbBEcoD-AQdw6Imi0s)
3️⃣ **_Wisconsin:_ Senate Republicans threaten to fire Wisconsin's top elections official **
In Wisconsin, following election controversy and calls to impeach a liberal, democratically elected Supreme Court justice, [**Republicans are now threatening to remove the Elections Commission administrator from her post →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/tTBUZwcBH_2q13Ow12s-jdTfSmo3dMsoEyiJvBdrCKbV2ufTHYfGlRuS-am65HSRAaSQzMWAJaxpC-Uml8r48QdNlFpBHUje4nGCCb7D4xHlz7PfUhuw_0aZcojemna-jaawih2OmEi7pWCBPygBlMOKFV5J6eRkdlXUJz4qBgPz7Oxl06TYNoV97LuzllCheCmgeFFm1InKMCDP58mdFNxfAAwf-l8NOuRDS7TLpccKLy920B7MoO0sjBKWifHC4pEDQAejF6uy8vgPkSx7F32yI0TWgCfo8wIdei4OMuc9K3hnD9Vr5FZHiGBpId_8OU0ceOxAekqbEvjZgMTRc3osGYghHA37F_iIjOtqM8zJxf4R1TaPzE_rISx7fC1m6jddqsXaxEtPJ0mnhvjZBkxccZFScelOObQuVri_GIgdnjlEDLhKuYIkaG28neG5R0hw8K4qyCABxkfXBOGnLeFE09l_nYQRTtgEQqPTq3MTBSptmtxq4Ym7t9F7pJu4cY1XeKXQN6lOlXkrUnJYbc5PENH2E9mt0U5L1cTfIIg_2cnJ12QbMCqw-hSQiCG65VrroZsE7LTKXzsZPDRm6ILYf4OcavGM5ZSKA-jtlJzsek1ykginPHoqq9FEF_TThFg-2l1jvkq_18GBW1MtyM02C3nTLAcgk8Wzq8IktFS-mW5ClZS3Pi4T_RByi-UbK4eFvxwbcxkywfIlRK-ZIwbK-fIeOv6DEx7E7NZ8csB2tBesw63mAAJOEKybB26BMZWpz_k3_1hREKDDGySWZpkKUewr3FyomTSTGnowuLQ/3zo/xDPd1JqYTyWJwLdoYOO6hg/h3/0c_tTVqIscPB9ZjFrpCgfgJy_bc3xSDFNpuVQUhiq6Y)
4️⃣ **_Read:_ The Surprising Places Where Abortion Rights Are on the Ballot, and Winning**
Despite the Supreme Court’s decision to overturn Roe v. Wade, many Americans believe that the right to reproductive freedom is critical to our nation’s progress. body:
| |
---
| | I've always been drawn to service. After graduating high school I took the first airplane flight of my life for basic training and began my 22-year career in the Army. I was deployed to the Iraq War, Guantanamo Bay, Kuwait, and the Korean DMZ.

[](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=565c21c2a62a4b999ac66970a2406328&_e=QZ8Nky5eR6IUZPPTuTEyVaUo3Y0CkQxQAOo6b06f_3GucpMC0EwwPmxMJjlUyDuUadpw28xuqYzERKha1jQ4Ji3F8JFmM8tCPIzO3QG6Rwa7sL-k7ufzmonj7ajfxZDz7P3VmOfaeNYOcSMs3G9jD40TagbOh1BmT3ny6kZbVPQ-Gv1p9lUXWlJeyPxnW96bFVOJZ5P9vRFxNRHAOxdKpQaGaWzmp0inDMWzSKiYlSiDBE6TzgpvfPHp1gLVAH4cFIVtnOUan1jWgO8Sl-ZflGz9vzZzgzj4WvSdjONcIvfqUq3kLpyEYF5KprtVYum5)

During my time in the Michigan State Senate, I voted against sending taxpayer money to Chinese communist-owned factories, pushed for reinvestment in American energy, and defended small businesses from the left's anti-small business agenda. I want to continue helping our nation by making positive change, but I need your help. **[Will you send $22, one dollar for every year of my service, to help me win in 2024?](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=565c21c2a62a4b999ac66970a2406328&_e=QZ8Nky5eR6IUZPPTuTEyVaUo3Y0CkQxQAOo6b06f_3GucpMC0EwwPmxMJjlUyDuUadpw28xuqYzERKha1jQ4Ji3F8JFmM8tCPIzO3QG6Rwa7sL-k7ufzmonj7ajfxZDz7P3VmOfaeNYOcSMs3G9jD40TagbOh1BmT3ny6kZbVPSM9zaVjS3VYAhu5wSBqzYWw-_VJgp4r5hmB8nvbsCVu_77bGQj7hdYlvPcDaALvHmy_Y0UfU5jvlhb9Q7gWDHC4TN8MDI7LLIuiV4VzIJjQ0iSEV-jCdkzl2jFGIIsL8sgt9rMkvgNwgY4D-mA8F3f)**

[](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=565c21c2a62a4b999ac66970a2406328&_e=QZ8Nky5eR6IUZPPTuTEyVaUo3Y0CkQxQAOo6b06f_3GucpMC0EwwPmxMJjlUyDuUadpw28xuqYzERKha1jQ4Ji3F8JFmM8tCPIzO3QG6Rwa7sL-k7ufzmonj7ajfxZDz7P3VmOfaeNYOcSMs3G9jD40TagbOh1BmT3ny6kZbVPSo59wxr-y93LHj306TV0o1ECKMFP18Qqs5yhAhI6vdRcfzcoWOmZP_--AtO5fPwQjLDDcRUTxPWDvSPa_NpKYKXXjvZc9egNPhVvhhsd5XY4QQFTzcrof4Vz5J9n182T9IoIAVYcjxnNaH8k9-Lpzy)

I joined the U.S. Army straight out of high school. My opponent, Curtis Hertel Jr. ran for office straight out of college. **We aren't the same, and our service to Michiganders like you wouldn't even be comparable.** Will you help me beat Curtis Jr. so I can represent you how you deserve to be represented, _by someone who would lay their life down for you._ The 7th Congressional District is going to be an open seat, and the Democrats will undoubtedly throw millions of dollars into this race. **[You can show them that you won't let this seat be bought by giving just $22 to show your support today.](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=565c21c2a62a4b999ac66970a2406328&_e=QZ8Nky5eR6IUZPPTuTEyVaUo3Y0CkQxQAOo6b06f_3GucpMC0EwwPmxMJjlUyDuUadpw28xuqYzERKha1jQ4Ji3F8JFmM8tCPIzO3QG6Rwa7sL-k7ufzmonj7ajfxZDz7P3VmOfaeNYOcSMs3G9jD40TagbOh1BmT3ny6kZbVPSjU-mwRV9pJ5TGpoK4ftQBTKkS8Ekoih2ayCBN-vKZGwizhVm79oEwUnlk9LZddvMgFBZLWfLNBJYIb_ayg4Jnxbl-bM9OSpivFu3JA__jmuoEktdTfkfSV3EJfEU1IdYF8ty4Qc3M4TZtO_gQiBEx)**

[](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=565c21c2a62a4b999ac66970a2406328&_e=QZ8Nky5eR6IUZPPTuTEyVaUo3Y0CkQxQAOo6b06f_3GucpMC0EwwPmxMJjlUyDuUadpw28xuqYzERKha1jQ4Ji3F8JFmM8tCPIzO3QG6Rwa7sL-k7ufzmonj7ajfxZDz7P3VmOfaeNYOcSMs3G9jD40TagbOh1BmT3ny6kZbVPSyutXaRGTm8bLhH4DsoRjCWWbV3id1zm2hT6eH7DUNip_km8eQ1YZlUqPMCgpObpgVHljT5jKsIuv1BpDVaV1o9UowTSsnE5lmxnIXEPfFKogfmzxiIkSRU8l3KIppBz7xTh1ugppNa0oo1C0c2sei)

I must really be scaring Curtis Hertel Jr. and his radical allies. They recently attacked for being "_extreme_." **Extreme how?** Why should I apologize for being so passionate about our great country that I spent 22 years putting my life on the line to defend it, _while Hertel spent 22 years as a career politician and**literally** nothing else?_ I risked my life for citizens like you, what has Curtis Jr. done? _Vote with Democrats 100% of the time?_ **[If you are ready to send a real fighter to Washington then I could use your help.](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=565c21c2a62a4b999ac66970a2406328&_e=QZ8Nky5eR6IUZPPTuTEyVaUo3Y0CkQxQAOo6b06f_3GucpMC0EwwPmxMJjlUyDuUuCHmzR0Tkb0dbQo-J8pK0I3NLptLzVvKpRqbD0vQ50xQ4cV-5szEBSUc1v8RaxLYoEM4GiByySd0o7mgenkMhm_Ao5cEYXYWpz7r0XnTHgll1OVGStIPHKlYfL1CnmKUzFiiooSvQ4gdwtWvK1ovYLycYDsY8h9WWrnjO03KIWoKnAuUIJyT3YTga7qvOvsxf3U_cJoN30-4PCiIGfdDVa_LU-eaQz9QQvQH8MoExHM%3D)** **[Will you send $22, one dollar for every year of my service, to help me win in 2024?](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=565c21c2a62a4b999ac66970a2406328&_e=QZ8Nky5eR6IUZPPTuTEyVaUo3Y0CkQxQAOo6b06f_3GucpMC0EwwPmxMJjlUyDuUadpw28xuqYzERKha1jQ4Ji3F8JFmM8tCPIzO3QG6Rwa7sL-k7ufzmonj7ajfxZDz7P3VmOfaeNYOcSMs3G9jD40TagbOh1BmT3ny6kZbVPTLdG9Db0faNjz8wsrXQKioab21zC0VbPXcrFh4DPz6G5n_YsMXxf2GBjjaIg5288wswEPp3gUfD7XhLiM_TLBzi0WBiti5oV0yBvM11c3Hke990fjefYvikYVAYhveKAA_eMumOTR2xVjuMA5BL2Or)** **Thank you,**

I was deployed to the Iraq War, Guantanamo Bay, Kuwait, and the Korean DMZ. During my time in the Michigan State Senate, I voted against sending taxpayer money to Chinese communist-owned factories, pushed for reinvestment in American energy, and defended small businesses from the left's anti-small business agenda. I want to continue helping our nation by making positive change, but I need your help. I joined the U.S. Army straight out of high school. My opponent, Curtis Hertel Jr. ran for office straight out of college. We aren't the same, and our service to Michiganders like you wouldn't even be comparable. Will you help me beat Curtis Jr. so I can represent you how you deserve to be represented, by someone who would lay their life down for you. The 7th Congressional District is going to be an open seat, and the Democrats will undoubtedly throw millions of dollars into this race. I must really be scaring Curtis Hertel Jr. and his radical allies. They recently attacked for being "extreme." Extreme how? Why should I apologize for being so passionate about our great country that I spent 22 years putting my life on the line to defend it, while Hertel spent 22 years as a career politician andliterally nothing else? I risked my life for citizens like you, what has Curtis Jr. done? Vote with Democrats 100% of the time? Thank you, Tom Barrett | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Davos
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Do you know where that is, Peter?
#

Do you know where Davos is, Peter?
It ain’t in Arizona, that’s for sure.
If you’ve got a minute, let me explain why I’m bringing this up:
Senator Sinema went to Davos, Switzerland to speak to the World Economic Forum — an audience of the most powerful and wealthy people in the world. Her favorite kind of crowd.
She took the stage with Joe Manchin, and they congratulated each other for blocking filibuster reform and killing our best chance at passing voting rights legislation. They even high-fived over it.
It was a huge disappointment for all of us. You’ve been let down a lot over the past few years, and I’m sorry for that. Truly.
But we don’t have to sit back and take it. There’s something you can do, right now:
[**Chip in $3 to our campaign for Senate in Arizona.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-sept23.a-3sdr&refcode=em230917-1-asp&t=1&akid=1211%2E734936%2EBGkJXy)
[CHIP IN $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-sept23.a-3sdr&refcode=em230917-1-asp&t=2&akid=1211%2E734936%2EBGkJXy)
If chipping in $3 meant we’d win this race, take this seat back from Sinema, and work to pass voting rights, abortion protections, and more, wouldn’t you give it right away?
$3 might not seem like an amount that can do all those things, but with thousands of people coming together it really is. And ahead of our FEC deadline on September 30th, your donation will have a big impact.
Can I count on you?
[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-sept23.a-3sdr&refcode=em230917-1-asp&t=3&akid=1211%2E734936%2EBGkJXy)
Thank you very much,
-Ruben

name: Kevin Thomas (personal)
subject: We’re running out of time.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Kevin Thomas
body:
Friend, I appreciate you taking the time to read this.

We're just a few hours away from our mid-September deadline, and we're still $5,718 shy of our goal.

Can you chip in a few dollars before midnight to help us close the gap? Here’s your personal donation link: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_bax_kt_q3]

Look, I jumped into this race because the American people deserve better. House Republicans, like my far-right opponent, are wasting our taxpayer dollars on impeachment shams and waging culture wars. We need to focus on protecting reproductive rights. Passing laws that curb gun violence. Bringing good-paying jobs to our communities. And the kitchen table issues that really matter.

That’s why it’s critical that we build an unstoppable grassroots movement, flip this district blue, and take back the House for Democrats next year.

And that starts by hitting our fundraising goals. See, we’re just a few weeks from our biggest campaign milestone yet — our very first FEC filing deadline.

Shortly after, the public, including my opponent, will see our fundraising numbers for the first time. After that, they're going to come after us with every resource they’ve got.

Let’s make sure we’re prepared for it. That starts with hitting our mid-month goal tonight. Can I count on you to click here and donate before it's too late? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_bax_kt_q3]

I can’t thank you enough.

- Kevin Thomas
Candidate for Congress, NY-04
Sent from my iPhone

Paid for by Friends of Kevin Thomas
Friends of Kevin Thomas
410 Jericho Turnpike #200
Jericho, NY 11753

If you no longer want to receive emails from us, click here to unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/a2tH0wMJCEy5VoIiLr4cHg2?unsubscribedata=vPiiNB6oFzHehlUiXnWeF0lTgX%2BuuHXbWtvJBebsdcaBDDn8KsziOY0fo1pTYuXj9S%2FK5c7OmiXO9nw8IQwCWUyhiAtVTP5Frv%2FWafX%2FDZzt0Za2fQftY5GY%2BCmsl5W2PXeUQQIIJ8e5PuP3UkDbWsA3Q1J95orGHgrVWVipZnKSRAlAEjLP0Tm%2FRPTvqocekrBCT9%2FfkaP%2F7A3rrGrTmgghwSq0NEX5YagbgtX3b%2B50oRlkzuZlhdWJuindbnyua5mQmx1C2pxqVWrVKX8Dbmf2wde8FKTYPpDbrhr%2BIGX2RdrwPdpMyoCVqgXf%2FE2PLX5o1bCAD3vL5vv1%2FOoorXj9tIPhAGMwcZ%2FDWzKeBEcYeKT82FhNZP2hE8vvkZYCce2Rtu49YKl1bJJA9fdOfuKWYfG0AFVeqVSP4JbDd9fr3p%2BHLAwv6MG6ctBs38gt

name: David Hogg via Blue Amp Action
subject: Peter, we scare the shit out of Republicans:
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5f09203f-a8f4-4b93-b6e8-3ebabed67f8c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | Hey, Peter, it’s David Hogg, gun safety advocate and co-founder of March For Our Lives. The GOP and conservative special interest groups have been playing a 50-year chess game to elect far-right extremists to every level of government to manipulate our country and attack our rights and freedoms. They are willing to let children be slaughtered at school and watch our planet burn for personal gain. But badass young people have a habit of being underestimated, from March For Our Lives to the Sunrise Movement to the Movement for Black Lives. And when we demonstrate our collective power, we scare the shit out of Republicans. That’s why with an incredible team, we launched Leaders We Deserve — a grassroots organization dedicated to electing young leaders to Congress, and especially our State Legislatures, across the country to help defeat the far-right’s agenda and advance a progressive vision for the future. [We can’t do this without you by our side. Will you become a Founding Donor by splitting a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Blue Amp Action today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb715277d-0f8a-459a-a348-afd92e2e1230/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CHIP IN NOW!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3a49e3b6-3164-4427-80a9-e6211361e88f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | I’ll be blunt: There is no shortage of people who want us to fail. And unless we band together and fight back, nothing is going to change. It’s part of why despite making up 45% of the electorate, Gen Z and Millennials only hold 21% of State Legislature seats. Special interest groups, far-right extremists, and those hoarding the power are so determined to maintain the status quo that they will spend millions to keep Gen Z candidates from winning. They think that they can continue to manipulate the system to keep us out of elected office. Let’s prove them wrong, Peter. [That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you become a Founding Donor to Leaders We Deserve by splitting a donation with Blue Amp Action today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T87498a55-c35f-43c8-b769-0f1b013057e1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Let’s do this, David Hogg Co-founder, Leaders We Deserve
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3cd7b35d-f583-4c4f-969c-39d07ace76aa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter) | [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com

Peter,

Joy Behar is at it again.

She was on The View calling young Republicans, **"dumb"** and **"liars."**

Joy Behar embodies the modern left's playbook: talk a big game, name-call, and then cower from actual debate.

I'm sure it'll be pretty easy to take on a "dumb" guy. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: We cannot let Anthony D’Esposito serve another term in Congress. | = | = Peter, In just his first year in Congress Republican Anthony D’Esposito turned his back on the hard-working families on Long Island. Here’s what he’s up to in Congress: 🚩 He voted with his extremist MAGA party bosses to cut funding for vital services like Medicaid and nutritional programs. 🚩 He voted to restrict a woman’s right to make their own healthcare decisions. 🚩 D’Esposito and his GOP colleagues are working to dismantle our public school programs by gutting crucial investments in our K-12 programs. We cannot let Anthony D’Esposito serve another term in Congress. = | = In Congress, I will work to protect our communities and programs that thousands of Long Island families rely on. And unlike D’Esposito, I have a proven track record of cutting costs, lowering taxes, and preventing corruption as Town Supervisor. I will never betray my own constituents for political gain. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Let’s fight to protect Long Islanders, Laura Gillen * | | = Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY. Gillen for NY PO Box 774 Rockville Centre, NY 11571 United States | = If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above.

New polling shows Hawley in a neck-and-neck race with Lucas Kunce.
#

**Lucas Kunce is the 13-year Marine veteran, antitrust advocate, and Democrat running to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate.** He’s on a mission to fundamentally change who has power in our country — and his message has already put this race in a DEAD HEAT with Josh Hawley.

Peter,

There’s a lot at stake for Governor in Louisiana. Do you believe locking up people longer will make us safer? Should Louisiana begin State executions again? Can you live on $7.25 an hour? (do you think other families can?) Should we roll back medicaid expansion? Do voting rights matter? Should we fully fund early childhood education?

I’m Dr. Shawn Wilson. I’m in a very competitive race for Governor of Louisiana, and there’s a lot at stake.

Besides over-incarceration and State executions, divisive and hateful policies like banning books, banning African-American history, and Don’t Say Gay are all on the line this election. Many of these discriminatory policies already passed the Louisiana Legislature—that’s why our Governor’s veto pen is the last stand.

This race is crucial – not just for Louisiana, but for the entire country. How many of you posted messages of empathy to social media after devastating policies passed in Georgia, Florida, and elsewhere? This is your opportunity to get involved in a race worth winning.

[With your support, we can protect recent gains like criminal justice reform and focus on the true work ahead: to uplift our communities and enact policies that make us safer, smarter, healthier, and wealthier. Will you split a contribution of $100 between my campaign and The Collective PAC to help us fight our collective future? ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zd08Cnt8yETzp0d4OIwup9KAVuuMh3bGgHk_eWke7PKA8qsWTZupLrFlXTmQkT58KjYVe1S5IYTfY8YyV-E1b2SfE8QxnyFNLLoIoZIhSkcGjHztX-h__-wsa_oVPbYNZabV59k-lYjEU9NsD5wT5ykXbXdK2LsaNCKRIpFyI-pwuhRGleHOlYBfcsgxw84DHW6MqgsiU1APK0cJFfPWSNvzsDyR2lEJ3edoxVo00VJ6oNpQlpst0an2fJB8dphYjLLRh5_J62WcKVwy1TTLDmqZ9Z3L9BJZiS-0J0TmXfUIP3J_t4vaWHp-lppJuh12qDNVD6RXhpzFYpMDgHpP40mJSdp2MrcT5EI27VnJiQcblXNF4fucxvQP1NqBy9-sk/3zo/wV9A1fDNQxS0Rk6biliP6g/h2/YvBPAL0sPstwFRzHMb3p21D3spujwAuHi6RM11R-rwI)

Born and raised in New Orleans Louisiana, I understand the challenges that our state faces, and I’ve dedicated my life to addressing them. As a civil servant, I’ve worked tirelessly over 25 years within both Democratic and Republican administrations to improve infrastructure, transportation, and overall quality of life. Now, driven by a deep commitment to making this state a better place for everyone, I’m running for Governor.

That’s why I’m asking you to chip in today to become a founding donor of my campaign. [We’ve got some great ads cut](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiJS4iDeN42f49q2GGJX508jrvQxnq_RLKbnywrZcBgQioqCnFGcbOv1J92ZEaTQCJJvf-Z_NCtB1kj9JteitLLWkLR5qmohWUAubTufg9MocQoJpKDj8Tq4_QiOYyCcRgj6UqLa7vK0h2aO-Led4NRT_l417i7OKIV9DX_3PwUMfD-Bbt9OoUU3yb4PNzhu3K18mafAsB2_NBdkIMfRGf3RCPEpiuUKiQfrKDQlnRj8bQqKgetQ579mORE74__dKnRyBVlAAIlYKC3d1cH6o7fX9MCR84qOzm5VHahrBzRsiAmQJ2CVNjqQCDk2xVJns2E/3zo/wV9A1fDNQxS0Rk6biliP6g/h3/lrWF3IaI1fNfxUh1N51Xt_kGA2_c9N8f33koC7Ujzdw) — now help us get air time. clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, There’s a lot at stake for Governor in Louisiana. Do you believe locking up people longer will make us safer? Should Louisiana begin State executions again? Can you live on $7.25 an hour? (do you think other families can?) Should we roll back medicaid expansion? Do voting rights matter? Should we fully fund early childhood education? I’m Dr. Shawn Wilson. I’m in a very competitive race for Governor of Louisiana, and there’s a lot at stake. Besides over-incarceration and State executions, divisive and hateful policies like banning books, banning African-American history, and Don’t Say Gay are all on the line this election. Many of these discriminatory policies already passed the Louisiana Legislature—that’s why our Governor’s veto pen is the last stand. This race is crucial – not just for Louisiana, but for the entire country. How many of you posted messages of empathy to social media after devastating policies passed in Georgia, Florida, and elsewhere? This is your opportunity to get involved in a race worth winning. Born and raised in New Orleans Louisiana, I understand the challenges that our state faces, and I’ve dedicated my life to addressing them. As a civil servant, I’ve worked tirelessly over 25 years within both Democratic and Republican administrations to improve infrastructure, transportation, and overall quality of life. Now, driven by a deep commitment to making this state a better place for everyone, I’m running for Governor. That’s why I’m asking you to chip in today to become a founding donor of my campaign. — now help us get air time. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Shawn Wilson and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | It's our time, Louisiana! name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: How do you uphold your religious liberty in today's climate?
body:
I'm reaching out today about an important issue that's close to my heart

|
---
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8c87ff9c14ff4d4aa9225df48bb17493&_e=XfTy4M1W76tov02WEoEEHaYbWIbqWqcZ6zxKj7LH_Q1v25HMvgG8wQDyfzUkvOhvmIhehKQ9dWxDu2_IyWbz3akWCSy9SuFC20wml0G4EqGR6laB_AgG1_L-GloTfeyj8LH_pMeYTVrm251lQi4-t3uifW0wP1u3iWT1eWm4V_sPFkHwanA6Kgyv5vguIPg8w0xVVdlTFUWJ80WFG_AN17N8FqaQFC6uOQ-m9HXcOfVelaSxtkPf3nf3UAitFMf2s7KIThcwifrgoqNDOistToeFKqeF3HiYHrssrXTt79NEg7LX5ajsg2rAaEbu0J77Bod93Z_nF8uhSV7-ddhw8H3wm9wXEJJMHnwLMK2Xzp0rUvXuhQG_2ji8HO8JkaXq1DbvgBpvPiTkQavew1oRj27_a_--EQZc224n9oTN0Zo%3D)
---
| Dear Fellow Patriot,

I hope this message finds you well. I'm reaching out today about an important issue that's close to my heart and, I believe, relevant to all of us.

In the current climate, our religious liberty, a foundational tenet of our nation, faces an increasing number of challenges. These are especially concerning for those of us who hold to biblical and faith-based values. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8c87ff9c14ff4d4aa9225df48bb17493&_e=XfTy4M1W76tov02WEoEEHaYbWIbqWqcZ6zxKj7LH_Q1v25HMvgG8wQDyfzUkvOhvmIhehKQ9dWxDu2_IyWbz3akWCSy9SuFC20wml0G4EqGR6laB_AgG1_L-GloTfeyj8LH_pMeYTVrm251lQi4-t3uifW0wP1u3iWT1eWm4V_sPFkHwanA6Kgyv5vguIPg8w0xVVdlTFUWJ80WFG_AN17N8FqaQFC6uOQ-m9HXcOfVelaSxtkPf3nf3UAitFMf2s7KIThcwifrgoqNDOistTqumKq2pLqgLJ0B4ah9nOTtWegIcsimqCApD0m-Qj72O6uJQFwS8tbzKlx_qFemWJdNMseGTwvAWEyxBylblyBpAqvPU0_Hh5C924y5v5XpFbU7esxl_Wv1pQXN_Aen2GYdW_AZf11Oc49Dc9THMmNQ%3D)
With societal shifts and new legal precedents, including the recently passed Respect for Marriage Act, the ability to practice and express our faith openly may face unprecedented threats.

These changes may allow the federal government to exert pressure on schools, businesses, and organizations that adhere to their religious beliefs. I fear this might lead to intensified legal persecution against those wishing to live according to their faith.

As engaged citizens, it's crucial we understand this situation and its potential impact on our religious freedom.

Please take a moment to share your insights by completing this 2-minute survey: [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8c87ff9c14ff4d4aa9225df48bb17493&_e=XfTy4M1W76tov02WEoEEHaYbWIbqWqcZ6zxKj7LH_Q1v25HMvgG8wQDyfzUkvOhvmIhehKQ9dWxDu2_IyWbz3akWCSy9SuFC20wml0G4EqGR6laB_AgG1_L-GloTfeyj8LH_pMeYTVrm251lQi4-t3uifW0wP1u3iWT1eWm4V_sPFkHwanA6Kgyv5vguIPg8w0xVVdlTFUWJ80WFG_AN17N8FqaQFC6uOQ-m9HXcOfVelaSxtkPf3nf3UAitFMf2s7KIThcwifrgoqNDOistTo1ALdVDZxFNCxNvRZiA0dZXmmYac0irGvu5EwxZdW6VhQjROStFPDqQiF8Oz1SeRNtKuhs4Eq7FjTzdupLM9DJxYbHBPGuwLaLhtjxDx6RqDTpQbPFiGhiLZcRZ-9-3FUl0QaH-P8lAoIQJm0trokc%3D)

Your contribution will guide our efforts to alert fellow Americans of the threats to our religious liberty and defend our First Amendment rights.

Let's uphold the integrity of our Constitution and protect the pillars that make our nation great: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Thank you for your attention to this matter.

Yours sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

clean_body: I'm reaching out today about an important issue that's close to my heart | | | | | Dear Fellow Patriot, I hope this message finds you well. I'm reaching out today about an important issue that's close to my heart and, I believe, relevant to all of us. In the current climate, our religious liberty, a foundational tenet of our nation, faces an increasing number of challenges. These are especially concerning for those of us who hold to biblical and faith-based values. With societal shifts and new legal precedents, including the recently passed Respect for Marriage Act, the ability to practice and express our faith openly may face unprecedented threats. These changes may allow the federal government to exert pressure on schools, businesses, and organizations that adhere to their religious beliefs. I fear this might lead to intensified legal persecution against those wishing to live according to their faith. As engaged citizens, it's crucial we understand this situation and its potential impact on our religious freedom. Please take a moment to share your insights by completing this 2-minute survey: Your contribution will guide our efforts to alert fellow Americans of the threats to our religious liberty and defend our First Amendment rights. Let's uphold the integrity of our Constitution and protect the pillars that make our nation great: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life. Thank you for your attention to this matter. Yours sincerely, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens. | | Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Chris Murphy
subject: reaching out to ask a favor:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi there, I’m reaching out personally because I need to ask a favor of you today. Yes, this is a fundraising ask, and I wish I didn’t have to make it. But it’s important that I have the resources to win re-election, so I hope you will hear me out.

The truth is I hate asking people to contribute. It’s the worst part of this job, and our democracy would be better off if we could get these absurd levels of money out of our politics. The corporate money and super PACs are undoubtedly a corrosive force.

But my campaign cannot just unilaterally disarm. It would put a huge target on us for far-right billionaires and super PACs that can spend limitless sums of money. Senate races are just expensive, and frankly, people deserve to know that I’m putting in the work of legislating in the Senate and organizing on the ground to earn their vote.

That’s why I’m building a people-powered campaign from start to finish. I’m going to fund this the right way — I’m not taking any corporate PAC money — but it requires that I lean on you a bit more.

Look, I know you probably did not expect to make a contribution to my re-election when you woke up this morning, but if you believe that people power is the right way to run a campaign, then I need you to have my back.

**[Please split a contribution of $5 between my campaign and the DSCC today to help us win and defend our Senate majority. Please know I only ask because your support is truly important. There’s no way we can take on the important fights ahead of us alone.](https://go.dscc.org/go/14140?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230917-ChrisMurphy-MurphyTandemSept-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230917-ChrisMurphy-MurphyTandemSept-Pros-sl1&akid=11968%2E9716520%2EAdJH4k)**

Thank you in advance for your consideration.

Every best wish,

Chris Murphy

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/14140?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230917-ChrisMurphy-MurphyTandemSept-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230917-ChrisMurphy-MurphyTandemSept-Pros-sl1&akid=11968%2E9716520%2EAdJH4k)

| Chris Murphy has dedicated his career to serving the people of Connecticut. He's fought to create good-paying jobs, expand access to affordable health care, restore voting rights, and keep our kids safe from the nationwide epidemic of gun violence. Now, he needs your help to win re-election so he can continue to deliver for Connecticut and the entire nation.

_**[Chip in $5 now to help Chris Murphy and the DSCC win in Connecticut and defend our Democratic Senate majority>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/14140?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230917-ChrisMurphy-MurphyTandemSept-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230917-ChrisMurphy-MurphyTandemSept-Pros-sl1&akid=11968%2E9716520%2EAdJH4k)**_

name: Emilia Sykes HQ
subject: Standing with UAW →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress

name: Jon Tester
subject: We’re being outraised and outspent
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STOP GUN VIOLENCE PAC
body:
Montana is the battleground race that Mitch McConnell, billionaire-backed super PACs, and special interests are all focused on, and we know they’ll spend eye-popping amounts of money to defeat us.

| Peter —

**➡️ **Fox Business is reporting that Mitch McConnell-aligned super PACs raised **a record-breaking $50 million** in August.

**➡️ **To make matters worse, **the GOP is outspending our campaign** —they’re trying to buy Montana’s Senate seat and are already hammering voters with political ads that distort my record.

**➡️ **That’s on top of election experts calling our race a _**toss-up**_ and ranking me as the _**most vulnerable**_ Democratic senator running for reelection.

Montana is the battleground race that Mitch McConnell, billionaire-backed super PACs, and special interests are all focused on, and we know they’ll spend eye-popping amounts of money to defeat us.

But we’re proudly building this campaign from the ground up—with grassroots contributions from hardworking folks across the country. _**And that means whether or not we win could come down to you.**_

name: Letitia James
subject: I'm disappointed, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
Peter, I don't even know what happened here.
---
A few days ago, I reached out to this powerful community with an update – my midmonth deadline is getting closer and I need to raise $10,000 by midnight tonight.
From the get-go, dozens of supporters made donations to help me meet my goal. But then, out of nowhere, donations came to a standstill – causing us to be on the verge of falling short of our goal for September.
I’ll be honest: I’m disappointed that we may fall short of this goal, but I _refuse _to let it get the best of us. I’m confident in the size and strength of this grassroots team – **and that’s why I’m asking you to help us make up the gap on our final $1,328 left with only hours to go.**
Peter**, I’m counting on** _you_ to be one of the people I need to make a donation, so please: [**Will you donate any amount before 11:59 p.m. to support our fight for progress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69882238/427604276/-2022127741?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1186-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MThkMjNlMy02YTU1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mp3DBsbLmLzq3QbruWI7XYFeiuUDyzdKJ17h-_Llxmo=)

Letitia

From: **Letitia James**

Subject: Being honest with you, Peter

I just got out of a meeting with my finance team, and after crunching the numbers, we determined that we need to raise at _least_ $20,000 by Saturday to get back on track.
I rely on grassroots donors like you to keep my campaign charging full steam ahead, so I have to ask: **[Will you rush $5 by midnight tonight to help us continue our fight for progress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69882241/427604279/-2022127741?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1186-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MThkMjNlMy02YTU1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mp3DBsbLmLzq3QbruWI7XYFeiuUDyzdKJ17h-_Llxmo=)**

A few days ago, I reached out to this powerful community with an update – my midmonth deadline is getting closer and I need to raise $10,000 by midnight tonight. From the get-go, dozens of supporters made donations to help me meet my goal. But then, out of nowhere, donations came to a standstill – causing us to be on the verge of falling short of our goal for September. I’ll be honest: I’m disappointed that we may fall short of this goal, but I refuse to let it get the best of us. I’m confident in the size and strength of this grassroots team – and that’s why I’m asking you to help us make up the gap on our final $1,328 left with only hours to go. body:
They spent 50 years rolling back our rights. Now, they're trying to backpedal. |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69882372/427604525/1919270207?sourceid=1051947&refcode=20230917_FFHybridLaunch_v1s2&refcode2=WTEFE928&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzhkMjNlMy02YTU1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=clTjrrE16tsq2VXevd_I1ORHUI4gJQfzDdprBz4KlMY=) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69882373/427604526/1919270207?sourceid=1051947&refcode=20230917_FFHybridLaunch_v1s2&refcode2=WTEFE928&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzhkMjNlMy02YTU1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=clTjrrE16tsq2VXevd_I1ORHUI4gJQfzDdprBz4KlMY=) Peter,

**Republicans spent 50 years fighting to destroy our fundamental rights.** For five decades, they schemed and strategized to fill our courts with anti-choice judges, our legislatures with anti-choice politicians, and our media with anti-choice propaganda.

They passed laws, based on nothing but dangerous junk science, that shuttered abortion clinics. They funded so-called "crisis pregnancy centers" that prey on vulnerable women. They exploited every possible loophole to restrict as many abortions as possible — **until they didn't have to anymore. Because last year, their stolen, conservative-majority Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. name: Gavin Newsom
subject: We’re suing Big Oil… and it’s a Big Deal.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
I wanted you to hear it directly from me:

Friends —
I wanted you to hear it directly from me:
**California is suing five major oil companies for wreaking havoc on our planet and lying about the dangers of fossil fuels.**
For more than 50 years, Big Oil has been lying to us -- covering up the fact that they have long known how dangerous the fossil fuels they produce are for our planet.
Their coverup delayed our transition away from fossil fuels and squandered the limited time we had to avoid disasters like those Californians are now experiencing.
They have polluted the air.
They have given our kids asthma.
They have fueled the fires that choke our air with smoke.
They have contributed to a changing climate that has resulted in more drought, floods, extreme weather, the hottest temperatures on record, ocean acidification and put the very habitability of our planet at risk for future generations.
And they knew. For decades.
Now you might be asking yourself right now what price anyone paid for the lies that have cost billions and billions of dollars and many lives in California and across the country?
It's a good question. And the answer is ... no price. They have actually made record profits. Obscene amounts of money.
No more.
It is time to hold them accountable.
California’s taxpayers shouldn't have to foot the bill for wildfires wiping our entire communities, toxic smoke clogging our air, deadly heatwaves and record-breaking drought parching our heels.
We're going to take action to hold big polluters accountable, and I thought you'd want to know that.
Thank you,
Gavin
* * *
👋🏻 **Hi. Please don’t click away just yet.** 🌱
Oil companies paid to qualify for a ballot initiative in California that would let them drill next to schools, daycares and homes. If everyone reading this donated just $20 to help us beat them at the ballot box, we’ll keep millions of kids safe from their pollution.
**[If that sounds worth $20, please make a donation to Gavin Newsom’s ballot measure committee today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ggn-em-april23-oil?refcode=em230917&refcode2=1570_4767699_rsfVcl&akid=1570%2E4767699%2ErsfVcl)**
_If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $20](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ggn-em-april23-oil?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=em230917&refcode2=1570_4767699_rsfVcl&akid=1570%2E4767699%2ErsfVcl)**
---
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ggn-em-april23-oil?express_lane=true&refcode=em230917&refcode2=1570_4767699_rsfVcl&akid=1570%2E4767699%2ErsfVcl)**
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=1570%2E4767699%2ErsfVcl).
PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
1787 Tribute Road, Suite K
Sacramento, CA 95815

body:
Good Morning,
I wanted to make sure you saw Joe's email below.
Joe has been working tirelessly to raise the funds we need this quarter. Please chip in whatever you can afford so we can flip this seat RED and send a real American patriot to Congress!

Anything helps.
Thank you,
Erin Van Natta
Field Organizer
Joe Kent for Congress

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
**From:** Joe Kent
**Sent:** Saturday, September 16, 2023 4:06 PM
**Subject:** The truth about Marie's climate vote.
Dear Peter,
Marie continues to lie about her voting record. She's already lied about gun rights, and now she is lying about her vote for Biden's climate agenda.
She voted to stop the Preserving Choice in Vehicle Purchases Act from going to the floor. She supports the Biden administration forcing Americans to transition to electric vehicles while shipping 500,000 jobs to China.
If you believe we need to send a conservative Republican to Congress, please help me get to Washington by contributing to my campaign at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/X763Za7rJJMMoJs2iDsdMdsA/RVLVhmLeIP8kfWDtDu70sA).
That's not all - she signed a letter advocating for the transition of rural communities to electric vehicles. She is fully on board with the Left's Green New Deal climate agenda which will deprive Americans of their choice in transportation and make us fully dependent on China.
Help me with a donation today at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/X763Za7rJJMMoJs2iDsdMdsA/RVLVhmLeIP8kfWDtDu70sA)/.
Marie continues to lie about her voting record because she knows it is not aligned with the voters of Washington's Third District.
Please help me expose Marie's voting record by donating today at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/X763Za7rJJMMoJs2iDsdMdsA/RVLVhmLeIP8kfWDtDu70sA). You can also opt to make it a recurring contribution by clicking the "Make this Monthly" button.
I will fight against the Democrat's climate agenda and our dependence on China.
You can help get a conservative Republican into Congress by donating today at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/X763Za7rJJMMoJs2iDsdMdsA/RVLVhmLeIP8kfWDtDu70sA).
Will you please help me meet our goal so we can send a common-sense conservative to Congress?
Respectfully,
Joe Kent
