Hello,
$5.
That’s the amount I am humbly asking you to chip in to my campaign today to help me defeat Lauren Boebert. Yes, just $5.
$5 because last year, I lost to Lauren Boebert by just 546 votes.
$5 because I’m running again, but our race was the closest race in the entire country.
$5 because the most recent poll of the campaign shows me LEADING Boebert, 50% to 48%.
And $5 because Lauren Boebert and her Super PAC allies are already attacking me, and I need your help to counter their lies if we’re going to win.
I know $5 might not seem like much, but together with tens of thousands of other grassroots donors like you, we out-raised Lauren Boebert and her corporate PAC supporters last quarter. We cannot stop here or let up.
We’ve set a goal to raise another $100,000 before our deadline at midnight tonight to defeat Boebert, and we are still just $25,350 away.

name: Joe Biden
subject: You’re invited, Peter:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Learn how to engage with your community about voter registration, volunteer efforts, and more. | | |
---
Hey, Peter -- Next week is National Voter Registration Day, so I want to personally invite you to the Reach Your People trainings the DNC is putting together. During the training, you’ll get the chance to learn how to engage with your community about voter registration, volunteer efforts, and more. We will give you the tools to become the person your friends, family, and neighbors go to for more information on when, where, and how to vote. [**So, what do you say, Peter? Will you sign up for a training this September and help make sure your friends and family are registered to vote on National Voter Registration Day?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/XlxiKm-amnZREMhISCI1HXgISUQ6kaMw7miBXrv1T3OQQ_H0cuiyrgmaeL2EDV_RJPrR8aTtn75_O4CV0wDRTwQkQa4GcyLYaU8g4LXEmRxxyhvZRe7IjU68nwcdsogObWS2y73zkQQC8Dx0eY0XyFVRqz8kSzosG5hiN2g7wnv1CSodKu4H9EQYIJqIaYEEPBy_5p4qV9_fDAdsJb00MvQwvfNesqSYUysLfOQ5A81iZQy1wsqokr81fBrIWUyzvgGBRRY8_C7Hm9xM0k17NrutS6sqvfpLcLjnZH9c-MZUVpAYjzhwKPFJzeNpDlifyUGvp12m0h5_GUP9V1f1F5ekp8bND-X57cBufzXiXNsPORYESxuhqxZ6ltnbSuwmQwCAxRbWS37BxT6ZbczRtRBgYDTIR4kKo_9tNNK1UnqC5ZRdxkyusIesajsU2BIasWBfAGbnZSKSzs1CZ1c_t_IxA3oIuux1Hkvb9ITlMbDbZYn3RjqDo4-KIFYTfVO5DGhEC0MoozGxQSnX2M0xjg/3zo/caYM5YAOSG-2EnNigz8Ypw/h0/kqoe-aD-rtO2L4k5M6GlSiPq_Jo_myHDin2VQOE6pyg) | | | [YES, I'M IN](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXVOu3lnO0Z3OvdURTkAMGmmUCZZY9zD8t0B1m_snsv9PC8RFyroC6KnBwOx5YiUEJK01CuXIJAU-A36hxX3Yhhy1Z1yo_mRQ7n_PHP3DpRkL8G_iYjH7NVvLN1EIP4w2ti-5BI6sRw8d2nrZDohfEqmJAKrFqeXZMHiQIdBQ8mFmANdNDFXBsxwt1eK8RhwuifJBNX8S7aFUJSgELYqvffh8GG3WtmU4LOvdgnR-Gi13bJHZOgSyla5QgzoFBb-6kk644X3kqd7sKtm03N61uvxQxNnY0Ijl0DXsFFfQF1YPQg1WY3iJ1B6ZpBzzsBXSUrqiTAUCqD2t9qPhxi6M_AiVrjEJGii2MOd1Us66WAiD9Apnqfo9LNzLIty2dbqZSkp56EpmnI-GVlSm90y42I8kBBe-QX9EKnZQBVhbGGJaiATwtmu62llpSWpxT57BzK51Yg59K65aZ9Lx5uHKSQ6CvEXm7m5nWWV92jJbFElPbfxMpwe3-DRPQJ4YbuUDHi5JbSq0bw0shTtvUMHY_2rG-bfh0zBgkMvNRYIxLdP7Y5xKZ5P599Eam8qgzCgpGrpwOPUvMDslYU_SHUBYeCkntfhkcl4myh8GJAJh6KFSp_MliHclbko1ebNaUQk8ydkKKTVnxecaJW4y4OU6QlMggNm8FuFaeyldIs-Ta-am/3zo/caYM5YAOSG-2EnNigz8Ypw/h1/58ReNQKrOgBXzv2tsNNfnVcCM4wP3DwVgg4kcCcdATc)

National Voter Registration Day is dedicated to making sure everyone has a chance to register to vote before the upcoming fall elections and the 2024 elections. Since the first celebration in 2012, more than 5 million Americans have registered to vote on this holiday -- and I know that together, we can get that number _even higher._
**As we build out this campaign, I want to make sure you and hundreds of thousands of our grassroots supporters can get involved -- no matter where you live or whether you’ve been a part of a campaign before. Because no one knows better the issues impacting your communities and how to convince your friends and neighbors to vote than you, Peter.**
[**So it would mean a whole lot to me if you’ll join Team DNC’s Reach Your People trainings today. Sign up now »**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/XlxiKm-amnZREMhISCI1HXgISUQ6kaMw7miBXrv1T3OQQ_H0cuiyrgmaeL2EDV_RJPrR8aTtn75_O4CV0wDRTwQkQa4GcyLYaU8g4LXEmRxxyhvZRe7IjU68nwcdsogObWS2y73zkQQC8Dx0eY0XyFVRqz8kSzosG5hiN2g7wnv1CSodKu4H9EQYIJqIaYEEPBy_5p4qV9_fDAdsJb00MvQwvfNesqSYUysLfOQ5A81iZQy1wsqokr81fBrIWUyzMHTyDhxQ6JOXhdPG3XUG4YuHPdvc2WqGdudepLn1J65cKNTsV7X20ZDnFeAG5TB-PiNMD2q_8qUALhIVIoTkmtCfYT1kYvyc3s3Z-vJNKwbWSh9g7-IXLUNIvCAPDVSNccHy4Xpv0RKaxUvyVproJjMd1EWuDs40s49xAjRtTVKuI5oV2uz16TX1oPwnJXfchM_Qr0U-e8nlHW_VKo0-aCKF5CGPZDAnuPYjkMj-vndpEaAu3gDpGXiLJqtEZzRz2o8XtvLsaJ_zLbkYQiUIwQ/3zo/caYM5YAOSG-2EnNigz8Ypw/h2/gMbIBuqJM6ucnP7Y_TukKEicaBQQBFSZ7IVJ1T30we8)

Joe

clean_body: Learn how to engage with your community about voter registration, volunteer efforts, and more. | | | Hey, Peter -- Next week is National Voter Registration Day, so I want to personally invite you to the Reach Your People trainings the DNC is putting together. During the training, you’ll get the chance to learn how to engage with your community about voter registration, volunteer efforts, and more. We will give you the tools to become the person your friends, family, and neighbors go to for more information on when, where, and how to vote. | | | National Voter Registration Day is dedicated to making sure everyone has a chance to register to vote before the upcoming fall elections and the 2024 elections. Since the first celebration in 2012, more than 5 million Americans have registered to vote on this holiday -- and I know that together, we can get that number even higher. As we build out this campaign, I want to make sure you and hundreds of thousands of our grassroots supporters can get involved -- no matter where you live or whether you’ve been a part of a campaign before. Because no one knows better the issues impacting your communities and how to convince your friends and neighbors to vote than you, Peter. Thanks for being part of this team, Joe Joe Biden

| | Here's the best way to celebrate Constitution Day: let's recruit, train, and elect folks ready and willing to uphold our constitutional rights! Ever wait in a really long line to vote? Or when you got to the front, they ran out of ballots? Or half the machines are down and you're on your lunch break? [**Our elections can't function without good people in office. So, let's find them and get them elected!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69901536/427641708/-327605227?refcode=2023-09-17-constitution-day&recurring=&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=17867f76-8a55-ee11-9937-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzg2N2Y3Ni04YTU1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h5dkfBHhgSucp8cOtoNk6AaJAG_JxuDiW4L7nPdSslY=) The nitty gritty part of a good-functioning democracy means clipboards are stacked, resources are allocated, extra ballots are in the backroom, and a whole staff is in place before dawn and still working after dusk. clean_body: | | | | Here's the best way to celebrate Constitution Day: let's recruit, train, and elect folks ready and willing to uphold our constitutional rights! Ever wait in a really long line to vote? Or when you got to the front, they ran out of ballots? Or half the machines are down and you're on your lunch break? = The nitty gritty part of a good-functioning democracy means clipboards are stacked, resources are allocated, extra ballots are in the backroom, and a whole staff is in place before dawn and still working after dusk. Because, let's face it: we've seen our democracy challenged in unprecedented ways. But, strong, pro-democracy leaders calling the shots means towns and counties won't bow to extremist right-wing pressure. = = We all want speedy, open, and transparent elections in 2024 — but first, we need every commissioner, county clerk, and poll worker role filled. = Onward, Movement Labs | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Rapid Resist Action. subject: I’m so proud of my daughter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOANNA WEISS FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69901932/427642643/-1695430967?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjc3MTkzZmMtOGI1NS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7oqAGhG6dG7sWsQMxexqtE7Q98vzsswjl8bONVa3EVI=)
Hi Peter -- it’s Jim Joyce, Joanna’s dad.

This is the first time I’m reaching out to Joanna’s supporters, and I am so honored she asked me to do so.

As some of you may know, I was a Naval Flight Officer during the Vietnam War. The military gave me a lot – I relied on veterans’ services to get back on my feet and support my family.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69901933/427642644/-129347026?refcode=em-9.17.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjc3MTkzZmMtOGI1NS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7oqAGhG6dG7sWsQMxexqtE7Q98vzsswjl8bONVa3EVI=) _At Joanna’s campaign kickoff event in February._
But it wasn’t always smooth sailing. When Joanna was born, I was unemployed. Medicaid helped pay our bills, and we depended on food stamps. I’m not ashamed of needing this help, I – like a lot of Americans – fell on hard times after serving.

**That’s why I’m disgusted to see how Republicans continue to play games with our veterans.** Instead of honoring the men and women who put their lives on the line to serve our country, they slash funding of government programs our veterans depend on, make it harder for them to feed their families and keep roofs over their heads – the list goes on and on.

For a Party that claims their support of the troops is unrivaled, they don’t blink an eye when they support corporate interests on the backs of veterans. Even now, House Republicans are threatening a government shutdown that would furlough thousands of federal workers and cost the economy billions if they don’t get their extremist policies passed.

**It’s absolutely clear Republicans don’t have veterans’ backs, let alone the people of CA-47.** That’s why I’m so proud of my daughter, Joanna. I know she’ll take my story and yours to the halls of Congress and fight to protect veterans and all Americans.

**[Will you join me in supporting my daughter and chip in $3 before midnight? Your gift will go a long way to keep this district blue, stop Republicans from prioritizing corporate interests, and even could help us flip the House majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69901934/427642645/-129347026?refcode=em-9.17.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjc3MTkzZmMtOGI1NS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7oqAGhG6dG7sWsQMxexqtE7Q98vzsswjl8bONVa3EVI=)**

clean_body: | = Hi Peter -- it’s Jim Joyce, Joanna’s dad. This is the first time I’m reaching out to Joanna’s supporters, and I am so honored she asked me to do so. As some of you may know, I was a Naval Flight Officer during the Vietnam War. The military gave me a lot – I relied on veterans’ services to get back on my feet and support my family. = At Joanna’s campaign kickoff event in February. But it wasn’t always smooth sailing. When Joanna was born, I was unemployed. Medicaid helped pay our bills, and we depended on food stamps. I’m not ashamed of needing this help, I – like a lot of Americans – fell on hard times after serving. That’s why I’m disgusted to see how Republicans continue to play games with our veterans. Instead of honoring the men and women who put their lives on the line to serve our country, they slash funding of government programs our veterans depend on, make it harder for them to feed their families and keep roofs over their heads – the list goes on and on. For a Party that claims their support of the troops is unrivaled, they don’t blink an eye when they support corporate interests on the backs of veterans. Even now, House Republicans are threatening a government shutdown that would furlough thousands of federal workers and cost the economy billions if they don’t get their extremist policies passed. It’s absolutely clear Republicans don’t have veterans’ backs, let alone the people of CA-47. That’s why I’m so proud of my daughter, Joanna. I know she’ll take my story and yours to the halls of Congress and fight to protect veterans and all Americans. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you for your support, Jim | Joanna's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! To chip in to Joanna's campaign = To learn more about Joanna, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . PAID FOR BY JOANNA WEISS FOR CONGRESS Joanna Weiss for Congress PO Box 90634 Long Beach, CA 90809 United States

FP Team Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won over 30 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible.** = = Contributions or gifts to the Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions to the Fairness Project support its many efforts nationwide and any focus is at the Fairness Project’s sole discretion. Contributions will not necessarily be used to support activity in any one state. You can request to get only the most important emails from our team , or you can . name: Team Cori
subject: Demand a humane environment for incarcerated people in heat waves:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Rep. Cori Bush called for an investigation into heat conditions in U.S. detention facilities. | |
---
Peter, We recently experienced the hottest month ever recorded. With more extreme heat waves coming due to climate change, prisons and jails are locking people up in deadly heat. Rep. Cori Bush and Democrats on the House Oversight Committee called for a bipartisan investigation into heat conditions in U.S. detention facilities during this crisis. **In Texas, over 40 incarcerated people died during this summer’s heat wave**. Despite temperatures regularly soaring above triple digits in the state’s detention facilities, 70% of the state’s prisons and jails lack air conditioning. Many other states are also failing incarcerated people when it comes to providing cooling during heat waves. **In detention facilities, inadequate cooling is deadly and inhumane**. Incarcerated people and staff also experience debilitating effects of heat-based illness, which can be intolerable. Heat also degrades physical and mental health over time, and it's linked to an increase in suicide attempts among people incarcerated in Texas during the summer months. [**Sign now to demand human rights for incarcerated people. The Federal Bureau of Prisons, Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE), and counties and states across the country must provide adequate cooling so people no longer die from extreme heat while trapped in detention facilities.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm3NzCN_YwUWNXcCjUUYv9qukzQXtfUNw__Xv-qrs0tvz-erMyuwXU96Zkb46PN8-5Fx0LkFwYHDdIVewUScrpEFpaVQXEh3hY5LgycCAcMSG1sM4bwp92vWDumzCAC20f5dK6y0aEV6hmwTYu9NVRFr-np9L1STXY9NAMOogZIi84gSBkrJ0D8UmCYq0EHh-FwpcnXDsVEQIKR1PjsTaDdxRtqHtAo8dzJk7DSDQyDitCAdcCmds6hU8PEUznqqyfq3Zw1Dg10Vlp3DVhb1Da5Qh7IM8MArvBSeNDf9zH6nk6K8Jiq9SNmKTG3mkQGg-lBPEr_cQ21j_U3DkCxlbXC8eFbTCVxf-SzYKtALGQFTSrALxN1xemfgHd_-J_fPgc/3zo/WF-8aPZCSvqi8PpGLOk5xg/h0/AonSaNsBDzAk8NWr6AvtHFh3PjUgaHQRLBIF_7Ps89g) [****](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mxokhkPMGUzy4oQHYXguIURtmxnIVjzR0p2BCQ82muRLGSywoVda7gSme9RImfKboxY3h6knKO59pWGxZ1pkCoVd1gIePM9uDHIczFTFub9go-6tQsNeubJHwRNGci7nxva3jMQa2FU_duELKmUgX_AedLxHpZUmk4FcF35yO9M8XZbX0fmvpirRYwe_NZ5qv8_WyFCOIEVLhsjirZ94raJl6ZmWdDVnDvrEAQ1dm-NfFsv05KkSVACn2GjC9a4HpyRVz2-UWLGr4pHyfB68fDlw5Khlz7_QAo_wb2Y6EIkRI5HpDiQUR1gsXX3izVsBhxPK_kuunpQcQvinyfT7yv4IxD_9g0pfWhUOIZBIqwXmZRk2DunhIajyzoNnbbiEXHceGNIHrD77ufhIlJ3PWMeIVrp_c3mwpaN5gDqlQ857yMFlUIoryTfgD6ysjkia_ZxoLV2iBUWpuA6HUAGWvhdvpNewaROR4sUhkE5pbhHBK4SDlnpZT-BtMq7IrzkufRttTJCkOcX7iNoeJ5YJs7jVROXNuHkTaaJmuY2ZAmKM/3zo/WF-8aPZCSvqi8PpGLOk5xg/h1/jSDw9RaTYW4aUz_ipZwXsufSW2W3Buo8_-7xGd2wTPI) **[SIGN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm3NzCN_YwUWNXcCjUUYv9qukzQXtfUNw__Xv-qrs0tv_owJtYJaXxG_zCjnqHbfQelETnS7RBRumP277yR0zY6rierxs41gSyTujlKhbUgNrI0_nv9TC5wD6KjO9dz3o3alp3HuCqWrwURixsWa-N2cwFu1h-TfDiFNl5j4HSRxQYk0y1VlXRQmVmCQ-fMwk2Q1lzl5PYqIkVbbVVLc1prNCCysAY2CnBz-Zem0d0Eang8eTTROVmdZNMlqZTYKFb-H9GmYRY14IBZ9qFD3fLp1CibAopFWipRj_oKhEv9pJiPDMJcKI3tlQhDNGnFdSaePiybJtz3kgcTc2ewwQJ2PX1UBIDbwQ1WR6T9M-CX03mAvvupKWAr6C_ULe0gV4k/3zo/WF-8aPZCSvqi8PpGLOk5xg/h2/IoHU3N04dhoDZUS1TkVoJRTDSRhitgLtPJKeqNbfXPs) ** **** With rising temperatures, states and our federal government are trapping people in dangerous and cruel conditions. As Amite Dominick, founder of Texas Prisons Community Advocates, says: “ _We have people going in for unpaid parking tickets and [drug] possession charges, and they end up getting a death sentence because of the heat._ ” **This is an outrageous violation of people's human rights and civil rights.** Texas has protocols for heat waves -- such as providing fans, extra water, ice, and cold showers -- but doesn’t follow them. With poor ventilation in detention facilities, it often gets hotter than the outdoors. And according to the CDC, fans don't protect against heat-related illness when it's above 95 degrees. Instead, the “strongest protective factor” against heat-related illness and death is air conditioning. Even a few hours a day in air conditioning makes a big difference. Our unjust criminal legal system dehumanizes people who are incarcerated. But people behind bars are some of the most marginalized in society. They are our family members and our neighbors, and they are human beings who deserve protection. [**We can’t let people continue to die from heat in prisons and jails. Please sign now to demand that U.S. detention facilities create a humane environment for incarcerated people, including by providing air conditioning.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm3NzCN_YwUWNXcCjUUYv9qukzQXtfUNw__Xv-qrs0tv7N84rYlS0jsIaQA5nljvth4xybddMAeV3Pez1mtO3gdB_pbtum5Yg1xfgfXLKw0mtXjNm4ETuatpDvWOFMLl6TcrtaBCcBUGnRJKcZ-29aCyePTsppxsRUAAmoX6gk9Y5A8RdWDlN_j4avZiHcYstSlJ-9CwdDmImQ63sC10gD3VMu6NP5PiH0IetjaJNJewrA8y-DNl5kho6COorfZUbDy4EX9KvG8nVTAtmArABHL_uoIOv0J5XDwU9WAdd_x-pPL0T1jZbmg9GAMmHZEL7IAgewHKGhybEznC6zCQSwyfGwPPnDbcBI6103WPeu1-oDOYkzKNmHzuRK34dVCMGE/3zo/WF-8aPZCSvqi8PpGLOk5xg/h3/gOW99zE3T5_fL6FMxwLZO8kpTvZuDlfVM8i9P2aFw9g) In solidarity, Team Cori **[SUPPORT OUR MOVEMENT](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wvRAHDO4Li_8QrWN2fSLqnofIZl0Ea1cC_fOsc1BgI7tBRAMlbv-A-koDrVQ4FkAMA9OYsJvMDIRsr2-4lLOvw7vorGhxNx8BjyczyUJTg3GrZTx-eMl4IDIyah37Z2h9azBsUtvEYgh_lRc3ABbhAKpE6ClHQyBXPSDIyvCRs9Dj_lf4RcSvkEHh-lIJ-YWBezLVrBNLoGY5TexmfBKpTOXveQNX8_4oN5ziwC0Wp2AFbBA73yJK3r89UJ_D-tqrS9KyB1bH3pAoSty36h8AJyMISIE1lQvPa-IX6arwCjPvolVIIJ9Zzt1TOZJps6QEx8wswCY4R1402ZiMI5CeGkAAU6XbuCTNppFubzWHOpWsOpHGjijS1yy9fS1JwPghUdB2FugcdUSe3YOP9wvICqeEAccqA5dK_uD5Xp6rDVLp6bUs-gXMRR0raBfSEunw/3zo/WF-8aPZCSvqi8PpGLOk5xg/h4/FFXxIzYNqyeHPCCH5wdpDdIFudTcmQ80Q47zYrUBWDs) **

Fall is here!
That means pumpkins, Halloween candy, and cooler weather. It also means we’re a little over a year away from Election Day.
We’ve been saying it from the start: this campaign is a marathon, not a sprint.
This is one of the most competitive districts in the country. Like in 2022, this race could come down to a razor-thin margin. Every door we knock on and every person we reach makes a difference.
Kirsten's platform of fighting for reproductive rights, investing in climate solutions, and strengthening our economy resonates with voters in AZ-06.
But to win, we have to get her message out. And building a campaign that has the infrastructure to register new voters, reach undecided folks , and mobilize our base takes time.
We've been working hard to make this happen since we launched in April — and your grassroots support has been critical. But we still have a long way to go.
One of the best ways you can continue to support our campaign is with a small recurring donation.
Even if it's just a couple of dollars a month, being able to rely on your recurring donation makes a big difference. We've got a year to go, but every day makes a difference. name: AdamSchiff.com
subject: Is there *anything* we can say?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| What if we told you that Mitch McConnell’s allies just reported raising nearly $50 million in the last month alone to retake the Senate?
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=3912%2E5257348%2EZODfFw)
Derek —
Is there _anything_ we can say to convince you to **[chip in before midnight to help hit Adam’s $75,000 fundraising goal?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=sep2023_abs_em.H56YJI&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230917_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=4&akid=3912%2E5257348%2EZODfFw)**
What if we told you that Mitch McConnell’s allies just reported raising **nearly $50 million in _the last month alone_** to retake the Senate?
Or that **every major GOP presidential contender** will be coming to California before our FEC deadline?
Or what if we told you that **the next GOP presidential debate will be right here, less than two weeks from today** , broadcast live from the Reagan Library in Southern California?
**Or that Donald Trump is barnstorming through the state, rallying voters and donors at the California Republican Party statewide convention, and holding an up to $23,200-per-couple fundraiser in Costa Mesa to boost his numbers before the FEC deadline at the end of the month?**
It’s all true, Derek.
Republicans know how important California is. That we will help decide the House majority, and whether or not Kevin McCarthy remains as House Speaker.
And that if we elect Adam as our next U.S. Senator, Trump and his cronies will have a much more difficult time getting away with their constant unethical conduct and abuses of power. That’s why they have been so relentless in their attacks, and why we’re asking:
**[We can’t hit our goal without your support, Derek, so we hope you’re convinced why this is so important. Please, chip in $3 or any amount before midnight.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=sep2023_abs_em.H56YJI&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230917_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=5&akid=3912%2E5257348%2EZODfFw)**

| | Derek, Almost every headline I see these days is a stark reminder of our potential reality if Republicans take control of the Virginia Senate and House of Delegates in November. I just saw another one that read: **“Republicans eyeing a 15-week abortion ban.”** This is a pretty clear signal it will be one of their top legislative priorities if they take full control in Richmond this November. Republicans must think Virginians will sit by and accept a 15-week abortion ban. But we know that Virginians’ real consensus is that **private medical decisions belong with women and their doctors, not politicians.** _****[If you agree, chip in $5 to help elect Democrats to the General Assembly and protect access to reproductive health care>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69902878/427645994/-916648441?refcode=mw_em_230917_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzE0Y2QzMC05MDU1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8MkpuuVhuKBIp5SNGPW2mQZI1ls5Tzo3j6Nn8bLwHo4=)****_ And it’s not just Virginia. clean_body: if we don’t secure a Democratic majority | | | Derek, Almost every headline I see these days is a stark reminder of our potential reality if Republicans take control of the Virginia Senate and House of Delegates in November. I just saw another one that read: “Republicans eyeing a 15-week abortion ban.” This is a pretty clear signal it will be one of their top legislative priorities if they take full control in Richmond this November. Republicans must think Virginians will sit by and accept a 15-week abortion ban. But we know that Virginians’ real consensus is that private medical decisions belong with women and their doctors, not politicians. **= And it’s not just Virginia. In state after state, it’s clear that voters want the freedom to access reproductive care – and since we’re the last state in the South without some form of an abortion restriction, we have a duty to women in our neighboring states coming to us for help to stop this terrifying reality from happening. But in order to do so, we need to dig deep these next couple months and give our Democratic candidates across the Commonwealth the support they need to win in November. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: ****=**** ****=**** ****=**** ****=**** ****=**** ****=**** Thank you, Mark Warner = | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

...The _ENTIRE_ _AVERAGE_ of all polls in existence – even the ones paid for by Democrat and RINO enemies who try to make us look terrible – shows that we’re crushing Biden nationwide.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Hi there, A few days ago, we sent around a petition asking you to stand with President Biden in light of the Republican-led House’s impeachment inquiry. In the coming weeks, we expect to see a wave of Republicans come out in support of impeachment -- especially as we close in on the 2024 election. It’s nothing short of a partisan hit job led by extremists like Marjorie Taylor Greene, who continue to put politics over people. This shouldn’t surprise us though, folks. Greene has been plotting to impeach President Biden since his first day in office: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69903482/427648068/746249530?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjU5YzJmMS05NDU1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-j29ajuKz22BUjgIIcS8eMiaQXyRkm0m52FopBRUzpk=&emci=a9b1c7eb-9455-ee11-9937-00224832e811&emdi=7b59c2f1-9455-ee11-9937-00224832e811&ceid=26828920) President Biden has been a staunch defender of voting rights in the face of Donald Trump’s unprecedented attacks on our democracy - and has always put people over politics. name: Dan Kildee
subject: What we’ve accomplished, and our unfinished work
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF DAN KILDEE
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69903855/427649317/972226503?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTFiN2IzMi05NjU1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y6TuwL9wF2yDw6T7Ym9ddmL-rD2bvpx45rlQ8sS53hg=) Hey there, it’s Congressman Dan Kildee. These last few weeks, I’ve been traveling all across Michigan’s 8th Congressional District talking to constituents. I know too many people are struggling every day to pay for housing, groceries and prescription drugs. Every family should be able to get ahead, not just live paycheck-to-paycheck. That’s why I’m focused in Congress on lowering costs for working families. I was proud to help lead the fight to get Medicare to finally negotiate the cost of prescription drugs and cap the price of insulin for seniors. My daughter lives with type-1 diabetes, so I’ve seen firsthand how the high price of insulin hurts families – and I’ll continue the fight to lower the cost of this life-saving drug for _every_ Michigander who needs it. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69903856/427649318/2025394003?refcode=email_091723_Headlines&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTFiN2IzMi05NjU1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y6TuwL9wF2yDw6T7Ym9ddmL-rD2bvpx45rlQ8sS53hg=) I’m also focused on public safety — because every single person deserves to feel safe in their community as they go about their lives. That’s why I was proud to deliver millions of dollars to help mid-Michigan police departments make critical equipment upgrades, improve officer training, and better meet the public safety needs of our communities. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69903857/427649319/2025394003?refcode=email_091723_Headlines&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTFiN2IzMi05NjU1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y6TuwL9wF2yDw6T7Ym9ddmL-rD2bvpx45rlQ8sS53hg=) Finally, I was proud to bring home federal funding to support fire departments in Saginaw and Bay counties. These funds will help local fire departments obtain critically needed emergency vehicles, equipment, protective gear, and other necessary supplies. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69903858/427649320/2025394003?refcode=email_091723_Headlines&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTFiN2IzMi05NjU1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y6TuwL9wF2yDw6T7Ym9ddmL-rD2bvpx45rlQ8sS53hg=) [_**I first ran for Congress to deliver real results to mid-Michigan, and I’m proud of what we’ve been able to get done. But we have a lot more work to do – and we need to take back the House next year to get it done. So will you chip in $5 to help me keep my seat in Congress, take back the House, and bring more progress and results back home to Michigan?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69903859/427649321/2025394003?refcode=email_091723_Headlines&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTFiN2IzMi05NjU1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y6TuwL9wF2yDw6T7Ym9ddmL-rD2bvpx45rlQ8sS53hg=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69903860/427649322/2025394003?refcode=email_091723_Headlines&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTFiN2IzMi05NjU1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y6TuwL9wF2yDw6T7Ym9ddmL-rD2bvpx45rlQ8sS53hg=)

| [ ](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=d5a9971905f74c9c881db39efb75026d&_e=f8WlPlQoZOH62snukqmX2uZXGRdit3JSHD_RYmps2cLbrKOeJxqfvX3U4Kx0o7LbPOgVcr_qrBTf0iC1ix6rB5EJDazteG-98Y-HmLHnTh5d-9jMvr5bOs-6o7rAvWHYvufpxH0nL14gQYQzWjxtG1oXJVV1pg-MDru6wHXaGMxOOScDCNodErgonEgC7l0vj_Z4IBwkNhGypozV10KcoF3rWJwYFCNA73C2fJl73434rkWwAXw11zPOb1P7dtkJiwyr6pTB1vbLZO_CBydn_fAoQgAiCrcA38uytpWAFNw%3D)
---
Hello,

It's Constitution Day, and it also happens to be Chuck's birthday.

Our country's founders fought for freedom and liberty. The delegates in Philadelphia at the Constitutional Convention created our system of checks and balances to ensure a government of limited powers in our Constitutional republic.

My husband is working harder than ever to ensure future generations grow up in the country we love and are blessed to call home. We want your children and grandchildren to achieve the American Dream.

Chuck hears from Iowans across our beloved state that families are working harder than ever to make ends meet and to get ahead and stay ahead. Too many people feel the deck is stacked against them.

**[Can you chip in today to wish Chuck a happy birthday and let him know you've got his back?](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=d5a9971905f74c9c881db39efb75026d&_e=f8WlPlQoZOH62snukqmX2uZXGRdit3JSHD_RYmps2cLbrKOeJxqfvX3U4Kx0o7LbPOgVcr_qrBTf0iC1ix6rB5EJDazteG-98Y-HmLHnTh5d-9jMvr5bOs-6o7rAvWHYJ6e-YQyCoVltaE-bSbWzSY9c1ksiajdyP2uNpezQBNLIM-Lz_6B_FSvJbZ_YkZbWW4m6z59h8Lnddp-DD82_s31Gtv38KRQxYIyPyP5SCh1RkpCv71s2KXPiQTBG2PyCcqHZNvUoTO7phN_vIHQcZYnazrS7fSWdqKc_IbzHKbQ%3D)
**
| [**WISH CHUCK A HAPPY BIRTHDAY!**](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=d5a9971905f74c9c881db39efb75026d&_e=f8WlPlQoZOH62snukqmX2uZXGRdit3JSHD_RYmps2cLbrKOeJxqfvX3U4Kx0o7LbPOgVcr_qrBTf0iC1ix6rB5EJDazteG-98Y-HmLHnTh5d-9jMvr5bOs-6o7rAvWHYNxeiWW7evgXoNvHLwkLjvJHmL1fyS5QcBnC5vI6P0mAxtjafIJQyfnzZb0HlRLEMriR5XsWIMM4TIdXZAThn6kI4X1i0t2nZEMDNnq1yVjs5S4yw4TodLDVWpmUQnK8_yHglKT2ZMo93FHYwjpUVQLTD3ZWeejGqQoGK4WiHsUw%3D)

Ted Cruz Goes to War Against Barbie
Tired of beefing with Big Bird, Ted Cruz has set his sights on a new imaginary enemy: Barbie.
In a recent podcast appearance, Cruz alleged that the Barbie movie is brainwashing young girls with Chinese propaganda.
This bizarre attack comes after Cruz spent the last few years picking fights with Bud Light and Big Bird instead of working for the people of Texas.
Look, Ted should be focused on the real issues Texans face – health care access, rising energy costs, gun violence, and much more – not Barbie.
It’s time to send Ted Cruz into retirement. We’re asking you to support Roland Gutierrez, the Democratic TX State Senator running to work hard for Texas. Will you pitch in $10 or more to help send Cruz packing? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]

name: Team WFP
subject: Let’s catch you up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter, It’s time for the WFP monthly newsletter, where we catch you up on the state of our movement and how we’re fighting — and winning — together. Keep reading for updates on important elections, legislation, the labor movement, and how you can help.
* * *
**_ENDORSEMENT ALERTS_** **Pennsylvania Governor Josh Shapiro has officially endorsed Philadelphia City Councilmember Kendra Brooks for re-election!** Kendra made history in 2019 when she won her seat as a member of the Working Families Party, earning more votes than any Republican running for City Council At-Large and becoming the first third-party City Councilmember in the city’s modern history. [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDOtQ-fJkzV5RTNGeuO94QgQWnVOTxhXxjtO7zZmlqMK23VAa3Z2c0U3ztkLQI_cCirtUdFa01xoEnZmiM5jiYCzSp5El9flwode96o-moSPWnPhzFhnSAcGQnEBxsYf592bMPc9mrv_mEeoB93AqWXrcCjWAd1QO-KriX-ITX0e8VNckbA8UFtM7h6qJFFnK2Ph4Wqyv_yPj5jjCOkhW_PJuYs4FRawCMKIU2rMKVZQysAo3-rvEueAahgihgV0GEfB7hoSCkLzqTGN6-Ppqaap5ObE5n6UuapeLF-fdYeNC7ZiIsFu1xSKhsa1OCZL9H9k9rxqxD0atstp2xTwy2pM/3zo/ZjiCVZ0cQ32zjvjxVztqfQ/h0/vAZ-vMG3L5dcWpPMvQAirqEfeG9r66HKdLV4xaAE-W4) **Governor Shapiro’s endorsement shows the strength of our movement, despite threats by the chair of the city’s Democratic Party against endorsing Working Families Party candidates.[**Read more from _The Philadelphia Inquirer._**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDOtQ-fJkzV5RTNGeuO94QgQWnVOTxhXxjtO7zZmlqMK23VAa3Z2c0U3ztkLQI_cCirtUdFa01xoEnZmiM5jiYCzSp5El9flwode96o-moSPWnMngGMMH_zUIk20-KIeA7RXPKxgUqfDh8x3Bm0ay-a9rTqIjOfbPQq5xS2FTPgKtmdW8Y3hLGLdxAviOVd17bq6QvN2kEektRgpX-D5Iq2_lqsLGI4TUWPZL1B_sDmy8NiOw5Q8VMQ7rCS7UIWt3Gkzwh9o7ZYdcrVI9DE77q33A4pKWbKOVDXGfO_e3jplmQFRAX1831ur19X-XWwMbPpEGF4AbYypQG8AtDJqqjgU/3zo/ZjiCVZ0cQ32zjvjxVztqfQ/h1/Rw6YjheqvZ0FF7smZKoklW143UrhbzQBooc1cvJvRFE)** Over the next two months, we’ll keep working hard to elect Kendra and Nicolas O’Rourke on the WFP line to build a Philadelphia for the many — and kick Republicans off the City Council! **We’re also proud to announce our endorsement of Rep. Delia Ramirez as she runs for re-election to the House of Representatives!** [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYU21vr5MiDx9zQnfSuQ9I--NiwZdLGH0GeAwwEVYlYZq2e8G4mLpiss-xRXrpE81Hwfp-fDnNF_3FBWJOKxWCLKBRXNGXXzSbL4mo-uA_l1K1XuA_tQ8eUzpQP17_wPzAyKTSns53lAkTDZQ_UVRArrU91O1NMjJin_Ck9ezSo-MpexKTiz-8Zs5QsrIYjtn-7JYPMc7Sq-xjpC_HjFVxnxs81SPQ1p9EH92IXivOqxk5fr10nwTAEwfnkFV8N3RbzRSdew3SQG0v1Vz5yEtDPRKhUeITjJoAGgCIuUMSGd3S2Bo1SHgsDbl2khex4-JzO9Wzx3I4eQCekCLiV0kJO515IgF7csfGBYlmudeRiWJ8/3zo/ZjiCVZ0cQ32zjvjxVztqfQ/h2/e47nlwwXkUyh6wfz4Sg6b3pYI7jb8A4SKo0tMFAj8CU) Since taking office, Delia’s been a relentless advocate for the millions of working people who can't afford to pay for lobbyists — sponsoring bills that meaningfully invest in affordable housing, immigration reform, healthcare expansion, public education, and more. And when she delivered WFP’s SOTU response earlier this year, she laid out a road map to a future that uplifts working people through advancements in economic, social, and racial justice, climate action, and a just foreign policy. Next year, thanks to amazing champions like Delia, we know that we can take back the House and win a Working Families majority.
* * *
**_SOLIDARITY FOREVER_** “Hot Labor Summer” might be coming to a close, but this movement is only picking up steam headed into the fall. **On Friday, workers with the United Auto Workers union began to strike against General Motors, Ford, and Stellantis.** The 150,000 members of the union are demanding pay increases, improved benefits and pensions, an end to the tiered wage system, and job security for all workers during the transition to electric vehicle production. **[Check out this clip from our solidarity rally with UAW, MoveOn, and other allies last week.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDE-osrDsyUs4KS0eRiq-k7Qs9wAoM0Ufbe2gPeDgBAZ6X4rH_AjjCMUCoN1jqpRlQeLpOm2jWR1vTW4TlvboD6w14Wbz_mSaoacqdmR2rDQe7wyq1_gBTQNNpc1vOFcGhPkTkxgIOFecuZZYdDh6i5vZnrPVaahL44ZIFN7pZxttJNXOC-RApjP3-ibltl3i8PuL_hlD8um9-7cBe0YcswaOIZ7OoxMCuIsy6iWmemfPpdB-AArasl96e92is165aXvB6zQb66Zsne1jrpYtj0qvigYYKikwuqWnsdEQBQyE/3zo/ZjiCVZ0cQ32zjvjxVztqfQ/h3/vgXvBAazlSRfAkPByRIMTGA7sZbXj01MyJCapdDugsY)** Or re-watch the full rally **[here.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDMdk0Xc5F3XT7oWSkA6eoLlm5P12nsUoiTiwox6_4xtDZNxFdHnlKPt2DWrLpRFJUa6eBFKVn0DOo80h3vOwA6xEhNgSq4_mTrv6KMke5Yd65lG5-NqgWXa00PnDXj4Fyi9eMX8i_15ENtQZ22q-KdxiBd4GkQmADXohzGvOS_jvqc3VwQL7k9LoDPzr6MlVbhtSZii5yJ78MMMKVld99YN1swMnq8ygMUDCDkLc4-wFa7j3vyHvuImE379TtRvvsB4xLc2l-DUM-p8vATaSvPq2DSqRrB5ShgGH762iHPEG7ymxr5qs8QNHNsXIdzzkyRLpSEp3wO4kZ9WmehGSvLE/3zo/ZjiCVZ0cQ32zjvjxVztqfQ/h4/oWGqw0abpwaCrKtGPvDgBUfdlb94ojtb3W7z3InwYYQ)** [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDE-osrDsyUs4KS0eRiq-k7Qs9wAoM0Ufbe2gPeDgBAZ6X4rH_AjjCMUCoN1jqpRlQeLpOm2jWR1vTW4TlvboD6w14Wbz_mSaoacqdmR2rDQesqfkAhod6TbdcfAZ72tcn--Xg88NQ_BEhvqoe3GIJCyGE6EbRiPptn6c2qJlRkvpgXuqUG0vNfaqIP4VZIQaGMvN1kWRvO0y6rOIaMse_oaVlOoImE1NN0LsHG6DwgQpsDGsB-R7gQsBVRKGF7ngOgEnbTFxRrq8kuV7GE4UH381MaghMduOscN20sSQQofC/3zo/ZjiCVZ0cQ32zjvjxVztqfQ/h5/rqAo8jtUMLXGsW1-5aa2KHimkLPJo74VF5qZFtN92vw) Want to stay up to date on the latest with the UAW strike? **Get updates from WFP by texting UAW to 30403.** In addition to the UAW, WFP activists and volunteers were proud to stand in solidarity with SAG-AFTRA this month, taking to the picket line as they and the WGA continue their fight for a fair contract. **_ELECTION RESULTS FROM OHIO, CONNECTICUT, AND RHODE ISLAND_** **Republicans in Ohio have been trying, yet again, to take away a person’s right to access abortion care and control their own body.** To sabotage a ballot measure this November that would enshrine abortion rights in the state Constitution, they added their own, earlier ballot measure that would require future measures to reach a 60% majority in order to pass — a clear threat to our democracy. **But voters turned out for a summer special election to solidly reject their attempt to diminish voter power!** Not only does this vote protect the value of a vote in Ohio, it prevents a major roadblock to enshrining abortion rights in this year’s General Election. **Connecticut held municipal primary elections on Tuesday, and we’re excited to share that all nine WFP-endorsed candidates won their races!** These local seats will determine so many of the important policy issues communities face, and we’re proud of every supporter across the state who threw down to make this happen. Unfortunately, WFP champion Aaron Regunberg came up short in his special election to represent Rhode Island’s 1st Congressional District. Despite this disappointment, Aaron and his team did so much to help inspire voters and volunteers in Rhode Island and nationwide to work to build a country for the many, not the few — even in the face of dark money smears and lobbyists attempting to buy their own candidate.
* * *
**_STOP COP CITY MOVEMENT SUBMITS 116,000 SIGNATURES TO MAKE THE BALLOT_** In Atlanta, the work continues to stop Cop City, the $90 million mock city where police forces can test weapons and explosives, helicopter landings, and further militarize law enforcement against communities. After the Atlanta City Council disregarded massive public outcry against Cop City earlier this year, we started the process to put the issue on the ballot to let the people of Atlanta decide for themselves. In order to make the ballot, we needed to collect 70,000 valid signatures from city residents. This was not an easy task, or a guarantee, especially with the municipal government fighting tooth and nail to damage our efforts, including arresting protestors. **But thanks to the support of people like you and volunteers and activists on the ground, we’re proud to say that earlier this week, we submitted more than 116,000 signatures to City Hall!** [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXTEBokwJ0izHXMWrpJl2hHzDXFsH7tqHVA2_3vDwt5wm1vfP_y0ezmtMTXqKqvBmEoleucaoL1hJFoY_Dus2nVO-QvKKvbIiFPJTw5KoOlroWykkcuuE3LpHZhyO1XVloKpBo4cvumdUAzT4l-Vw-ppTd_fFx27vKsuJ5Ox8yeJXNFqAjeMsCZITrKvXPoKmhn7iMTIOXAW9zyZgTc9bxutNXduv-YAurOkSCkl8fUi974MTNo3yyam7k7jzduWKE7D7uQiJIAKcv3xPFA1sHnSViKChEhTvoJhhLTImPvmg5OlSYmAoh6gqa0ONS2KxXzNd8sJ_rF9Gs6gbHwB-K84/3zo/ZjiCVZ0cQ32zjvjxVztqfQ/h8/0Khv2F9DquO6YKVxRhLa6rBe7_rb1MSTyZx4dMBY_5k) But the City Council and Mayor are acting up yet again. First, they included signature matching in their verification requirements, a blatant voter disenfranchisement tactic that the Democratic Party has historically opposed — including the Democratic Party of Georgia, which fought the practice in court in 2019. The city clerk is now refusing to start verifying the signatures at all. We're with Senator Warnock in demanding that the city verify eligible signatures and respect the will of the people. **Whatever they throw at us, we’ll persevere to ensure that Atlantans get to choose whether they want their money supporting the people or the police.**

clean_body: | | | Peter, It’s time for the WFP monthly newsletter, where we catch you up on the state of our movement and how we’re fighting — and winning — together. Keep reading for updates on important elections, legislation, the labor movement, and how you can help. ENDORSEMENT ALERTS Pennsylvania Governor Josh Shapiro has officially endorsed Philadelphia City Councilmember Kendra Brooks for re-election! Kendra made history in 2019 when she won her seat as a member of the Working Families Party, earning more votes than any Republican running for City Council At-Large and becoming the first third-party City Councilmember in the city’s modern history. Governor Shapiro’s endorsement shows the strength of our movement, despite threats by the chair of the city’s Democratic Party against endorsing Working Families Party candidates. Over the next two months, we’ll keep working hard to elect Kendra and Nicolas O’Rourke on the WFP line to build a Philadelphia for the many — and kick Republicans off the City Council! We’re also proud to announce our endorsement of Rep. Delia Ramirez as she runs for re-election to the House of Representatives! Since taking office, Delia’s been a relentless advocate for the millions of working people who can't afford to pay for lobbyists — sponsoring bills that meaningfully invest in affordable housing, immigration reform, healthcare expansion, public education, and more. And when she delivered WFP’s SOTU response earlier this year, she laid out a road map to a future that uplifts working people through advancements in economic, social, and racial justice, climate action, and a just foreign policy. Next year, thanks to amazing champions like Delia, we know that we can take back the House and win a Working Families majority. SOLIDARITY FOREVER “Hot Labor Summer” might be coming to a close, but this movement is only picking up steam headed into the fall. On Friday, workers with the United Auto Workers union began to strike against General Motors, Ford, and Stellantis. The 150,000 members of the union are demanding pay increases, improved benefits and pensions, an end to the tiered wage system, and job security for all workers during the transition to electric vehicle production. Or re-watch the full rally Want to stay up to date on the latest with the UAW strike? Get updates from WFP by texting UAW to 30403. In addition to the UAW, WFP activists and volunteers were proud to stand in solidarity with SAG-AFTRA this month, taking to the picket line as they and the WGA continue their fight for a fair contract. ELECTION RESULTS FROM OHIO, CONNECTICUT, AND RHODE ISLAND Republicans in Ohio have been trying, yet again, to take away a person’s right to access abortion care and control their own body. To sabotage a ballot measure this November that would enshrine abortion rights in the state Constitution, they added their own, earlier ballot measure that would require future measures to reach a 60% majority in order to pass — a clear threat to our democracy. But voters turned out for a summer special election to solidly reject their attempt to diminish voter power! Not only does this vote protect the value of a vote in Ohio, it prevents a major roadblock to enshrining abortion rights in this year’s General Election. Connecticut held municipal primary elections on Tuesday, and we’re excited to share that all nine WFP-endorsed candidates won their races! These local seats will determine so many of the important policy issues communities face, and we’re proud of every supporter across the state who threw down to make this happen. Unfortunately, WFP champion Aaron Regunberg came up short in his special election to represent Rhode Island’s 1st Congressional District. Despite this disappointment, Aaron and his team did so much to help inspire voters and volunteers in Rhode Island and nationwide to work to build a country for the many, not the few — even in the face of dark money smears and lobbyists attempting to buy their own candidate. STOP COP CITY MOVEMENT SUBMITS 116,000 SIGNATURES TO MAKE THE BALLOT In Atlanta, the work continues to stop Cop City, the $90 million mock city where police forces can test weapons and explosives, helicopter landings, and further militarize law enforcement against communities. After the Atlanta City Council disregarded massive public outcry against Cop City earlier this year, we started the process to put the issue on the ballot to let the people of Atlanta decide for themselves. In order to make the ballot, we needed to collect 70,000 valid signatures from city residents. This was not an easy task, or a guarantee, especially with the municipal government fighting tooth and nail to damage our efforts, including arresting protestors. But thanks to the support of people like you and volunteers and activists on the ground, we’re proud to say that earlier this week, we submitted more than 116,000 signatures to City Hall! But the City Council and Mayor are acting up yet again. First, they included signature matching in their verification requirements, a blatant voter disenfranchisement tactic that the Democratic Party has historically opposed — including the Democratic Party of Georgia, which fought the practice in court in 2019. The city clerk is now refusing to start verifying the signatures at all. We're with Senator Warnock in demanding that the city verify eligible signatures and respect the will of the people. Whatever they throw at us, we’ll persevere to ensure that Atlantans get to choose whether they want their money supporting the people or the police. CELEBRATE LABOR DAY WITH THE WFP This Labor Day, we kept up the fight for worker power and education. WFP Director of Strategy and Partnerships Nelini Stamp published an op-ed in The Guardian about another group of exploited workers in the entertainment industry — reality TV stars, who have been subjected to inhumane conditions and traumatic experiences in the making of some of our favorite shows. WFP NATIONAL DIRECTOR MAURICE MITCHELL SPEAKS WITH NONPROFIT QUARTERLY Earlier this month, WFP National Director Maurice Mitchell discussed movement-accountable government with Steve Dubb and Rithika Ramamurthy of Nonprofit Quarterly. They covered Maurice’s work as an organizer, his vision for the WFP, and how our grassroots movement can keep improving, growing, and influencing the world around us. UPCOMING EVENTS On Tuesday, September 26 at 6 PM ET/3 PM PT, our national text team will be reaching voters about priority races coming up, and the amazing candidates working to make this a country where everyone can thrive. No experience necessary! We’ll provide all the training you need to get started, and our organizers will be on deck for any questions you may have. Our next WFP Study Group: Reading for the Revolution will be focused on I Hope We Choose Love, A Trans Girl’s Notes from the End of the World by Kai Cheng Thom! With trans rights and lives under constant attack from the right, it’s more important than ever that we care for the trans people in our lives and in our communities. Join the meeting on Thursday, September 28 at 7 PM ET/4 PM PT to learn more. It’s not too early to sign up for our next WFP Welcome Gathering, taking place Saturday, October 21 at 2 PM ET/11 AM PT! Whether this is your first Welcome Gathering or you never miss a meeting, we’d love to see you as we build community and get concrete about how we’re growing the power we need to have an impact locally and nationally in this political movement. Thanks for tuning in for our WFP Newsletter! Every month, we band together to protect our rights, protect our planet, and protect our democracy — despite the corporate and extremist interests trying to stop us. In solidarity, Team WFP Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Working Families, please .

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: I’m far from finished fighting for New Mexico
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress
body:
I decided to run for Congress because I was fed up with hyper-partisanship and bad politics.

Gabe won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022, and is running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=6UGyTrQv9AbjulDDOLlZOZUDWJm1C5yLtveWeHjfnFff50HeiVoRXcF2O%2B4Eq2Vs6PVUuGxhs70uofkns0io41I5baP1FBqGN7D4g8uWDJoV5VVG1jCImq4YVD2KW899Y4imXTu2JhDWII5LP1OBKF%2Bz8gsUAKkO5G6d4qTDsrd71oH5vZnnbhvfLX0%2Fh79MNCusRPj0ANWwgEUTEWlJ9D5I9kWmuxqGoob4uwiWP5%2F4Vm2KdIuxRl9mpXFeroAlcQ4222f1d6qIn%2FC3c%2F9TGtt46PRNPUx4OTYneWCANjIIvk%2FMHj1p8ytzMMPQ0sRiC4ldzwxMcjbKJVfHxrF2TS5wVUQpqSgjKWs9FinAYd6ozwLMHh7sdASsIaig43pkP4K5U0mZC%2B043QKg87AguuswIBETvkSV2PSjPLeu%2FKQ%3D)
---
| |
---
I decided to run for Congress because I was fed up with partisan politics. The bottom line is I’m here to do what's best for the people of New Mexico.

Our district was short-changed last Congress — from missing out on funding for clean water to public safety. The people of New Mexico deserve better and that’s why I decided to step up and fight for our community.

[I’m running for reelection in 2024 because I’m far from finished getting things done for New Mexico. Will you chip in $10 and become a Founding Donor to my reelection campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69904020/427649921/-200813216?amount=10&source=GVFC-091723-FR-EM-LAUNCH-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjIyMmEyNS05OTU1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=90XBmufgd86PPN6gx0PxY3J_Alj_BWW0xTxtcMWwVUM=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

When we flipped NM-02 in 2022, I made a promise to myself (and to all of you) that I would never lose sight of what’s best for this district and our people.

**I’m proud to say that I’ve kept that promise.**

I’m proud to have started the **Bipartisan Southwest Caucus** alongside a Republican colleague. We have a common goal: to improve the lives of our communities back home.

_I’m committed to you. That means I am here to work on both sides of the aisle to get things done._ **But we need members who put politics aside to put you first.**

[I’m committed to putting aside partisan politics to get things done for my constituents, for New Mexico. Will you help me continue this work by becoming a Founding Donor to my reelection campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69904027/427649928/-200813216?amount=10&source=GVFC-091723-FR-EM-LAUNCH-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjIyMmEyNS05OTU1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=90XBmufgd86PPN6gx0PxY3J_Alj_BWW0xTxtcMWwVUM=)

Thank you. In these early days of my campaign, your support is more important than ever.

— Gabe
* * *
| KEEP GABE IN CONGRESS

Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. Now, Gabe is busy in Congress fighting for reproductive choice, economic opportunity, affordable healthcare, and the best interests of the people.

Gabe won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022, and is running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone.

name: James Carville
subject: I'm getting worried
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=674%2E552475%2EjeBIHz)
Hey y’all, it’s Carville.
I won’t take up too much of your time today, but I gotta talk to you real quick about a good friend of mine, Bob Casey -- who’s facing the toughest fight of his career in Pennsylvania.
Truthfully, I’m getting worried about this race. Mitch McConnell is recruiting a mega-millionaire hedge fund exec to run against Bob, and if this guy jumps in, he could start flooding the airwaves as early as Day One.
The stakes couldn’t be any huger with Democrats holding just 51 Senate seats. **If grassroots donors don’t step up their game right now to fight back in PA, we just might have to kiss our Senate majority goodbye!!**
**[Please, Peter, can you spare a few bucks to keep Bob in the Senate where he belongs? We’re going to need every dollar and cent we can raise to fight back in Pennsylvania.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230917-2?refcode=em20230917-2&refcode2=674_552475_jeBIHz&akid=674%2E552475%2EjeBIHz)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230917-2?refcode=em20230917-2&refcode2=674_552475_jeBIHz&akid=674%2E552475%2EjeBIHz)**
I’ve seen enough elections to tell you right now: Stopping Mitch McConnell and the GOP from snatching back Senate control could come straight down to winning in Pennsylvania in 2024.
Early donations make all the difference in major races like this one. Let’s not look back next year and realize we waited too long to start defending this mission-critical seat.
**[Chip in just $5 today to support my friend Bob in this tough race and ensure we hold the line against the GOP next year.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230917-2?refcode=em20230917-2&refcode2=674_552475_jeBIHz&akid=674%2E552475%2EjeBIHz)**
Thank you for your support. It couldn’t be more important!
-- James Carville
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230917-2?refcode=em20230917-2&refcode2=674_552475_jeBIHz&akid=674%2E552475%2EjeBIHz)

* * *

Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)

name: Team Nick
subject: FWD: Shh it’s a surprise
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nick Melvoin for Congress - FEC ID #C00831289
body:
Peter — Did you catch our message about Nick's birthday? So many of you sent encouraging notes and chipped in to the campaign in the last few days and I cannot wait to share this all with Nick later tomorrow morning. We're still a few folks shy of that 170-supporter goal, so I wanted to bump this message up in your inbox. name: Lexi Reese
subject: no such thing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lexi Reese for Senate
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lr4sem [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lr4sem]
Friend,
I’m running for Senate because there should be no such thing as a rich unlivable world. Yet here we are. Our economy is less stable than it used to be, and we are less safe and have fewer rights. We deserve better.
I have a proven history of creating jobs, fighting inequality, and uplifting underserved communities. I love leading, serving, and getting the job done!
Which is why I want to go to work in Washington and make sure the needs of Californians are being met. I’m qualified, driven, and running to represent California in the United States Senate.
I can win, but I can’t do it alone. Will you please consider donating today and helping me? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lr4sem]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lr4sem]
With gratitude,
Lexi Reese

Woodside, CA 94062

name: Weston D. Imer
subject: URGENT: We are only $500 away from our goal! Chip in today!
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Weston D
body:
Friend, I am asking for your support in my efforts as a member of the RNC's Youth Advisory Council, will you chip in?
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gXwKJ8xdulbpbQB7dKKn3PEqSb21ChUUuYXMe0o_pXRNy77IjoOz7Xe6KZQWuC4-1kM9L7NtieBMHiOk0ZuvMfZKIhaszyvyQuEBT-yWQfpCyz6ddx_u-AqoBAY9Nwab5zX2gtD7tmcRCCG9mp7DpEyUtZTIAUS6B8iNw96y3opysbIQpNnJRlrAW1NuAtRW8I0EBUiYY_KX_XP8xDn9_QzZWwS9XxJ2&c=uNCrrY3yb9re9tfzSTjl7KqLqJ0Od43yFcj-q864sRiepolYxnt0Cg==&ch=4D4Nxn9Bp9Kz3hfaPDORYRiCr4z5jHZr03VIw_Dkv9FvMrUjhYTeyw==)
---
---
| Friend,
Thanks to the generous and kind support from many of you, we are only $500 away from our goal for this meeting.
The breakdown of the cost of the trip is roughly $175 for the hotel stay and $700 for the flight on Southwest Airlines. That brings the total for the trip to almost $900 without the cost of food and ground transport.
I am asking for you to chip in just $25 to help us reach our goal. That would only day 20 people to make this trip happen.
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gXwKJ8xdulbpbQB7dKKn3PEqSb21ChUUuYXMe0o_pXRNy77IjoOz7Xe6KZQWuC4-1kM9L7NtieBMHiOk0ZuvMfZKIhaszyvyQuEBT-yWQfpCyz6ddx_u-AqoBAY9Nwab5zX2gtD7tmcRCCG9mp7DpEyUtZTIAUS6B8iNw96y3opysbIQpNnJRlrAW1NuAtRW8I0EBUiYY_KX_XP8xDn9_QzZWwS9XxJ2&c=uNCrrY3yb9re9tfzSTjl7KqLqJ0Od43yFcj-q864sRiepolYxnt0Cg==&ch=4D4Nxn9Bp9Kz3hfaPDORYRiCr4z5jHZr03VIw_Dkv9FvMrUjhYTeyw==)
---
| | [Chip in $25 now to help us reach our goal!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gXwKJ8xdulbpbQB7dKKn3PEqSb21ChUUuYXMe0o_pXRNy77IjoOz7Xe6KZQWuC4-1kM9L7NtieBMHiOk0ZuvMfZKIhaszyvyQuEBT-yWQfpCyz6ddx_u-AqoBAY9Nwab5zX2gtD7tmcRCCG9mp7DpEyUtZTIAUS6B8iNw96y3opysbIQpNnJRlrAW1NuAtRW8I0EBUiYY_KX_XP8xDn9_QzZWwS9XxJ2&c=uNCrrY3yb9re9tfzSTjl7KqLqJ0Od43yFcj-q864sRiepolYxnt0Cg==&ch=4D4Nxn9Bp9Kz3hfaPDORYRiCr4z5jHZr03VIw_Dkv9FvMrUjhYTeyw==)
---
| By clicking this button, if you are signed in to your WinRed Account, your donation of $25 will go through immediately.
---
| We all understand the disastrous impact of Bidenomics on all of us and I would like to say that unless you are financially able, please do not contribute to this effort.
I am humbly asking for your support to ensure I can give you my all on the Youth Advisory Council and you have my word that I will be dedicated to this movement as long as I am asked to serve on your behalf.
I hope that I can count on your support and with that support, I look forward to traveling to Washington tomorrow to meet with my fellow members and Chairwoman McDaniel at RNC Head Quarters on Capitol Hill.
Grateful for your support and in service to you,
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gXwKJ8xdulbpbQB7dKKn3PEqSb21ChUUuYXMe0o_pXRNy77IjoOz7cRFAV6nCFZLBtkPuny3_vX-D6rIkJb0b1ypyRQhnDBCTCpXRkLWdazteig5aDXjPIPOUeVtkW_3NUAjnezKLcw=&c=uNCrrY3yb9re9tfzSTjl7KqLqJ0Od43yFcj-q864sRiepolYxnt0Cg==&ch=4D4Nxn9Bp9Kz3hfaPDORYRiCr4z5jHZr03VIw_Dkv9FvMrUjhYTeyw==)
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gXwKJ8xdulbpbQB7dKKn3PEqSb21ChUUuYXMe0o_pXRNy77IjoOz7Xe6KZQWuC4-1kM9L7NtieBMHiOk0ZuvMfZKIhaszyvyQuEBT-yWQfpCyz6ddx_u-AqoBAY9Nwab5zX2gtD7tmcRCCG9mp7DpEyUtZTIAUS6B8iNw96y3opysbIQpNnJRlrAW1NuAtRW8I0EBUiYY_KX_XP8xDn9_QzZWwS9XxJ2&c=uNCrrY3yb9re9tfzSTjl7KqLqJ0Od43yFcj-q864sRiepolYxnt0Cg==&ch=4D4Nxn9Bp9Kz3hfaPDORYRiCr4z5jHZr03VIw_Dkv9FvMrUjhYTeyw==)
---
| Weston D. Imer Youth Advisory Council Member Republican National Committee [https://westonimer.net](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gXwKJ8xdulbpbQB7dKKn3PEqSb21ChUUuYXMe0o_pXRNy77IjoOz7ccAqatT5u9YoVUVSTzyMsfpHTYba-A96yZj6gA7lI7yRYsXvHU_IzD8o4hf3GLMr4mpHNxq-3D2veEf6IP7bL7vs50Xd23Pog==&c=uNCrrY3yb9re9tfzSTjl7KqLqJ0Od43yFcj-q864sRiepolYxnt0Cg==&ch=4D4Nxn9Bp9Kz3hfaPDORYRiCr4z5jHZr03VIw_Dkv9FvMrUjhYTeyw==) wimer@westonimer.net C: (720) 384-4580
---
| P.S. - If we do not reach the goal, I will attend the meeting on Monday via Zoom and these funds will be saved and applied to the next RNC trip on the calendar which will be either the next Republican Presidential Debate in Miami, FL, or will be applied to the RNC Winter meeting in December. Thank You!
---

subject: Breaking: Pelosi is running for re-election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miller-Meeks for Congress

Friend,

**Nancy Pelosi is running for re-election again in 2024.
**
I won my race by just 6 votes in 2020, and she tried to overturn our election victory...

Now it looks like I'm going to be Pelosi's top target **AGAIN** in 2024.

We all know she is ready to spend millions of dollars to defeat me.

| [**STOP NANCY PELOSI**](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=9f5b8458c6a442e693b94712ac9064da&_e=btjpMycc_Bq719kfSpiCsGUUK_h4rxnbY7ClmvWUXe5bgQcNw0eVSxr2U-dcEfYRSDq3G40-DbMXa0QGWq6Q6HG9YESMJYNANu2nqo4mc0V51oSd8rh_n9U_LnSthBDfxvlCRPAfdoG4OO6-ucYIxDC3Ih9FU2Ic1_S2R4iXreLPcxkiJ5ZWjA_L54MvTU5_JtsxoN6kDpT2zBKmiCMu5oD0QVxXsQxNa3G7KCML8Jx8jG8CVLKjA1sF6iTMoZlvGZYbtuv0jEDa3IXG9CflHEFtYDSqe_AISvjsrAz9e8Wj0H3hgeyfnw0AKNU2HFv-)

body:
I’m taking on Marsha Blackburn for the future of Tennessee.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69904288/427650998/-849459103?refcode=ea.0e46822c-9d55-ee11-9937-00224832e811&ms=ea.0e46822c-9d55-ee11-9937-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTQ2ODIyYy05ZDU1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SuT_bVfJtt3LESXviB0OgwIBB-ZTIFoX4XIqKxNywtg=&emci=83b6ae4a-df53-ee11-9937-00224832e811&emdi=0e46822c-9d55-ee11-9937-00224832e811&ceid=46764483)
---
**_[Peter, I’m a teacher, a Tennessee state legislator, and a proud member of the Tennessee Three. I just announced that I’m running for the U.S. Senate, and I need your support in this fight. Contribute any amount right now to become a Founding Donor.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69904289/427650999/248091834?refcode=ea.0e46822c-9d55-ee11-9937-00224832e811&ms=ea.0e46822c-9d55-ee11-9937-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTQ2ODIyYy05ZDU1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SuT_bVfJtt3LESXviB0OgwIBB-ZTIFoX4XIqKxNywtg=)_** I’m in this race because _Tennesseans deserve better_. That was made crystal clear earlier this year, in the wake of the horrific Nashville school shooting. Thousands of Tennesseans descended on the state Capitol to demand action on gun violence prevention, but the GOP majority refused to give them a voice. So two of my colleagues and I stood up to join their historic protest. I knew it was against the rules. I knew it’d piss the GOP leadership off. _But I couldn’t let the Covenant families, young people, and parents from across the state stand alone._ The Republican majority took quick action, but not on gun violence. Both my colleagues, Representatives Justin J. Pearson and Justin Jones, were expelled. I was spared by a single vote. _Then the GOP majority passed a new law to _increase_ access to guns._ **MAGA Republicans in Nashville and Washington don’t give a damn about us.** They don’t give a damn about using power to save lives or help the people who elected them into office. They only care about their big campaign donors and special interest lobbyists. _But one thing has changed – the people are on our side, and they are standing up to demand action and make the change we need. There’s a movement afoot in Tennessee._ **I’m standing up to take on Senator Marsha Blackburn now because Tennessee deserves better.** Period. Marsha has _failed_ us in her five years in office. She’s voted _against_ everything from pandemic relief to ensuring equal pay for women. She’s supported tax breaks for corporations while opposing laws to keep life-saving drug prices down. She’s a danger to reproductive rights, cruel to LGBTQ+ folks, and she refuses to fight for our right to vote. She’s also taken over a million dollars from the NRA while refusing to take action on the most basic, commonsense legislation to protect our children from the threat of gun violence. We have a senator who stands with bullies, and I have a reputation for standing up to bullies. **Marsha Blackburn has shown us who she works for, and it’s not us.** She’s had five years and _nothing_ is getting done. Tennesseans deserve someone who will stand up to corrupt special interests and fight for lower costs so that every family can build a good life. It’s time we do something about it. **_[From day one, I’ve been fighting for Tennesseans. Now I need you to have my back by becoming a Founding Donor of this campaign. We have a long hard road ahead, and our movement can only succeed with your help.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69904290/427651000/248091834?refcode=ea.0e46822c-9d55-ee11-9937-00224832e811&ms=ea.0e46822c-9d55-ee11-9937-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTQ2ODIyYy05ZDU1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SuT_bVfJtt3LESXviB0OgwIBB-ZTIFoX4XIqKxNywtg=)_** | [**BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69904291/427651001/248091834?refcode=ea.0e46822c-9d55-ee11-9937-00224832e811&ms=ea.0e46822c-9d55-ee11-9937-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTQ2ODIyYy05ZDU1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SuT_bVfJtt3LESXviB0OgwIBB-ZTIFoX4XIqKxNywtg=)
---
With you,
Gloria
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69904292/427651003/248091834?refcode=ea.0e46822c-9d55-ee11-9937-00224832e811&ms=ea.0e46822c-9d55-ee11-9937-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTQ2ODIyYy05ZDU1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SuT_bVfJtt3LESXviB0OgwIBB-ZTIFoX4XIqKxNywtg=)
| Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care.

For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors.

Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights.

[There’s a movement afoot for change — join us.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69904293/427651004/-849459103?refcode=ea.0e46822c-9d55-ee11-9937-00224832e811&ms=ea.0e46822c-9d55-ee11-9937-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTQ2ODIyYy05ZDU1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SuT_bVfJtt3LESXviB0OgwIBB-ZTIFoX4XIqKxNywtg=&emci=83b6ae4a-df53-ee11-9937-00224832e811&emdi=0e46822c-9d55-ee11-9937-00224832e811&ceid=46764483) | [**DONATE TODAY**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69904295/427651005/248091834?amount=25&refcode=ea.0e46822c-9d55-ee11-9937-00224832e811&ms=ea.0e46822c-9d55-ee11-9937-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTQ2ODIyYy05ZDU1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SuT_bVfJtt3LESXviB0OgwIBB-ZTIFoX4XIqKxNywtg=)

clean_body: I’m taking on Marsha Blackburn for the future of Tennessee. | = I’m in this race because Tennesseans deserve better. That was made crystal clear earlier this year, in the wake of the horrific Nashville school shooting. Thousands of Tennesseans descended on the state Capitol to demand action on gun violence prevention, but the GOP majority refused to give them a voice. So two of my colleagues and I stood up to join their historic protest. I knew it was against the rules. I knew it’d piss the GOP leadership off. But I couldn’t let the Covenant families, young people, and parents from across the state stand alone. The Republican majority took quick action, but not on gun violence. Both my colleagues, Representatives Justin J. Pearson and Justin Jones, were expelled. I was spared by a single vote. Then the GOP majority passed a new law to increase access to guns. MAGA Republicans in Nashville and Washington don’t give a damn about us. They don’t give a damn about using power to save lives or help the people who elected them into office. They only care about their big campaign donors and special interest lobbyists. But one thing has changed – the people are on our side, and they are standing up to demand action and make the change we need. There’s a movement afoot in Tennessee. I’m standing up to take on Senator Marsha Blackburn now because Tennessee deserves better. Period. Marsha has failed us in her five years in office. She’s voted against everything from pandemic relief to ensuring equal pay for women. She’s supported tax breaks for corporations while opposing laws to keep life-saving drug prices down. She’s a danger to reproductive rights, cruel to LGBTQ+ folks, and she refuses to fight for our right to vote. She’s also taken over a million dollars from the NRA while refusing to take action on the most basic, commonsense legislation to protect our children from the threat of gun violence. We have a senator who stands with bullies, and I have a reputation for standing up to bullies. Marsha Blackburn has shown us who she works for, and it’s not us. She’s had five years and nothing is getting done. Tennesseans deserve someone who will stand up to corrupt special interests and fight for lower costs so that every family can build a good life. It’s time we do something about it. = | = With you, Gloria = | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. Gloria for Tennessee 73 White Bridge Rd #103-353 Nashville, TN 37205

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: 2 newborn orcas could starve to death
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1991557?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Two newborn orca calves are in critical danger of starvation![Take action now >>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1991558?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** Between climate change, vessel traffic from Big Oil and shipping industries, cruise ship pollution, and industrial overfishing, Southern Resident orcas are fighting for their lives against **human-driven threats.** Dealing with _**stress, grief, and miscarriages,**_ these iconic whales are _struggling to survive_ while their habitats are being destroyed and their critical food sources are being driven away by corporate greed. Two newborn calves were just born into the very same Southern Resident pod that the cherished and deceased Marina was once part of. But these two precious newborns are still _**weak and fragile**_ \-- and they stand _little chance_ at surviving their first year on Earth **without enough Chinook salmon** to keep their mothers nourished. But corporate overfishing and bycatch is _**DECIMATING**_ Chinook salmon populations in the Pacific Northwest, driving vulnerable orcas to **malnutrition and starvation.** Friend, the two newborn orca calves desperately need us to be their voice right now if they’re going to survive their first year. [**Will you add your name right now to STOP corporate overfishing and bycatch that’s pushing endangered orcas closer to EXTINCTION?**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1991559?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1991560?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
If we are going to restore the _**already endangered**_ Southern Resident killer whale population, _**replenishing Chinook salmon is a CRUCIAL first step.**_ But keeping baby orcas alive and healthy isn’t easy for these vulnerable whales.
Pregnant orca mamas have a long gestation period that lasts about 18 months at which time they are highly vulnerable. To remain pregnant, mama orcas must consume up to **300 pounds of fish DAILY.** But currently, as Chinook salmon populations have drastically fallen, _**69%**_ of orca pregnancies end up in _**miscarriage.**_
Immediately after birth, orca mamas need to provide 40% fat milk to their infants. Again, this is extremely difficult _**without enough Chinook salmon**_ \-- so right now, the mortality rate for newborn orcas is as high as _**50%.**_
The fate of Southern Resident orcas depends on Chinook salmon, so it’s **URGENT** that the National Marine Fisheries Service (NMFS) take bold steps to rein in greedy overfishing companies that are threatening the existence of these beloved whales. [**Please, Friend, time is running out to SAVE endangered orcas from extinction. Add your name by 11:59 P.M. tonight to DEMAND that NMFS take immediate action to END corporate overfishing of Chinook salmon! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1991561?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1991562?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for helping save endangered orcas,
Friends of the Earth**
