name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: I was in the hospital for three months
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| I am not going to let anyone make me forget where I came from or why I got into public service in the first place.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1180%2E35263%2EzBckyo)
Peter — When I was a child, I was diagnosed with a serious illness and spent three months in the hospital. When I got better, my grandparents, who raised me, began looking for an insurance policy that would cover me in the future. But they couldn’t find such a policy because of my previous illness. Not from any insurer. Not at any price. They had to pay for my health care out of pocket — and they had to make enormous sacrifices to do so — all because I was a child labeled with those words: **"pre-existing condition."** Peter, I got into public service because I saw my grandparents stay up late at night, worried sick that I would fall ill again and that they wouldn't be able to afford my care. No one should ever have to go through that. **Like 133 million Americans, I know what it's like to have the label "pre-existing condition" attached to my care — and before the _Affordable Care Act_ was passed, many of us could be denied coverage.** Today, insurance companies can no longer discriminate against someone based on their pre-existing condition. I championed health reform and fought to allow young people to stay on their parent’s insurance plan up to age 26. These policy changes have led to millions more Americans getting the health insurance they need. So, you can imagine my frustration whenever Republicans attack our health care or threaten protections for folks with pre-existing conditions — people like me. The GOP has spent years playing politics with people’s lives. And if Mitch McConnell and his Republican mega-donors flip my seat in Wisconsin and take hold of the Senate majority next election, countless Americans could find themselves in a place where insurance companies, once again, write all the rules. The people of Wisconsin did not send me to Washington to take people’s health care away, which is why I fought against Republican repeal efforts and why I will never back down. But I can’t defend the hard-fought progress we’ve made without your help, Peter. **[So today, I’m humbly asking: Will you make a donation to my reelection campaign to defend our Senate majority and prevent Republicans from rolling back the progress we’ve made expanding access to affordable health care?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-sep23.1u6uGA&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230917_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1180%2E35263%2EzBckyo)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2150?c0=tbe-em-sep23.g8eV4w&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230917_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1180%2E35263%2EzBckyo)

| [CHIP IN $100 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2154?c0=tbe-em-sep23.d8D94V&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230917_PM1_V1_S1&t=9&akid=1180%2E35263%2EzBckyo)
---

I am not going to let anyone make me forget where I came from or why I got into public service in the first place. My experience has always inspired my work to do everything I can to make sure that every American has quality, affordable health care coverage and stand up against those who want to take it away.
So long as you're with me, I know we can overcome any challenge we may face on the road ahead and stop the Republicans from taking away health insurance from millions of Americans once and for all. **[It starts by holding onto the Democratic Senate majority; chip in if you can.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-sep23.1u6uGA&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230917_PM1_V1_S1&t=11&akid=1180%2E35263%2EzBckyo)**
Thank you for standing with me.
— Tammy
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=1180%2E35263%2EzBckyo) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=1180%2E35263%2EzBckyo)**
PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

clean_body: | I am not going to let anyone make me forget where I came from or why I got into public service in the first place. Peter — When I was a child, I was diagnosed with a serious illness and spent three months in the hospital. When I got better, my grandparents, who raised me, began looking for an insurance policy that would cover me in the future. But they couldn’t find such a policy because of my previous illness. Not from any insurer. Not at any price. They had to pay for my health care out of pocket — and they had to make enormous sacrifices to do so — all because I was a child labeled with those words: "pre-existing condition." Peter, I got into public service because I saw my grandparents stay up late at night, worried sick that I would fall ill again and that they wouldn't be able to afford my care. No one should ever have to go through that. Like 133 million Americans, I know what it's like to have the label "pre-existing condition" attached to my care — and before the Affordable Care Act was passed, many of us could be denied coverage. Today, insurance companies can no longer discriminate against someone based on their pre-existing condition. I championed health reform and fought to allow young people to stay on their parent’s insurance plan up to age 26. These policy changes have led to millions more Americans getting the health insurance they need. So, you can imagine my frustration whenever Republicans attack our health care or threaten protections for folks with pre-existing conditions — people like me. The GOP has spent years playing politics with people’s lives. And if Mitch McConnell and his Republican mega-donors flip my seat in Wisconsin and take hold of the Senate majority next election, countless Americans could find themselves in a place where insurance companies, once again, write all the rules. The people of Wisconsin did not send me to Washington to take people’s health care away, which is why I fought against Republican repeal efforts and why I will never back down. But I can’t defend the hard-fought progress we’ve made without your help, Peter. name: Democracy Alert (via the NDRC)
subject: POLITICO: “Dems tap Obama for crucial redistricting push”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
“The only danger is that we get complacent”
|
---

This is huge, team.

**FIRST:**
A Supreme Court ruling in June opened the door for congressional maps across the country to be redrawn before the 2024 election. According to _FiveThirtyEight_ , so many gerrymandered maps could be struck down that **“this decision could be the difference between Republican and Democratic control of the House.”**

**THEN:**
Republicans have made it clear that they’re willing to do _whatever it takes_ to keep their gerrymanders in place.

According to experts, the ruling could impact maps in more states across the country, including Arkansas, Georgia, Florida, Louisiana, Texas, and others.

**SO NOW:
_President Obama is calling on our grassroots movement to take urgent action!_** | “The only danger is that we get complacent. Because one thing we’ve learned is that the other side doesn’t quit.

**. . . NDRC has to be there”**

_– President Barack Obama_
| [RUSH A DONATION TO THE NDRC](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69905065/427653743/-1466375647?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230917_FR_9F_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA3ZTcxYzc0LWEzNTUtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fOEtLNKzdL_T8ugERGRJ4qs4Q4Q2t13i5xvGAC10Ly4=)
---
**President Obama is right, team.**

Our grassroots movement has proven that, when we work together, we have the power to defeat GOP efforts to undermine our democracy. In fact, ahead of the 2022 election, the NDRC’s work helped secure what the _New York Times_ called “the fairest House map of the last 40 years.”

**That means we have two options:

OPTION 1: WE KEEP FIGHTING**
By continuing our work across the country, we could have the opportunity to secure _even fairer_ maps before the 2024 election. We’ll go into the November election knowing we did everything in our power to give Democrats a level playing field in the fight for House control.

**OPTION 2: WE GET COMPLACENT**
We could blow this opportunity by letting the GOP get away with unchecked gerrymandering. And if Democrats narrowly lose the House majority, we’ll look back and wonder if we could have done more.

[**_The NDRC is committed to doing everything to strengthen our democracy, team. If you’re with us, will you rush an urgent donation today to power our fight for fair maps?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69905066/427653744/-1466375647?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230917_FR_9F_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA3ZTcxYzc0LWEzNTUtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fOEtLNKzdL_T8ugERGRJ4qs4Q4Q2t13i5xvGAC10Ly4=)

clean_body: “The only danger is that we get complacent” | This is huge, team. FIRST: A Supreme Court ruling in June opened the door for congressional maps across the country to be redrawn before the 2024 election. According to FiveThirtyEight , so many gerrymandered maps could be struck down that “this decision could be the difference between Republican and Democratic control of the House.” THEN: Republicans have made it clear that they’re willing to do whatever it takes to keep their gerrymanders in place. According to experts, the ruling could impact maps in more states across the country, including Arkansas, Georgia, Florida, Louisiana, Texas, and others. SO NOW: President Obama is calling on our grassroots movement to take urgent action! | “The only danger is that we get complacent. Because one thing we’ve learned is that the other side doesn’t quit. . . . NDRC has to be there” – President Barack Obama | = President Obama is right, team. Our grassroots movement has proven that, when we work together, we have the power to defeat GOP efforts to undermine our democracy. In fact, ahead of the 2022 election, the NDRC’s work helped secure what the New York Times called “the fairest House map of the last 40 years.” That means we have two options: OPTION 1: WE KEEP FIGHTING By continuing our work across the country, we could have the opportunity to secure even fairer maps before the 2024 election. We’ll go into the November election knowing we did everything in our power to give Democrats a level playing field in the fight for House control. OPTION 2: WE GET COMPLACENT We could blow this opportunity by letting the GOP get away with unchecked gerrymandering. And if Democrats narrowly lose the House majority, we’ll look back and wonder if we could have done more. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 1015 18th Street NW, Suite 1000 Washington, DC 20036 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

[[Firstname | Friend]], I’m running to be Florida’s next U.S. Senator — and I hope you’ll give me a moment to share why. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69905177/427654033/-1742221381?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230917_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGU5ZjMxOTYtYTQ1NS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TNj6ZHut5_6dZ6uqVujshmDZmdcWpxyYrQq_ykhcPDI=)
_My husband and three children._ I was born in Ecuador, and when I was 14, my mother brought my sisters and me to America in search of a better life. We made a new home in a small, one room apartment in America. My mother worked double shifts as a home health care provider and at night, she took classes to learn English. When I was 15, I started picking up shifts at the local doughnut shop to help us make ends meet. My mother’s hard work, incredible sacrifices, and relentlessly fierce hope made it possible for me to graduate college and become the first South American immigrant to serve in Congress. **She taught me that a better education, a better home, and a better future is always possible if we never give up. This is the promise of America.** **_And that’s why I’m running for Senate. Because Florida deserves better, and we’ve got to fight for it._** Right now, our state is being pushed backward by far-right extremists like my opponent, Sen. Rick Scott. He’s targeting the most vulnerable amongst us, dividing our communities, and threatening the American dream. It’s no wonder why a mere 40% of Floridians view him favorably. With experts saying Rick Scott is one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection in 2024, I know that we can defeat him and restore the promise of America — but not without all hands on deck. [_**So please, will you join the fight for a better future by splitting a donation of $10 between HER Time and my campaign? If we win in Florida, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to defend our Senate majority.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69905178/427654034/-1742221381?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230917_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGU5ZjMxOTYtYTQ1NS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TNj6ZHut5_6dZ6uqVujshmDZmdcWpxyYrQq_ykhcPDI=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Debbie Mucarsel-Powell and HER Time will go through immediately:_ | | [SPLIT $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69905179/427654035/-1742221381?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230917_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGU5ZjMxOTYtYTQ1NS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TNj6ZHut5_6dZ6uqVujshmDZmdcWpxyYrQq_ykhcPDI=)

name: Alex Padilla
subject: Bob Casey
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
I know it, and so does Mitch McConnell.
#

Friend,
I’m writing to ask you to split a contribution between me and Senator Bob Casey of Pennsylvania. [**Can we count on your support to help us hold our Democratic majority in the Senate?](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-sept23-casey.RBsFk0&refcode=em230917-1-30&t=1&akid=1531%2E159979%2Ee_C5hF)**
My team and I are doing everything we can to make sure Democrats hold our Senate majority in 2024, and re-electing Bob Casey is a BIG part of that effort.
In fact, Pennsylvania could be the race that decides the majority. I know it, and so does Mitch McConnell.
That’s why the GOP is going to spend millions of dollars attacking Bob Casey -- and it’s why I’m asking you to join me in helping him fight back.
[**Friend, can you please split a contribution of ANY amount to keep PA -- and the Senate -- blue? I wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t so important. ](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-sept23-casey.RBsFk0&refcode=em230917-1-30&t=2&akid=1531%2E159979%2Ee_C5hF)**
_If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution between Alex Padilla and Bob Casey instantly:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/2338?c0=ap-em-sept23-casey.KwSzL6&refcode=em230917-1-30&t=21&akid=1531%2E159979%2Ee_C5hF)**

---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/2334?c0=ap-em-sept23-casey.rzx65z&refcode=em230917-1-30&t=25&akid=1531%2E159979%2Ee_C5hF)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/2337?c0=ap-em-sept23-casey.PQl_Xu&refcode=em230917-1-30&t=26&akid=1531%2E159979%2Ee_C5hF)**
---
****
Just think about what’s at stake in this election cycle.
A national abortion ban. Continued attacks on our immigrant communities. Continued attacks on our LGBTQ communities. An environmental policy that leaves California, Pennsylvania, and our entire country vulnerable to the devastating impacts of climate change.
**Honestly, there’s too much on the line to sit this one out, friend.**
[**That’s why I’m asking you to support our work to hold the Senate for Democrats by splitting a contribution between my campaign and Bob Casey.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-sept23-casey.RBsFk0&refcode=em230917-1-30&t=27&akid=1531%2E159979%2Ee_C5hF)**

Thank you for getting involved, friend. When we re-elect Bob Casey and hold the Senate in 2024, please know that early investment from supporters like you is what makes it all possible.
\- Alex

Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America.

| | | Friend, I have some bad news. Despite so many patriots generously stepping up, we FAILED to meet our mid-month goal. I can’t bear to tell the rest of my team we missed our goal, so I’m extending our deadline for **24 HOURS** before I come back with the final numbers. **[Please, pitch in before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT so we can meet our extended goal and DEFEND FLORIDA from the radical Left!](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=8499619229704fa9b802c652f93d92ca&_e=b7SZGe_nJVlsoCPga_akK1zqmLq9a0JNwNuXWjDcPuvyn51vMy1aavAwd3_ZQcjeDsB9EuSOl2hVYUx7lNMlZ-Iw5-8w9Dfbj2YVYRIY65ZdA4NWEsdLgrl553ooM4YN-4JO14_WG0d0RolhVuHMgmZmQUCDhHlQaJ9gwupwe7dYorJRlWRq1gZHs0FYvPlZj2wD7l-NBZNwQ72mQGN99GNlvrUWObYSg5sFABTC3cxhaP1X8MSda3mdjqob2sq--dJowKIPwveJAhLZaQteDrZZFTbPTynENbdLJRbA3n1vhYQ1x81O5qPyDGunEx54VHZcuBxzEpE1yLGueJmS1wKLPEypkFj_nCPI8U14gQMMwTzAb1QHJF9EKdEEZ5Bq)**

name: David McMillan
subject: Adam and I are family
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=3910%2E5257348%2Ec3z8mq ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Hello Derek —
My name is David McMillan. I’m Adam Schiff’s Little Brother. I hope you’ll
allow me a few moments to talk about my relationship with Adam, and why
his campaign for the U.S. Senate means so much to me personally.

When I was five years old, my mother took me to the Big Brothers Big
Sisters of America office in Los Angeles, and helped me fill out an
application. In it, I said that I had three wishes: for a Big Brother, a
puppy, and a beautiful world.

Adam had just moved to Los Angeles a year earlier, and, feeling settled in
his new hometown, walked into the same Big Brothers office to volunteer.
And of all the applications he looked at that day, he chose mine.

We were eventually paired up for a day, a kind of trial run, and Adam
brought me to the beach in Venice where he was living at the time. After
an afternoon battling the crashing waves and having a blast, we dubbed
ourselves The Survivors. It was an incredible day, and the start of one of
the most important relationships in my life.

After being on a waiting list, I finally had a Big Brother.

(By the way, here’s a photo of us from those days. Check out Adam’s truly
impeccable style back then. I’d like to think I’ve helped him become a
little more hip.)

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=sep2023_abs_em.H56YJI&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230917_PM2_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1004&akid=3910%2E5257348%2Ec3z8mq ]Adam Schiff in white t-shirt and blue overalls with Little Brother David

Our relationship has only grown in the many years since — years that
brought me to Yale, to USC film school, and to a career as a TV and film
screenwriter. A career that Adam, my WGA brothers and sisters, and I are
still fighting for on the picket line:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=sep2023_abs_em.H56YJI&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230917_PM2_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1005&akid=3910%2E5257348%2Ec3z8mq ]David McMillan holding Writers Guild of America ON STRIKE picket sign beside
Adam Schiff speaking into megaphone and striking writers

I’m a Big Brother now too, and Adam and I are family. We have been since
the day we met. I was even honored to be a groomsman at his wedding to his
amazing wife Eve. These days, since I’m not so “little” anymore, I just
refer to him as my brother – because in all the important ways, he is.

He’s the kind of person we need more of in the Senate. Someone who will
always fight to do the right thing — even if it’s not always the easy
thing.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=sep2023_abs_em.H56YJI&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230917_PM2_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1006&akid=3910%2E5257348%2Ec3z8mq ]I hope you will join me by adding a small contribution to support
Adam’s campaign ahead of his critical FEC deadline at the end of this
month. And I hope sharing this story tells you a little more about the
incredible person that Adam is.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=sep2023_abs_em.d0Aj_h&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230917_PM2_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1007&akid=3910%2E5257348%2Ec3z8mq ]EXPRESS DONATE
$3

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=sep2023_abs_em.d0Aj_h&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230917_PM2_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1008&akid=3910%2E5257348%2Ec3z8mq ]EXPRESS DONATE
$10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=sep2023_abs_em.d0Aj_h&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230917_PM2_V1_S1&email=&amount=25&t=1009&akid=3910%2E5257348%2Ec3z8mq ]EXPRESS DONATE
$25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=sep2023_abs_em.d0Aj_h&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230917_PM2_V1_S1&email=&amount=50&t=1010&akid=3910%2E5257348%2Ec3z8mq ]EXPRESS DONATE
$50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=sep2023_abs_em.d0Aj_h&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230917_PM2_V1_S1&email=&amount=100&t=1011&akid=3910%2E5257348%2Ec3z8mq ]EXPRESS DONATE
$100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=sep2023_abs_em.H56YJI&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230917_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=3910%2E5257348%2Ec3z8mq ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thank you so much for reading. And for supporting my brother.

Together, we can all make a beautiful world.

— David McMillan (Adam’s not-so-little-anymore brother)

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=sep2023_abs_em.SOCG8v&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230917_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=3910%2E5257348%2Ec3z8mq ]DONATE MONTHLY

Democrats are catching up to us. They are ready to pour millions of dollars into every race next year and are determined to let Chuck Schumer control the Senate. | Peter,

Democrats are catching up to us. They are ready to pour millions of dollars into every race next year and are determined to let Chuck Schumer control the Senate.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e5cbded62eda4948b6e41e39f0f7ef7f&_e=RSgcWyhcXivXOTRuPNJAYMxvmHZE3JOMz7yG6hXorEVhqcnbbmlDQf03GKzx_Kfg_TVRGNqC0NPH8sOYg0weG8Xt2NeEohyptPayHYaictzzBKC__LY00dwRJ4_zXUYUuSI4d_rFF-3uECsSUqGNubPyPr14uc9bFoPWv3ElCB4VnlA4KAHg4BUqBIOTAfwiRi65Ly4cwuD13Rmp9jxBJy0irFmGp-DxuxKpFWNHqWT5fBRM1GW4OO34iSUzJN5S1SrSGI5hwbplsixaK-_Bf6KWLt5iFnrU1fkieWl4LTtCghbdQ9YjekXl2OT6pR8mWZoCYqN1d3ptY1-V6D6omEn9YIH2RDUNn8Y5lxInKjuwC6q_WL4nVmNCjHOj56SuxrSAuHCxfMdtevvw3o2lZsyDlguiWPjOv5a46jTYRsiK7hLPp-jfiVtfenZlb9-J)
[**WILL YOU FIGHT TO TAKE BACK THE MAJORITY?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e5cbded62eda4948b6e41e39f0f7ef7f&_e=RSgcWyhcXivXOTRuPNJAYMxvmHZE3JOMz7yG6hXorEVhqcnbbmlDQf03GKzx_Kfg_TVRGNqC0NPH8sOYg0weG8Xt2NeEohyptPayHYaictzzBKC__LY00dwRJ4_zXUYUuSI4d_rFF-3uECsSUqGNubPyPr14uc9bFoPWv3ElCB4VnlA4KAHg4BUqBIOTAfwiRi65Ly4cwuD13Rmp9jxBJy0irFmGp-DxuxKpFWNHqWT5fBRM1GW4OO34iSUzJN5S1SrSGI5hwbplsixaK-_Bf6KWLt5iFnrU1fkieWl4LTtJq37NdgE8JFJk6GliKWTjAPzvPGVQGcy7prNPomV09ku4KcvR-Pu_ssJkxHfNTYlO4o1g_5wj-h29xDrP_XXqTQbp1GuamBt9ldt8uZfYGlKzuurYV0PujiZo_O5VKet-G6lyM03XE_zEgZW-L0VK)
Democrats are working hard right now. From Pennsylvania to Nevada and Michigan to Texas - **_every seat is a battleground._**

It’s time to expect a government that cuts your taxes and deregulates the government. You deserve more say in your life. The American people deserve a government that doesn’t believe in packing the courts and the Senate. We deserve a government that believes in the Constitution and will stand up to China.

[**A SENATE FOR THE AMERICAN PEOPLE**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e5cbded62eda4948b6e41e39f0f7ef7f&_e=RSgcWyhcXivXOTRuPNJAYMxvmHZE3JOMz7yG6hXorEVhqcnbbmlDQf03GKzx_Kfg_TVRGNqC0NPH8sOYg0weG8Xt2NeEohyptPayHYaictzzBKC__LY00dwRJ4_zXUYUuSI4d_rFF-3uECsSUqGNubPyPr14uc9bFoPWv3ElCB4VnlA4KAHg4BUqBIOTAfwiRi65Ly4cwuD13Rmp9jxBJy0irFmGp-DxuxKpFWNHqWT5fBRM1GW4OO34iSUzJN5S1SrSGI5hwbplsixaK-_Bf6KWLt5iFnrU1fkieWl4LTsWwsgEot-lLoZ8qeXQWTGSsfeIABwFxAbxOKHB4d-mj8WrMdzlq202EGogx_VrHqa-f2QA-yDAt7O9o7L3s7ViGDEU86Ozb9Hjr3c_cf_CMX-RhKsJbVH-zzLuJw71n0ewmoa8c1GPoAtzOr2tJfw4)
Democrats think 2024 will be the year they control the presidency, the House, and the Senate - **_we cannot let that happen._**

[**Peter, I am personally calling on YOU, to step up today and fight for every seat and retake the Senate majority.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e5cbded62eda4948b6e41e39f0f7ef7f&_e=RSgcWyhcXivXOTRuPNJAYMxvmHZE3JOMz7yG6hXorEVhqcnbbmlDQf03GKzx_Kfg_TVRGNqC0NPH8sOYg0weG8Xt2NeEohyptPayHYaictzzBKC__LY00dwRJ4_zXUYUuSI4d_rFF-3uECsSUqGNubPyPr14uc9bFoPWv3ElCB4VnlA4KAHg4BUqBIOTAfwiRi65Ly4cwuD13Rmp9jxBJy0irFmGp-DxuxKpFWNHqWT5fBRM1GW4OO34iSUzJN5S1SrSGI5hwbplsixaK-_Bf6KWLt5iFnrU1fkieWl4LTsIMiHN-5MUlf1K1qLpmHETHFZlFnlbAmpOCpQ4_CuKFjHU3Bx1mNQn8O71MzAgEKBzDc09-x8PP9vpFx77oiva9pNv0QZd2QkuanAii_qtSQau3j-0fkvc1ocSusvwz5k7Bm7q1D2BVS3sHGPF1swe)

With your help, we can keep our momentum for September and win back a Senate majority.

Thanks,

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e5cbded62eda4948b6e41e39f0f7ef7f&_e=RSgcWyhcXivXOTRuPNJAYMxvmHZE3JOMz7yG6hXorEVhqcnbbmlDQf03GKzx_Kfg_TVRGNqC0NPH8sOYg0weG8Xt2NeEohyptPayHYaictzzBKC__LY00dwRJ4_zXUYUuSI4d_rFF-3uECsSUqGNubPyPr14uc9bFoPWv3ElCB4VnlA4KAHg4BUqBIOTAfwiRi65Ly4cwuD13Rmp9jxBJy0irFmGp-DxuxKpFWNHqWT5fBRM1GW4OO34iSUzJN5S1SrSGI5hwbplsixaK-_Bf6KWLt5iFnrU1fkieWl4LTtG6C301-mEnAdNCaYsbDzG6nwZvAFGXF-YY4F0KMVdg2Tp0XECdbXK5YCe1hf7wWQGJkE0v66EOBhWoajwcU5o-DQNu4emCZEn53YpKy1d55x4ydPib_Lt1fvlRWax2cUnIPk8jv7-GokrMplo4Ms8)
Steve Daines

[**P.S. As the DSCC and other liberal special interest groups prepare their attacks, can we count on your support? Contribute $10, $25, $50, $100 or more, help us prepare for the Republican Senate you deserve.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e5cbded62eda4948b6e41e39f0f7ef7f&_e=RSgcWyhcXivXOTRuPNJAYMxvmHZE3JOMz7yG6hXorEVhqcnbbmlDQf03GKzx_Kfg_TVRGNqC0NPH8sOYg0weG8Xt2NeEohyptPayHYaictzzBKC__LY00dwRJ4_zXUYUuSI4d_rFF-3uECsSUqGNubPyPr14uc9bFoPWv3ElCB4VnlA4KAHg4BUqBIOTAfwiRi65Ly4cwuD13Rmp9jxBJy0irFmGp-DxuxKpFWNHqWT5fBRM1GW4OO34iSUzJN5S1SrSGI5hwbplsixaK-_Bf6KWLt5iFnrU1fkieWl4LTsa5XZ4Ene1BfzjBTz255ODl7VN23cPbecx3Ljw5H_F81rNyBtxbvHpLWp7M9Imv8MthUvH6DyJYFikjiwKr8j6O-6igrS_4UV2wjRSZjVgjyWs4Vvs-ZHb0DHwSxNr-7EvA712fybiVjP6oV5QpDaE)

Hi there, friend. It's Stefanie, Kirsten's finance director. It's my job to make sure that Kirsten has the resources she needs to take on the GOP and their far-right megadonors.
But I just took a look at our numbers, and we're still 27% short of our $25,000 weekly goal — and our deadline is at 11:59 p.m. TONIGHT. With our huge end-of-quarter deadline just a couple weeks away, this is the _worst_ possible time to fall short.
Kirsten is counting on every single person who cares about our Senate majority to step up here. But I just pulled your donation record, and here's what I found:
**WEEKLY GOAL DONATION STATUS

But we're defending a massive 23 seats in 2024 — including Kirsten's. **Grassroots resources are going to be spread thin, and we need to make sure that must-win candidates like Kirsten have all the resources they need to defend our Senate majority.**

clean_body: the stakes couldn't be higher | | | Hi there, friend. It's Stefanie, Kirsten's finance director. It's my job to make sure that Kirsten has the resources she needs to take on the GOP and their far-right megadonors. But I just took a look at our numbers, and we're still 27% short of our $25,000 weekly goal — and our deadline is at 11:59 p.m. TONIGHT. With our huge end-of-quarter deadline just a couple weeks away, this is the worst possible time to fall short. Kirsten is counting on every single person who cares about our Senate majority to step up here. But I just pulled your donation record, and here's what I found: WEEKLY GOAL DONATION STATUS Supporter on File: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donation Status: MISSING Suggested Gift: = Priority Level:TOP LEVEL DEM PRIORITY **11:59 P.M. DEADLINE TO GIVE | | = I know that you hear a lot about goals and deadlines from our team. But that's because they're incredibly important — and the stakes couldn't be higher. Democrats are hanging on to a narrow Senate majority. If we lose just ONE seat, Mitch McConnell could retake power. But we're defending a massive 23 seats in 2024 — including Kirsten's. Grassroots resources are going to be spread thin, and we need to make sure that must-win candidates like Kirsten have all the resources they need to defend our Senate majority. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you so much, Stefanie | | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

Team, I want to take a moment to tell you the story of the little boy in the picture above—my story and why I’m running for Congress—and I hope you’ll let me. ([**If you’re ready to do the thing—flip NY-17 and retake our Democratic House majority—make a donation here today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69906584/427659090/13284604?refcode=em23_230917_bioRS_fndd_gq_nopn___mj_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230917_bioRS_fndd_gq_nopn___mj_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=3b0687ec-ae55-ee11-9937-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjA2ODdlYy1hZTU1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ynTzPcCnG21OPSAGye6c0L02BBDxk-NugHeXTUuQik4=))

I say “policy is personal,” because, for me, it is.

I was born and raised in Spring Valley, New York by a single mother who worked multiple jobs to keep food on the table. Even though she worked around the clock, we still needed Section 8 housing and food stamps to get by.

When child care was too expensive, I often went to work with my grandma, who worked well past the age of retirement cleaning homes, while my grandpa worked as a janitor at the local middle school.

I was lucky to be raised by a hard-working family, which did everything it could to provide me with what I needed. But life wasn’t always easy, and I often think about what a profound difference affordable child care, health care, and better wages would have made in easing the burdens on my mother and grandparents.

Despite our circumstances, my mom always taught me to dream big, and that’s exactly what I did. I’m here running to return to Congress to keep fighting for families like mine and ensure everyone has the opportunities and resources to not only survive, but to thrive.

[**President Joe Biden won this House district by 10 points. Now, Roll Call just named my opponent the second most vulnerable House Republican in the country for 2024. Will you help me flip NY-17 and take back the House by chipping in $5 today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69906585/427659091/13284604?refcode=em23_230917_bioRS_fndd_gq_nopn___mj_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230917_bioRS_fndd_gq_nopn___mj_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=3b0687ec-ae55-ee11-9937-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjA2ODdlYy1hZTU1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ynTzPcCnG21OPSAGye6c0L02BBDxk-NugHeXTUuQik4=)

Let me be frank: There are not many members of Congress with backgrounds like mine. Most members of the House and Senate are millionaires; many are worth upwards of tens of millions of dollars.

Corporate lobbyists from Big Oil to Big Pharma spend billions trying to influence elected officials like Republican Mike Lawler—himself a former oil and gas lobbyist—to maintain the status quo and keep our government working solely for the wealthy and well-connected.

It’s created a system of government that makes it all too easy to give corporate bailouts and tax breaks for billionaires, while keeping everyday people locked in a struggle just to make ends meet.

We need more leaders committed to making sure our government serves the public interest—not corporate profiteers or power-hungry politicians.

Because for me, policy is personal, I will:
* Put the lives of our children over the NRA to enact common-sense gun safety regulations.
* Continue to lower prescription drug costs so everyone has the lifesaving medications they need, without being forced to work multiple jobs or past retirement to pay for them.
* Protect access to abortion, so everyone can make their own health care decisions.
* Ensure wages are high enough to meet the daily costs of living.

[**Legislation that actually helps people isn’t a pipe dream. With your support, we will flip NY-17, retake our House majority, and create a government responsive to the needs of everyday people. Chip in $5 to send me back to Congress. Let’s make our dream a reality.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69906592/427659098/13284604?refcode=em23_230917_bioRS_fndd_gq_nopn___mj_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230917_bioRS_fndd_gq_nopn___mj_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=3b0687ec-ae55-ee11-9937-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjA2ODdlYy1hZTU1LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ynTzPcCnG21OPSAGye6c0L02BBDxk-NugHeXTUuQik4=)

Sincerely,

Mondaire

He’s ready to fight to lower costs for residents of the Hudson Valley, defend our democracy, raise wages, and protect reproductive rights for all. And he’s doing it without a penny from corporate PACs. = = = PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX #873, SLEEPY HOLLOW, NY 10591

subject: They’re catching up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Democrats are catching up to us. They are ready to pour millions of dollars into every race next year and are determined to let Chuck Schumer control the Senate. | Fellow American,

Democrats are catching up to us. They are ready to pour millions of dollars into every race next year and are determined to let Chuck Schumer control the Senate.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=071cee808f294886bf4892378be2b7de&_e=s_lhssfu0G3EhzpajnRvXcd-oKataBVSFUX-4ryKKIJQ58afL5eYWl7jp2i_nT-Mw41BPq5cOqM9cCar_VbmMoyyT0UtAMBKHwibNPNwa0P0k7jlFknOccwdMCczfvwjAH5DawjCrlOFKrsR2M7eTaYPr0T7IIOm7sDHad__qfrt7uOv7vOQ49kW-jw-OJIyDiW175IlcBgab22-iFf9sGtGTtYH3bV9AJ-p-2krgfvh2HFUSQ1Ywv1VyoccOJmrq9wibdz7q35vMeCuKSfsiyqWKadA1obDowkwGQnjUtiFdU8Rus2vqUPZRTKDdgAZYWgza1Z0d1kZKRRNgB3QdgezmXnB-9LgTAzncRMFzo8dmeKv8_OAEnaAdiWZS0DLCx85odeEoocqapNexwn2wmXqvLQR9QK6G-zUOim9-LQWtvI1ifU-s2_hJCFh14so)
[**WILL YOU FIGHT TO TAKE BACK THE MAJORITY?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=071cee808f294886bf4892378be2b7de&_e=s_lhssfu0G3EhzpajnRvXcd-oKataBVSFUX-4ryKKIJQ58afL5eYWl7jp2i_nT-Mw41BPq5cOqM9cCar_VbmMoyyT0UtAMBKHwibNPNwa0P0k7jlFknOccwdMCczfvwjAH5DawjCrlOFKrsR2M7eTaYPr0T7IIOm7sDHad__qfrt7uOv7vOQ49kW-jw-OJIyDiW175IlcBgab22-iFf9sGtGTtYH3bV9AJ-p-2krgfvh2HFUSQ1Ywv1VyoccOJmrq9wibdz7q35vMeCuKSfsiyqWKadA1obDowkwGQnjUthpPl6aI5krMpWJE2GSsTqQGVRbcGfC0G4x2wB6oMJ8qn_2KXOVUmNEByFWDnUGZJ97fCrV93KKltXrbHGwjzMd1pxGz2nrpRyj18HDZEj_5En_P1jUmIUP4FU9ItQzWYI7-LjtMTrqJc5dkeRBBTW8)
Democrats are working hard right now. From Pennsylvania to Nevada and Michigan to Texas - **_every seat is a battleground._**

It’s time to expect a government that cuts your taxes and deregulates the government. You deserve more say in your life. The American people deserve a government that doesn’t believe in packing the courts and the Senate. We deserve a government that believes in the Constitution and will stand up to China.

subject: Why The Constitution Makes America EXCEPTIONAL!!!
body:
Happy Constitution Day!! | | |
---
| |
---
| |
# Party of the Constitution
---
The US Constitution was created on this day 236 years ago, cementing America as a unique and exceptional nation. It has become popular nowadays to criticize or compare America with other countries.
That statement is false. The founding documents of America prove that it is a country **WITHOUT EQUAL**.
In what ways does the Constitution showcase America's uniqueness and exceptionalism?
At the time of America's founding, most governments in the world were authoritarian, with a top-down power structure. The leader was often referred to as an emperor, king, or supreme leader. Despite the varying titles, the outcome was always the same - power concentrated in one individual at the top.
Throughout history, numerous governments have implemented a parliamentary system to demonstrate their benevolence and connection with the people. Under this system, parliament members are elected by the people and make decisions based on the laws that reflect the will of the people. However, it is essential to note that this parliamentary system is not restricted in its powers, giving it the freedom to make decisions without any limitations.
The local government was the final tier of government, but with minimal authority and not responsible for significant changes. It was widely known that influential politicians were needed for significant transformations.
**How is America different?**
The United States of America was established with a unique Constitution that differed from other forms of government by embracing bottom-up power principles. Our constitutional form of government believes in extremely limited government, with a clear and defined role for the government to be as close to the people as possible. This system of government is known as Federalism and is also based on the Biblical principle of "I will make you leaders of men of 10's, 100's, and 1000's."
In the Constitution, Article 2 designates the head of our government as the President. The founders selected this title because, during the late 1700s, it held little power or influence. Despite common perceptions, the President presides over the executive branch but holds no true authority.
The President holds the power to veto any legislation passed by Congress, which can be overturned by Congress itself. Additionally, they serve as the Commander-in-Chief of the armed forces. However, the Constitution mandates that the President must seek permission from Congress before initiating a war.
The US Congress, consisting of both the House and Senate, is governed by Article 1 and functions in a similar manner to other parliamentary systems worldwide. However, there is one significant difference. While other parliaments have no restrictions on their power, the US Congress is limited to only 18 clauses of power under Article 1 Section 8.
In the United States, the government closest to its people is at the local and state levels, with county governments also playing a role. A unique aspect of the American system is its Constitution, which grants the federal government only 18 specific powers, leaving all other responsibilities to the states. This makes state governments the most direct form of governance for citizens.
**AMERICA IN 2023**
Today, we honor the courageous Americans who sacrificed their lives and fortunes to establish America as a remarkable nation and lay the groundwork for global transformation.
As we remember the brave Americans, we need to take a moment to reflect on our country's values. We must ask ourselves a hard question - are we upholding the principles that our founders fought for?
Can we acknowledge that America has failed to meet our founding principles and has become similar to other nations?
This first step doesn't have to be painful. We must acknowledge our national problem and work to fix it.
The new MIGOP, run by Constitutionalists, is focused on restoring the party's roots as the defender of the Constitution. This goal will require persistent efforts from supporters like you and we encourage you to join us in this endeavor. Together, we can expedite the process of restoring the party's and country's values.
### PRESERVE, PROTECT and DEFEND the Constitution of the United States,
### SO HELP ME GOD.
| [DONATE NOW](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=73e19d30eb&e=a2af77507c)
